sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you found another of your kind? Things should be exciting, fast-paced, and stimulating with your Rat man! You two are both ambitious, adventurous, and curious creatures who treat loved ones with special care. You’ll probably share a strong intellectual connection and plenty of good laughs. As long as you can make your similar personalities work for and not against you, you can probably look forward to a happy union.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, there won’t be any shortage of energy here. Yang people tend to approach life with vigor, passion, and purpose. In general, you both tend to be outgoing and assertive. You know what you want and go after it! Together, you’ll probably have an active social life and stimulating careers. Too much Yang energy can lead to conflict or aggression, but since you’re both probably good communicators, things should  run smoothly in this match.
sign_match.TheGood: This is a man who can keep you on your toes – and you need it! You’ll offer each other plenty of reasons to be happy. Wit? Humor? Tenderness? Generosity? Your relationship will probably have an abundance of all. It’s likely you’ll have similar values and share everything with each other as lovers and confidantes. He can give you the kind of mental stimulation you need and will adore you for your generous spirit and sense of adventure.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Consistency may be a challenge with your Rat man. Although you both like a cozy nest to come home to, who’s going to build it? You each may be so busy pursuing your ambitions or chasing down dreams that you can’t achieve a stable union. It may be difficult for both of you to give up your independence, so some compromise will be necessary in order to work through conflict.
sign_match.Romance: You probably love a guy with a big brain and pioneering spirit. That’s good, since your Rat is all those things and more! He may not be into surprises or bold romantic gestures. Don’t worry, though. He’ll make up for it in tenderness and affection. Also, he’s an entertaining conversationalist and will keep you on your toes with his wit. Don’t let him catch you right away, however. One thing is pretty common for all Rat men – they love the chase.
sign_match.Sex: To be frank, you and your Rat guy both have high libidos. Together, you might blow a fuse in the bedroom. Be careful about coming on too strong at first – he’ll want to be the dominant one between the sheets. And, he’ll probably be an eager lover, but make him prolong the torture. Don’t give in to his needs right away. He’ll be much more motivated to please you if he has to wait for his turn.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox are quite an interesting pair indeed. Definitely a case of opposites attract! Where you are clever, social, witty and fun, your Ox is shy, serious, and perhaps even a bit rigid. But therein may lie your connection – he’s attracted to your lighthearted, lusty approach to life, and you love his sense of honor and trustworthiness. If you don’t let your differences derail your relationship, this match could work.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s Yin while you are Yang. This means you two probably have opposite natures. He loves creature comforts and  domestic tranquility, while you’re social, active, and adventure-seeking. He probably tends to be more passive, introverted, and intuitive while you are bold, forthright, and thrive on a challenge. A relationship needs both Yin and Yang energies for balance, so it’s possible you’ll complement each other with your differences.
sign_match.TheGood: Your Ox guy finds comfort in close friends and family, and you are very supportive of your loved ones. You can probably make your sweet, shy Ox feel well-taken care of. Also, he’s likely to be loyal , so he probably won’t give you a reason to feel jealous or possessive. You will be able to get him to lighten up a bit and have some fun, and he can add a stabilizing influence to your life.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You may get a little bored with your Ox man, especially when it’s Friday night, and you’re ready to party! He can be amazingly stubborn about his own habits and preferences, so don’t expect him to accompany you on all your adventures. Also, he may have a tendency to disapprove of your risk-taking, entrepreneurial approach – preferring tried and true methods over taking chances. Hopefully, you can learn from one another’s differences instead of letting it hurt your relationship.
sign_match.Romance: Fairy tales and romantic gestures? Probably not with this guy. You might have to trade in the glass slippers for a pair of sneakers, get a job, and buy your own castle. But you’re probably self-sufficient to begin with anyway. Your Ox may not be terribly romantic. However, underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. There’s a passion that runs deep below the surface, but it could take time to tap. Luckily, you may be just the person to do it.
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he could be a good sexual match. Your passion and spunk between the sheets can break down his carefully constructed defenses while he can unearth your sensitive side. He’s probably not super suave or even an experienced lover, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy. He’ll probably want to be the one in charge, and you might even let him!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you’ve found yourself a Tiger man? You and this beastly guy may not be two peas in a pod, mostly because you’re so similar! This guy loves being the center of attention – like you – so you may battle for the spotlight around him. The good news is you’re both warm-hearted and loving. You’ll benefit from his generosity, and he’ll admire your lively spirit. If you want to keep him around, you’ll have to decide early who’s going to be on top and how to work out your differences.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang. What does that mean? He’s action-oriented, adventurous, and outgoing – like you. He probably loves a challenge and filling up his social calendar. You’re right at home with his competitive, upbeat nature. It may seem you both want to take the wheel and drive. You’ll have plenty to keep you busy while running around with him. One thing is likely -- there shouldn’t be any shortage of energy and ambition for you to borrow!
sign_match.TheGood: Competitive, social, and a need to succeed – that could sum up this relationship. It’s not likely anyone will be bored in your match! You’ll love his spontaneous nature; he’ll have fun chasing you around from one adventure to the next. Family and friends will probably play a big role in your lives. Your home could be a hotbed for boisterous gatherings and parties. With your charisma and his charm, you make a dynamic duo indeed.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could feel like one big power play. Can you give up the need to be right? You might have to with this guy. He’s just as competitive as you! He may have to be careful about curbing his impulsive spending habits if you share a bank account too. And, you may not understand some of his unconventional, free-spirited traits. You’ll both have to work on the art of compromise in order to avoid emotional storms.
sign_match.Romance: Your man can be bold when it comes to romancing the woman he loves. No halfhearted efforts here! He’ll be the one throwing pebbles at your window in the wee hours of the morning, sending you embarrassing bouquets of flowers at work, and declaring his love on the jumbotron during a baseball game. He certainly might make you blush. Even though it’s different than your style, his sweet sentiments will probably go over well with you. They’ll give you plenty of reassurance of his affections and reason enough to trust him.
sign_match.Sex: A Tiger and Rat in bed can have one happy romp! His lovemaking style is probably like yours. Fast and furious  – he’s always ready to pounce! Sex will probably never be boring with him. He’ll have you whenever and wherever; thank you very much. However, power plays might pop up since you both love being in charge. Make sure you take turns. He probably likes it rough, too, so wear protective gear!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rabbit might have to work through differences to be a happy pair. The good news is both of you are capable of great love and devotion. The loyalty and respect you’ll get from him will probably give your ego a healthy boost! You, in turn, can provide the love and security he craves in a relationship. You both have a strong need for a happy and safe home life, full of friends and family to share it with. However, he’ll probably have to work to keep up with your pace in order to makes things last.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s Yin while you are Yang. This means you two approach life differently and probably have opposite natures. He loves the creature comforts of home and domestic life, while you’re out seeking excitement and adventure. He probably tends to be more passive, receptive, and intuitive. You’re active, bold, forthright, and thrive on a challenge. A relationship needs both Yin and Yang energies for balance, so it’s possible you’ll complement each other with your differences.
sign_match.TheGood: When you think of a relationship with your Rabbit, you can picture a cheerfully decorated house, a fire crackling in the living room, and dinner on the table when you get home from work. You both love a happy nest, and he’ll create one for you. Another plus? Together, you can share your deepest secrets and hidden insecurities without fear. He’ll probably sweep you off your feet with his romantic notions and sensitive, generous nature. This man will be happy to provide you with life’s finest things and plenty of selfless love.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenge here may be about the green stuff! As a Rabbit, he tends to love luxury. You appreciate it too, but are probably more careful with your money. Is he suggesting a new car or an expensive vacation? You probably won’t budge if you’ve worked hard to accumulate your fortune. Does he get overly emotional sometimes? Is he occasionally frustrated with your logic? You might find you disagree about silly things. Both of you can struggle with letting the little stuff go. If it’s not a big deal, give up the need to be right.
sign_match.Romance: As a Rat, you probably appreciate being put on a pedestal. Lucky you, since your Rabbit man will typically treat you like a princess. He can be picky about the women he dates – he does have high standards. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear and what type of flowers to bring. He wants to makes things perfect, and you’ll appreciate the consideration.
sign_match.Sex: You and your Rabbit guy could share a sensual, heated connection between the sheets. While you probably have different styles – he’s passive while you’re assertive – this could work to your advantage. He may bring his perfectionist tendencies to the bedroom, so make sure you’re clean, smell good, and look delicious. He may not be the most inventive lover, but he’ll typically be sweet, well-mannered, and generous. Another thing? Don’t be afraid to be the aggressor. He’ll probably find it a turn-on.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dragon man should enjoy near perfect compatibility. Hooray! In Chinese Astrology, this is one of the best match ups – your rapport is famous! Not many can match you in wit and charm, but this guy can. He’s brimming with bold, intense energy, keeping you inspired and entertained. Even your differences should keep things exciting! Both of you are go-getters, which can make for plenty of wild and crazy adventures. Enjoy the ride.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, it’s likely you’re both action-oriented individuals. Watching from the sidelines? No way! You’re at the center of the action. Yang energy is associated with more masculine, assertive qualities, so you and he probably both want to be in charge. You’re thinkers, doers, and achievers – in life and in love. Since relationships tend to need both Yin and Yang energies, yours might need the balance of more calm, passive energy to work best.
sign_match.TheGood: Queen meets King! He loves ruling the kingdom, and now he has a partner in power. This guy generally loves to be in control, but he’ll probably let you rule the roost too. In his eyes, you’re an admirable, strong woman. You can melt away his hidden insecurities and inspire him. He probably gives you the praise and love you crave. And, since you’re both likely to be leaders, you might use your coupledom to accomplish amazing feats. Whatever you do, it’s almost certain you’ll be good at it together.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Do you have agendas and opinions about everything? You may have a tendency to be self-promoting, which could irritate your strong-willed Dragon. Similarly, he may need to check his ego once in a while, since he tends to think the world revolves around him. This battle of wills could create friction in love. On the other hand, maybe you’ll thrive off the conflict, finding it stimulating and interesting! The good news? Whatever disagreements you have should be resolved quickly since neither of you beats around the bush.
sign_match.Romance: Your mythical Dragon practically invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort and usually wants to stand out among the competition. Since you’re almost always up for adventure, you’ll probably love his spontaneity and thrill-seeking approach to love. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything!
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You probably have similar sexual styles that bring fireworks to the bedroom. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has an aggressive, dominant approach when it comes to sex. Your high-energy will suit him well, since he might keep you in bed all day!  Generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll take seriously the task of pleasing you. With his magnetism and your charm, you two could ignite serious sparks.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Snake man can make a compatible pair – once you learn to overlook your differences, that is! While you’re probably a quick-witted power player, he’s generally cautious and reserved. Your active, go-get-em nature is a stark contrast to his brooding, thoughtful demeanor. However, as two charming and magnetic personalities, this relationship could be enchanting and fulfilling for both!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Snake is Yin, while you are Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies for balance, this might work. Yin energy is associated with qualities of calm, passivity, and intuition. Yang, on the other hand, is associated with fast, aggressive, and dominant qualities. You might have different ways of relating to the world, but this could create a complementary match.
sign_match.TheGood: There could be an irresistible pull between you at first. Your charm with the Snake’s magnetism? What a combo! This guy will probably love your intelligence and critical eye, while you can appreciate his depth and sense of purpose in life. You can probably help draw him out of the lair when he’s blue while he can unearth your softer side. What else? Since you both are social and gregarious, you’ll typically have plenty of friends and acquaintances to run around with.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If he’s typical of his sign, a weakness for flirtation could get him in trouble. Once he’s in love, he can be loyal and committed -- but he might struggle to make up his mind about the relationship. Also, your verbal sparring could irritate him when he’s in need of alone time. You’ll probably have to work on compromise if you want to avoid upsets. Another thing? If you don’t keep an active social life, you both might get cranky.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man -- he invented the meaning of charm! He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and lively discussions  could result in a merging of souls. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably reveal himself slowly over time. Your best bet? Let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that probably makes your toes curl. With his seductive powers and your charisma,  there might be a strong attraction between you. Your bedroom style is probably a bit different than your Snake man’s – he’ll prefer slow and smooth over quick and rough. However, you typically won’t have to ask for what you want since he can read your mind in the sack! The best part? He knows exactly what he’s doing and how to do it well.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Uh oh. Trouble usually lands when opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac come together. While you share some similar qualities, your differences may be too much to sustain a long-term relationship. You’re both movers and shakers, albeit in different ways. A free-flowing, bohemian, independent lifestyle probably suits your Horse guy, while you’re more social and success-seeking in your adventures. You two might not be able to appreciate each other’s personalities enough to make love last. A strong spark at first, maybe, but it could fizzle out fast.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs here. Sometimes that can work, although your match might be marked by friction. Too much Yang energy can be like fireworks in a tin can! His energy orientation probably makes him somewhat impulsive, goal oriented, and even a bit aggressive. Your Yang personality gives you plenty of spunk, ambition, and a dose of impatience. Put those together, and you might have two people battling it out for the steering wheel! If one of you has enough Yin qualities – patience, reserve, and diplomacy – it will probably fare better for your relationship.
sign_match.TheGood: This guy could complement you since his strengths are typically your weaknesses, and vice versa. You can take care of practical things he probably doesn’t enjoy, like balancing the checkbook or fixing things around the house. His idealism might inspire you to accomplish your lofty goals and provide both of you with a comfortable life. Mentally, you two will probably enjoy a stimulating intellectual connection – there won’t be a shortage of communication here. If you can honor one another’s strengths and forgive weaknesses, you might have a shot.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: He probably hates being tied down, but you may want the security of a commitment. If he enjoys picking up and taking off at a moment’s notice, he probably can’t expect you to join. You’re generally more content to create a stable nest than live the life of a gypsy. Is he fiercely independent? If so, the two of you may bicker over his impulsiveness or unconventional attitude. Most likely, you sees the big picture, while he focuses on the immediate future. To make things work, you’ll have to give him freedom to roam, and he’ll have to convince you he’ll always come back.
sign_match.Romance: With his impulsive nature and your gregarious tendencies, you might have a blast when it comes to dating. You won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side. This match should be the envy of other couples – you’re witty, charming, fun, and smart, plus you have a blast together.
sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like variety. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. That should be an easy task for you – Rats are known for being inventive. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your energy and his highly-charged libido! But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom too. The thrill of doing it in unusual places will keep him from getting bored.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: While you typically lead a busy and productive social life, your Sheep man probably has a more reserved, artist’s soul. Your differences may be glaring, so you will probably have to work hard at a fulfilling relationship. You’ll be off dancing at a night club, and he’ll spend the weekend at a wilderness retreat. Connecting at home might help your love grow, as you both treat loved ones with special concern and generosity. Can you find common ground between your scheming, fast-paced ways and his dreamy and emotional nature? If so, this match might work.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As Yin and Yang, you two probably couldn’t be more different. Yin energy might make him the passive, receptive, feeling-oriented one. You, in contrast, probably have the aggressive, ambitious, and outgoing qualities associated with Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies to stay balanced, your match could be harmonious. It also, however, could be challenging since your temperaments may be opposite.
sign_match.TheGood: Viva la good life! That’s probably a motto you both subscribe to. Your knack for money making? His impeccable taste? A cushy future may be in the cards. The loyal, reliable figure he seeks is precisely you. In turn, he’ll provide that serene and peaceful environment you love coming home to. You can expect plenty of emotional support and devotion from your Sheep.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Does your Sheep man spend all your hard-earned cash? If so, you might need to lecture him on better budgeting practices. He might have to curb his appetite for fine things, since you don’t tolerate frivolity very well. There are things you need to work on too. That logical, left-brained approach to life can probably seem cold or insensitive when he needs moral or emotional support. It’s nothing personal. You two just approach life in very different ways. Be careful, too, about stuffing your feelings. Since neither of you likes to argue, things could get swept under the rug.
sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in a loving Sheep, who’s romantic in his own unique way. He may not adhere to traditions – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles may be like night and day. You’re probably quick to act, aggressive, and goal-oriented between the sheets. He, on the other hand, might see sex as a spiritual portal to higher consciousness – preferring a slow and sensual style. What you may have in common, however, is a willingness to try new things. You’re always up for a thrill, and he can have an open mind when it comes to keeping things erotically interesting. In general, there should be plenty to work with as lovers.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Fun? Energetic? Stimulating? A relationship with your Monkey man should be all that and more! You two can make quite the duo, especially in social settings where you’re free to show off. This man probably matches you in wit and ambition, which should make for an adventurous and exciting union. There may be a bit of good-natured competition since you both love the limelight, but it will only add to the fun! As one of the animals in your Love Triangle, Rat-Dragon-Monkey, this might be a match made in heaven.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, you probably approach life with vigor, passion, and purpose. With plenty of ambition and drive, Yang energy people are usually the ones going after life in a predatory-like manner. They tend to be outgoing, assertive, and high-energy. Since relationships need a balance of Yin and Yang energies, it will probably work best if one of you has some peace-loving, receptive Yin qualities too. However, since you have similar dispositions, you’ll probably find it easy to understand one another.
sign_match.TheGood: Not everyone can keep up with your Monkey man’s antics, but you can and will happily join him! As two powerful, intelligent, and popular creatures, you might be the envied couple in your circle of friends. Are you ready to travel the world? Start a business? Learn hang-gliding? Better get prepared, since there’s virtually no limit to what can be accomplished in this match. Most likely, you’ll respect each other’s independence while still joining forces as a couple. Wonderful!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might need to watch your jealous or possessive tendencies, especially if you’re going to keep your Monkey guy around. If he’s typical of his sign, he probably hates being tied down – and if you try to control him, he’ll only run further. He’ll have to give you plenty of strokes and not try to one-up you in front of your friends. If the competition heats up, you both might be tempted to come in first place at the expense of your relationship. So don’t let your ambitious natures ruin a good match.
sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you act classy and refined around his posse. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you? After all he’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get the emotional or spiritual connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rooster can be a good pair if you can learn to understand one another's motivations. As a clever schemer, your shrewd mind may not measure up to his honest, straightforward ways. He probably likes to stick to traditional tried-and-true routes in life and may disapprove of your looser, more creative approach. However, he can probably appreciate your generous gestures, and you admire his steadfastness. This man can be a trustworthy, reliable companion for you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang sign, you approach life with energy, passion, and purpose! As a Yin energy person, you Rooster is probably more subdued, reserved, and orderly in his habits. Since it’s usually good to have a Yin/Yang balance, your opposing energies might actually work to your advantage. The problem could be you probably have trouble understanding each other’s motivations and personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: While you’re probably not as exacting as your Rooster, you do have a serious side and know how to treat loved ones well. He’ll appreciate your consideration and will typically be generous, protective, and reliable. He can admire your ingenuity when it comes to achieving your goals, and you’ll appreciate his clever mind and innate sense of justice. You two can probably go far as a team, whether as lovers, spouses, or even business partners.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Is he a typical Rooster perfectionist? If so, he might get into the habit of nagging you to shape up and get serious. You tend to do things your own way – a true innovator and entrepreneur – so he’ll probably stifle your desire for him if he nags too much. You’ll have to watch your actions, however, since he typically won’t tolerate unfaithfulness or sticky behavior. As long as you understand one another’s differences, you can probably get past any challenges.
sign_match.Romance: The flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. Since you’re probably busy leading your own life anyway, this approach should come naturally!
sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dog guy make a great pair, despite your differences. You love to be surrounded by a team of loyal confidantes, and his faithfulness is famous! Since you probably thrive on change and stimulation, his sometimes moody  behavior and conservative approach could be frustrating. Still, he can recognize the presence of a true friend in you and will want to return the favor. This man treats his loved ones well, and you’ll make him feel just as special.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are both Yang signs; although, your energies manifest in different ways. You’re probably an active, outgoing, social type who needs plenty of stimulation to keep your mind engaged. He, on the other hand, tends to be more of a homebody, but might also need physical activity to keep him feeling upbeat. In general, you will both stand up to fight for your loved ones and defend what’s right. Sometimes, two people with the same energy orientation can have trouble getting along, but you two will probably be compatible.
sign_match.TheGood: You and your Dog man are typically independent, live and let live types. As a warm and upbeat team, you two are probably both compromising and tender with one another. Your light-hearted, positive nature can do wonders for his occasional bouts of moodiness, while his loyalty and generosity will refresh and replenish you. Neither of you tend to be argumentative, so you can probably count on smooth channels of communication and a lively, cheerful relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There may come a point where he suspects you of questionable behavior. While you’re usually loyal to your loved ones, your shrewd and sometimes cunning nature might cause him worry. And, though you will probably be accommodating to his changing moods, you could tire of his occasional need for solitude. You want the company of your loved ones absolutely! Make sure you reassure each other of your affection and don’t be quick to blame or criticize his motives.
sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but he’ll pay close attention to your needs. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when no one else is. Instead of fast and passionate, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
sign_match.Sex: With a solid friendship, sex with your Dog guy might be quite fulfilling. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably plenty willing to satisfy you in bed. He likely has a hearty appetite for sex, and you’ll take turns being in charge. Just be careful with his ego. He can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. His traditional side may clash with your inventive one, but it could also result in some interesting bedroom play if you’re both willing to compromise.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In matters of the heart, you and your Pig guy can make an upbeat, happy pair. Both of you treat your loved ones with generosity and warmth, and you each typically have idealistic natures. He can appreciate your wit and sense of humor, while you will benefit from his sensual, selfless nature. With your good taste and his luxurious leanings, you’ll probably enjoy the finer things in life. Not to mention, you should have a solid and meaningful friendship. This man will typically treat you like the gem you are. Wonderful.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yin; you’re Yang. Since your energies are different, this might make things challenging. You tend to be more assertive, outgoing, and action-oriented. He, on the other hand, is probably more of a passive, reactive type. You’re likely to be bolder and more boisterous and he more cautious and sensitive. Can you make your differences complementary? If you can find harmony in your different habits, you could make it work.
sign_match.TheGood: Life could be one big party when you two join forces. Energy? Optimism? There’s plenty of both to keep your relationship buoyant. You may share an intellectual connection in addition to a strong physical pull. You’ll love his positive, agreeable nature, while he’ll feel safe and protected under your watch. You’ll both work hard to give each other the life of luxury – and will want to enjoy it together! He will be happy to give you that special breed of love and tenderness that only a Pig guy can.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Both of you might find it hard to keep your feet on the ground. It could be difficult for each of you to practice restraint when it comes to impulsive decisions. The stability of your union might need some work, as you’ll lead a busy life and he could get cranky when you’re gone all the time. You might end up blaming each other for your failures when, in reality, you probably have many of the same faults. Practice prudence and you’ll probably stand a better chance.
sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might match well with your spunk and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Your Pig is a true romantic! He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Appeal to his senses to awaken his sexual energy. This guy loves good food, soft linens, and heavenly smells. As sensitive and sensual lovers, you two might find sexual rapture between the sheets.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat are quite an interesting pair indeed. Definitely a case of opposites attract! Where he is clever, social, witty and fun, you’re probably reserved, serious, and perhaps even a bit rigid. But that may the reason for your connection – you’re attracted to his lighthearted, lusty approach to life, and he loves your sense of honor and trustworthiness. If you don’t let your differences derail your relationship, this match could work well.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re Yin while he’s Yang. This means you two probably have opposite natures. You prefer the action to come to you while he’s social, outgoing, and adventure-seeking. You probably tend to be more passive, introverted, and intuitive while he is bold, forthright, and thrives on a challenge. A relationship needs both Yin and Yang energies for balance, so it’s possible you’ll complement each other with your differences.
sign_match.TheGood: You tend to find comfort in close friends and family, and he’s very supportive of his loved ones. He can probably make you feel well-taken care of and nurtured. Both of you are loyal, too, so you aren't likely to give one another reason to feel jealous or possessive. He’ll probably be able to get you to lighten up a bit and have some fun while you can add a stabilizing influence to his life and the relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rat man may get a little bored with your pace, especially when it’s Friday night and he’s ready to party! Admit it -- you can be stubborn about your habits and preferences, so he can’t expect you to accompany him on all his adventures. Also, you may have a tendency to disapprove of his risk-taking, entrepreneurial approach – preferring tried and true methods over taking chances. Hopefully, you can learn from one another’s differences instead of letting them ruin your good time
sign_match.Romance: Your Rat man is fun but a tad unpredictable when it comes to romance. He’s probably looking for someone smart, witty, and ambitious with whom he can banter and talk until exhaustion. More than a hot body or pretty face, this guy is usually looking for an intellectual equal and friend in his mate. You might need to be a bit more adventurous than you’re used to – he’ll want to take you everywhere and anywhere as long as there’s something new to see. Get ready to explore, expand, and try new things.
sign_match.Sex: The bedroom should be a sensual play land with your Rat guy around! He’ll probably take the lead, and you’ll be  glad to play the submissive role. As a generous and giving lover, he’ll make your pleasure a high priority. He may be a bit too eager, so slow him down with your sensual, soft style. If you ask for what you want, he’ll see your sexual satisfaction as another mission to be accomplished -- and he won’t stop until he’s succeeded!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox can make a powerful team, but there could be clashes of will – it’s likely you both have strong and stubborn personalities. There should be plenty of love and tenderness, as you two are loyal and faithful creatures. However, you might have to work on being less rigid and being emotionally sensitive to each other’s needs. If you can make it work, this match probably has the lasting potential and fortitude characteristic of both of you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, there might not be enough assertive Yang energy in your relationship. He’s probably somewhat reserved, passive, and non-confrontational – like you. Trouble could pop up when both of you turn inward instead of hashing things out on the spot. On a positive note, your similar temperaments can help you understand one another better. If one of you is a bit more dominant, ambitious, and outgoing, you’ll typically have a better energy balance in the relationship.
sign_match.TheGood: Your day signs are both Oxen. You’ll probably make a strong, solid team – but you might butt heads once in a while! He’s got the same steely fortitude as you, so you might need to learn the art of compromise. The good news is that you probably share similar values and temperaments, both preferring a quiet and orderly home. Neither of you are superficial or impulsive, so you’ll probably take things slowly and steadily until you’ve built a solid foundation for trust and mutual respect. How nice.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: As two strong personalities, you both might be incredibly stubborn. Your quiet, reserved natures could also cause problems when there’s conflict to work out – neither of you are usually proactive about solving it. Be careful about being passive-aggressive or sweeping things under the rug. You’ll have to be able to compromise about the big things as well as the little things. Otherwise, your relationship could become completely stagnant.
sign_match.Romance: Fairy tales and romantic gestures? Probably not with this guy. You might have to trade in the glass slippers for a pair of sneakers, get a job, and buy your own castle. But you’re probably self-sufficient to begin with anyway. Your Ox may not be terribly romantic. However, underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. There’s a passion that runs deep below the surface, but it could take time to tap. Luckily, you may be just the person to do it.
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he could be a good sexual match. Your passion between the sheets can break down his carefully constructed defenses while he can unearth your sensitive side. He’s probably not super suave or even an experienced lover, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy. He’ll probably want to be the one in charge, and you might even let him!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: If you’ve found yourself a Tiger man, you’ve probably met your match. You can learn a lot from this fast-paced, impulsive creature. As polar opposites in a lot of ways, you may be on different wavelengths. Where he’s spontaneous and assertive, you’re logical and reserved. You both have strong opinions and firm beliefs. And, your iron will resonates with his hard-driving ambition and courage in the face of danger. If you can understand your differences, you might be one pair to be reckoned with!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yang to your Yin, which means you both have qualities that can balance each other out. He’s probably action-oriented, driven, and outgoing. You, on the other hand, are likely to be more passive, receptive, and reserved. This could make your differences quite glaring, but you might learn a lot from each other. In general, he’ll probably get you out of the house more and teach you to have fun, and you’ll remind him when it’s time to slow down and get serious.
sign_match.TheGood: When the Tiger and Ox get together, things get done! Are you and your man saving whales or fighting global warming? I wouldn’t be surprised. You both probably have dedication, passion, and ambition up to your eyeballs. There will be plenty to talk about since you and he are both strongly opinionated. You might start a business together or work as a team on behalf of some important cause. Overall, you could be one powerful pair.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A relationship with him may seem like tug-of-war at times. He’s probably the one animal in the Chinese zodiac that can beat you in battle – or at least put up a worthy fight! That’s because he’s stubborn like you! You might not like it if he’s constantly running off on his own – you like order and consistency. He, however, typically doesn’t want to follow the rules. If he can learn to be flexible and reign in his wild roaming, he’ll have a better chance with you. Learning the art of warmth and affection might be your area for improvement, too.
sign_match.Romance: Your man can be bold when it comes to romancing the woman he loves. No halfhearted efforts here! He’ll be the one throwing pebbles at your window in the wee hours of the morning, sending you embarrassing bouquets of flowers at work, and declaring his love on the jumbotron during a baseball game. He certainly might make you blush. Even though it’s different than your style, his sweet sentiments will probably go over well with you. They’ll give you plenty of reassurance of his affections and reason enough to trust him.
sign_match.Sex: A Tiger and Ox in bed can have one passionate romp! His lovemaking style is probably nothing like yours. Fast, furious, passionate – he’s always ready to pounce! You, on the other hand, probably like it slow and steady. The good news? Sex will probably never be boring with him. He’ll have you whenever and wherever; thank you very much. However, power plays might pop up since you both love being in charge. Make sure you take turns. He probably likes it rough, too, so make sure you wear protective gear!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Things should be pretty cozy when you’re cuddled up next to your sensitive Rabbit. Since you probably love having someone to rely on, he could be your ticket to happiness. He’s dependable, generous, and faithful. An Ox couldn’t ask for more! You’ll probably be the leader in this relationship, but that’s fine with him. He’d rather give you the reigns anyway. He’ll probably act as the warming agent to cool your stone-cold exterior. Deep down, you knows his love and generosity can melt away your worries.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and your Rabbit partner are both Yin energies. What does that mean? You’re more passive, quiet, receptive, and subdued than someone with Yang energy. Preferring to react to situations instead of jumping into the game, you and he approach life in a similar way. You’d probably rather stay at home than surround yourself with tons of people in social settings. Sharing a Yin makeup makes it easier to relate to each other.
sign_match.TheGood: You two can really blossom as individuals under the close and careful attention you give to each other. With a wonderful, quiet connection, your strengths can truly shine! Even if you pretend to scoff at affection, you’ll appreciate his loving nature. He will provide you with the security and consistency you long for in a mate. Happy to throw parties and entertain at home, he can help you come out of your shell in a more comfortable environment.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Because you’re both more inclined to spend time at home, things could get dull in the long run. However, you prefer honest communication and genuine connection over fleeting passion anyway. Your Rabbit might feel slighted when you aren’t in a good mood and shrugs off his love like it’s an annoyance. You may accuse him of being too sentimental, but it’s just because he leads with his heart most of the time, while you’re guided by your head. Your challenge will be to keep loving each other, even on your bad days.
sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life – lucky you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. He’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll probably open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. Sounds good to me!
sign_match.Sex: No impulsive bedroom behavior here – you’re both slow moving and careful in love making. On one hand, he’s probably excellent in the foreplay department. But, you may wish he was a tad more aggressive. Your best way to please this man is to show off your seductive side. He might let you dominate, but don’t overwhelm him with too much aggression. He needs to take his time. If you let him, he can be delightfully creative in the sack.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dragon could make a connection as long as you respect each other’s differences. Look out, because he probably has a fiery, somewhat impetuous nature. You, however, are pretty much the opposite – solid, steady, and serious. He’s typically the outgoing, social director, and you tend to get anxiety in a big crowd! Where he’s adaptable and open-minded, you might be more conservative and a rigid thinking. The name of the game here will probably be compromise.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s a Yang; you’re a Yin sign. Relationships need a bit of both energies to function well, so this might help balance things – or it could highlight your differences. You’re probably not the assertive, outwardly focused person he is. Generally more reserved and quiet, Yin people value harmony and peace. While he might not go around looking for conflict, he’s probably inspired by challenges and chaos.
sign_match.TheGood: Even though he’s different, your Dragon can appreciate your honorable nature and good intentions. Some get squeamish under those judgmental tendencies, but he probably likes the honesty. Since he tends to be a power player with a knack for luck, you’ll appreciate what he can bring to the table – he’ll probably be a good provider. Also, his changeable, outgoing nature might help draw you out. In return, your common sense could rub off nicely on him.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things to work on? Your values might not match up. While he’s generally an idealist with a pioneering spirit, you can be conservative and traditional. You won’t support his crazy ideas until he’s actually proved they’re feasible. If he happens to breathe fire over something, you’ll generally do your best to avoid an argument. However, when disagreements do happen, they can be epic! He’s a force to be reckoned with, but you’ve probably perfected the art of being stubborn.
sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon invented romance. He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. You might blush at his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection. But, he won’t give you any reason to doubt the way he feels about you! He’ll want to parade you around and show you off to all his friends. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can persuade you to do just about anything!
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You and he will probably be hot and heavy in bed. He’s a generous and emotional lover but also physically impulsive and passionate. Your brooding, reserved sexual style will probably suit him well since he loves to dominate! As he’s a very goal-oriented guy, he’ll take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means he’ll probably endure between the sheets. Just be careful – this man can have a wandering eye since his imagination is always on overdrive.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Snake guy can make a great pair! You both are part of the Zodiac Love Triangle and a natural match for each other. Though outwardly different, you share similar sensibilities. You both prefer quality and depth over quantity and flashiness. Neither of you is afraid of hard work, and you value a strong and stable home life. From the outside, this match might look a bit tame – or even dull – but on the inside, it sparkles with its own special qualities. Things between you and your Snake man can be very satisfying indeed!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin, which means you’ll take a similar approach to life. As a yin sign, you are usually more relaxed, easygoing, receptive, intuitive, and sensitive. Your man is probably the same. Without Yang energy, however, your relationship might need a bit of zip and zest to stay interesting. For the most part, your similar orientations can work well together so long as you keep each other active and inspired.
sign_match.TheGood: Since he tends to be charming and popular, your Snake could help you come out of your shell. However, he’ll still appreciate a love of home and domestic comforts. You’ll probably be drawn to his intuitive nature and philosophical mind. You two can learn a lot from each other, since you both generally have your own ways of dealing with the world. All in all, things should be amicable, peaceful, and fulfilling in this duo.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This guy might be a bit withholding. Do you suspect him of having secrets? He’s probably not hiding anything, but you may feel insecure around this popular, well-loved guy. Try to give him the benefit of the doubt. He’s probably a more private person, so communicate instead of making assumptions. He might get frustrated when your rigid thinking meets his flexible nature. But, with a little understanding and respect, you two should get past any relationship hurdles.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man! He invented the meaning of charm, which, deep down, you’ll appreciate. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and you could be a perfect fit. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably reveal himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that makes your toes curl. It’s likely there will be a strong attraction between you two since you’re in the same Love Triangle in the Chinese Zodiac. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Oh yes! Your bedroom style is possibly a bit different than your Snake man’s, but your connection will probably be out of this world. He’s slow and sensuous. You’re physical and passionate. Sexual bliss! You generally won’t have to work too hard to be satisfied in the sack with this guy. He knows exactly what he’s doing and how to do it.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In many ways, your Horse man may feel like your total opposite. Your personalities conflict in a number of ways. While he’s generally carefree and unrestrained, you’re probably conscientiousness and conservative. The freedom from attachment he craves is precisely the opposite of what you want: security and routine. Though different, you both can be incredibly passionate people. Whether or not the passion for each other can last, however, could be the central issue.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Horse is a Yang sign, while you are Yin. Relationships tend to need a balance of both energies to stay harmonious, but opposite energies can clash. Your general nature is probably more reactive and reserved than someone with Yang energy. On the flip side, he’s typically more aggressive and adventurous than you. The key here would probably be understanding each other’s different temperaments.
sign_match.TheGood: Despite his independent personality, he probably wants someone to lean on. That’s good, since you’ll love being his rock. You can probably provide him with the love and security he craves, deep down. In contrast, he might be just the person to draw you out of you comfort zone. He can teach you to lighten up and live more freely, while you can show him the value of a steady, dependable partner. All in all, you each have strengths that can support the foundation of this relationship, as long as your differences don’t break it apart.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably like the pleasantries of a safe and secure home, while he’s happy to float around aimlessly. Marriage might be out of the question if he isn’t willing to settle down in one place. You might not understand his need for constant diversions – it could make you feel you’re not enough. It’s not likely you’ll accompany him on his wild excursions, but he probably wants to fly solo anyway. He’ll have to give you the promise of his love before asking permission for freedom. It’s probably the only way you two will work things out.
sign_match.Romance: His impulsive nature should keep things interesting if you’re dating. Don’t expect him to be a planner – he tends to fly by the seat of his pants. On the other hand, you won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side.
sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like action. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your physical passion and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom too. The thrill of doing it in unusual places and seeing your wild side will keep him from getting bored.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In general, opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac are drawn to each other like moths to the flame. Your stable and persevering nature is a sharp contrast to the free-spirited, capricious Sheep. While you may be wildly attracted to your polar opposite, it’s probably wise to tread carefully. A consuming infatuation could eventually be replaced by grim realities of your differences. It might be best to take things slowly with this guy before declaring your undying love.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, there might not be enough assertive Yang energy in your relationship. He’s probably somewhat reserved, passive, and non-confrontational – like you. Trouble could pop up when both of you turn inward instead of hashing things out on the spot. On a positive note, your similar temperaments can help you understand one another better. If one of you is a bit more dominant, ambitious, and outgoing, you’ll typically have a better energy balance in the relationship.
sign_match.TheGood: You can picture a cozy home, a crackling fire, and your sensitive Sheep to share it with. He’s usually the loving, generous type and will always defend your honor. With your innate sense of responsibility and duty, you’ll probably take care of the practical things like balancing your checkbook and paying the mortgage on time. In turn, he’ll bring out your sensitive, lighthearted side. You can appreciate his loving sentiments like having dinner on the table or giving you a backrub after a long day. Since you both probably prefer quiet time over the bustling social scene, you’ll have consistent company – just the way you like it.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Does he have a hard time making decisions? If so, arguments could erupt over his fickleness, since you’re a woman with a plan! In turn, your need for schedules and routine might give him anxiety. A go-with-the-flow attitude is a foreign concept to you, so he’ll have to at least feign a sense of organization. This guy can have high expectations, so don’t be surprised if he gets moody or out of sorts when life doesn’t deliver what he wants. Luckily, you can probably help him stay grounded.
sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in your sensual Sheep, who’s romantic in his own unique way. He may not adhere to traditions – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. You may not be as mushy-gushy, but you can probably open up your emotional floodgates with this man. He can penetrate your heart in spite of defenses, so make sure he’s trustworthy before you hop in the sack and get attached. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s sweet and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As two people who know what they want, you may discover what you don’t want in this relationship. It can be a fair match if you’re well aware of your differences, but you may be too dissimilar for a long-term union. Your Monkey’s capricious and playful nature is in direct opposition to your serious and conservative personality. While you may want to settle down into a life of security and routine, he probably needs independence and freedom. You’ll probably have to work at a satisfying match.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s a Yang sign while you are Yin. With different energy orientations you could find it hard to understand each other’s temperaments. You’re probably more passive, introverted, and easy-going. He, on the other hand, usually wants to be where the action is. This could create challenges if you can’t learn to compromise or find similar interests. He may not understand your quiet, reserved personality, while you don’t get his daring and unconventional approach to life.
sign_match.TheGood: You may have the very qualities your Monkey could be lacking, and vice versa. Your seriousness and industriousness could be a good match for his sharp mental capabilities and lofty goals. If you join forces, a lot can be accomplished here. In turn, his carefree attitude could help loosen you up a bit. Since you each share strong opinions regarding just about everything, you both can learn a thing or two from the other – if you’re willing to be open-minded.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Eventually, you’ll probably want to settle down. His independent nature might make you uneasy, and he’s probably not quick to give up his freedom. If he’s not willing to listen or follow your advice, you may become tyrannical or irritatingly stubborn. Neither of you are likely to back down and bend to the other’s wishes, which should make for some interesting arguments. Since he can’t be told what to do, and you refuse to give up authority, you might not get far unless you’re both willing to compromise.
sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you laugh at his jokes and be a good sport when he plays his little pranks. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but that’s fine with you.  With him around, at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you, after all? He’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get an emotional connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster make a nearly perfect pair. Hooray! He’s another animal in your Zodiac Love Triangle. You’re quite similar in temperaments and values, while your differences are usually complementary. You both are rather conservative in approaching life: preferring practical, tried-and-true methods to anything risky. His perfectionism meshes well with your penchant for doing things right and honorably. All in all, you two make a strong and practical team.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs, which means you’ll have little trouble understanding one another’s approach to life Neither of you tend to be aggressive or proactive, which is fine – you’ll both be content to create a cozy home together and live a quieter existence. In general, you can probably respect each other’s temperaments and give one another what you need.
sign_match.TheGood: With your sturdy personality, you can serve as the backbone for the relationship, while his keen eye and innate resourcefulness can move things forward when it’s stagnant. You both value trustworthiness and honesty, so neither of you will ever give the other reason for jealousy or possessiveness. When in love, your normally shy, serious and reserved demeanor gives way to a deep sweetness. Enjoy!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: One of the challenges between you may result from your mutual tendency to be rather blunt, critical or judgmental.  Both of you tend to have honest, direct natures and want things done your own way. With a mutual stubbornness, you might have to work on the art of compromise. You typically won’t back down, and he’s used to getting his way, isn’t he?! Luckily, you can probably work past these challenges regardless of your differences.
sign_match.Romance: Your flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. The passive, aloof approach should come quite naturally to you while working wonders on him!
sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Your Dog guy may be attracted to your Ox strength and stability but could find your domineering ways a bit too forceful for his liking. While he probably shies away from conflict or distress, he can be a bit cantankerous and moody—which you may not know how to deal with. Both of you probably share honest and trustworthy natures, but there may not be sufficient sparks to keep the heat of passion alive. If you can respect one another’s differences, however, you might be able to create a comfortable relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is a Yang sign; you are Yin. While you both tend to be creatures of habit, you may be a bit more passive and reactive than your Dog. He will generally get worked up over things dear to his heart, but you can be coldly logical and detached—especially if you see everyone around you getting emotional. His friendly and communicative personality might become stifled by your introverted, stoic one. All in all, your different energies might take some work to balance out.
sign_match.TheGood: Not many signs are as faithful and loyal as you, but your Dog probably will be. Both of you can be strongly attached to the ones you love, so there shouldn’t be much worry about infidelity in this relationship. Since he might struggle with inherent trust issues, you will be a wise investment for the long-term. Both of you adhere to high standards for yourself and others, so your relationship will probably be morally sound and predictable. Together, you can create a harmonious and orderly home life that’s cozy and comfortable for both.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you push around your Dog man one too many times, you may unleash that bark. Your stern lectures may come from a place of love, but he can get agitated with people who are bullies. When his outspoken and independent nature meets your rigid thinking, there might be monumental arguments or clashes in opinion. These upsets could send him into a tailspin of worry and anxiety, which you may view as childish or unnecessary.
sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with your Dog man, but he’ll pay close attention to your needs. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when no one else is. Instead of fast and passionate, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
sign_match.Sex: With a solid friendship, sex with your guy might be quite fulfilling. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably plenty willing to satisfy you in bed. He’s got a hearty appetite for sex, and you’ll probably take turns being in charge. Just be careful with his ego. He can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. His traditional side and your passionate one could also result in some interesting bedroom play if you’re both willing to compromise.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Pig guy can be a good match, but you may be a sedentary pair. When you come together, both of your sensualist natures are heightened -- making food, leisure, lovemaking, and sleeping high priorities! There’s nothing wrong with that, but you may need a bit of spunk to keep things interesting. Your calm, grounded nature can complement his positive, pleasant one. He can help draw you out of your shell while you offer the stability and faithfulness he needs in a partner.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. Yin energy people are usually receptive, intuitive, calm, and perhaps a bit introverted. You probably prefer to stay under the radar and observe things instead of being at the center of action. Most likely, he’s more passive, tolerant, and giving – like you. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other.
sign_match.TheGood: You two can probably bring out the best in each other. You appreciate him for his selfless, devoted spirit, while he loves you for your hard-working, loyal nature. You probably won’t find much to argue about since you understand and forgive one another’s faults easily. That strong, loyal, loving figure you probably look for in a man is the essence of your Pig.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While you love sensual pleasures as much as him, you may not appreciate him spending your hard-earned money on hot-stone massages or a $200 bottle of wine. Does he wish you were more demonstrative and emotionally available? Probably. You may be cold and logical when he needs warm and nurturing. With his tolerant and forgiving nature, however, he should be able to help you loosen up a bit. You, in turn, can be the disciplinarian when he’s being too extravagant.
sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity are matched by your passion. Just make sure you aren’t rushing into things. As two sensual creatures, you can both get swept away easily.
sign_match.Sex: Your Pig guy is a curious blend of sweet and salty. He’s sensitive, but quirky – especially in the bedroom. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll have him hooked.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you’ve found yourself a Rat? You and the rodent may not be two peas in a pod, mostly because you’re so similar! This guy loves being the center of attention – like you – so you may battle for the spotlight around him. The good news is you’re both warm-hearted and loving. You’ll benefit from his generosity, and he’ll admire your courage. If you want to keep him around, you’ll have to decide early who’s going to be on top and how to work out your differences.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang. What does that mean? He’s action-oriented, adventurous, and outgoing – like you. He probably loves a challenge and filling up his social calendar. You’re right at home with his competitive, upbeat nature. It may seem you both want to take the wheel and drive! You’ll have plenty to keep you busy while you’re running around with him. One thing is almost certain: There shouldn’t be any shortage of energy and ambition between you two!
sign_match.TheGood: Competitive, social, and needing to succeed – that could sum up this relationship. It’s not likely anyone will be bored in this match! You’ll love his spontaneous nature. He’ll have fun chasing you around from one adventure to the next. Family and friends will probably play a big role in your lives. Your home could be the hotbed for boisterous gatherings and parties. With your charisma and his charm, this is a dynamic duo indeed.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could feel like one big power play. Can you give up the need to be right? You might have to with this guy. He’s just as competitive as you! Be careful about spending all of his hard-earned money, too. He’s generous, but he might get irritated by your impulsive tendencies. Can you say, limit those shopping sprees?! And, he may not understand your unconventional traits. You’ll both have to work on the art of compromise in order to avoid emotional storms.
sign_match.Romance: What’s it like to date this guy? I couldn’t tell you – he’s totally unpredictable! The only likely thing is you won’t have the same date twice. He may not be great at grand romantic gestures, but you’ll get plenty of physical affection. You’ll love how much he makes you laugh and will never run out of things to talk about. He’s generous, thoughtful, and smart. What more could you ask for?!
sign_match.Sex: Remember how I said you’d have to decide who will be on top? This applies to your sex life as well! Things could go one of two ways. Your explosive and wild ways might clash with his high-energy approach. Or, you may create sexual fireworks. This man loves the chase, so make sure you keep him guessing. Don’t be too quick to fulfill his needs. He’s eager, so make sure you slow him down. If you ask for what you want, he’ll see your sexual pleasure as another mission to be accomplished. And, he won’t stop until he’s succeeded.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: If you’ve found yourself an Ox, you’ve probably met your match. You can learn a lot from this slower-moving, methodical creature. A polar opposite in a lot of ways, you may be on different wavelengths. Where you’re spontaneous and assertive, he’s logical and reserved. You both have strong opinions and firm beliefs. And, his iron will resonates with your hard-driving ambition and courage in the face of danger. If you can understand your differences, you might be a pair to be reckoned with!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yin to your Yang. This means you both have qualities that can balance each other out. You’re probably action-oriented, driven, and outgoing. He’s likely to be more passive, receptive, and reserved. This could make your differences noticeable, but you might learn a lot from each other. Typically, you’ll get him out of the house more, and he’ll remind you when to slow down.
sign_match.TheGood: When the Tiger and Ox get together, things get done! Are you and your man saving whales or fighting global warming? I wouldn’t be surprised. You both probably have dedication, passion, and ambition up to your eyeballs. There will be plenty to talk about since you and he are both strongly opinionated. You might start a business together or work as a team on behalf of some important cause. Overall, you could be one powerful pair.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A relationship with him may seem like tug-of-war at times. He’s probably the one animal in the Chinese zodiac that can beat you in battle. That’s because he’s generally more stubborn than you! Your Ox might not like it if you’re constantly running off on your own – he likes order and consistency. You, however, typically don’t like following rules. If you can learn to be flexible and reign in your wild roaming, you’ll have a better chance with him. Learning the art of warmth and affection might be what he needs to work on too.
sign_match.Romance: He’ll probably buy you a warm winter coat over a dozen roses. He’s typically practical, not wildly romantic. Since you may love big gestures of affection, you could be bummed when he fails to surprise you or act spontaneous. But, this man is steady. He’ll remember your birthday and anniversary and provide a safe and secure home life. Be sure to thank him and compliment him a lot – this will encourage him to do more.
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he can be a good sexual match. Your sensuality and sensitivity between the sheets may break down all his carefully constructed defenses. That big, tough guy stands to be putty in your arms. Feeling freer to be himself in bed, his passion can be enormous. Here’s where your mutual steadfastness and ambition can produce results.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger man could make a great match – if only you could stop fighting about who’s in charge! You might be instantly attracted to his magnetic personality, and he’ll recognize his own kind in you. Both of you can be warm-hearted, adventurous, and upbeat. Love your freedom? Don’t worry, cause he completely understands. As two independent Tigers, you respect each other’s need for autonomy. Get ready for a wild ride!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities make for tons of action! Generally, you’re both quick to jump on new opportunities, love to travel, and can’t wait to get your hands on the next thing. It’s likely you’ll both want power and to be at the center of attention. You and your Tiger man will have enough zip and zest for everyone around you. He wants to conquer new territory, move mountains, and fulfill his lifelong dreams – like you.
sign_match.TheGood: This guy could quickly fall under your spell, and you his. A fast and furious infatuation will probably develop here. Moving in together, getting married, or even jumping in the bed on the first date might happen. He’ll probably excite you to no end, and you’ll return the favor. Both of you are capable of being extremely generous and kind-hearted in love, so you won’t have to worry about your needs not being met. What’s better? You’ll probably read each other’s minds! He’ll inspire you to do great things, and you’ll be the fuel to his fire too.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could get unpredictable for you having another Tiger around. He’s probably just as fickle and spontaneous as you. Don’t know where he is on a Saturday night? Typical Tiger. It’s not that he doesn’t care, but his need for freedom might influence his actions. Since you’re independent too, it could be a challenge finding time to be with each other. Also, make sure you let him win once in a while. His competitive streak is only matched by yours.
