sign_match.Romance: Two Tigers equals double the fun, but double the danger! You’ll love his quick decisions and go-for-it attitude. He’ll find your bubbling energy and passion utterly irresistible. You might have strange and spontaneous dates that could lead t o some unexpected adventures. But, beware of burnout. An instant connection could be replaced by a heated argument if you disagree about something. Also, make sure you wear protective gear. You never know where this man might take you.
sign_match.Sex: Did you even make it to the bedroom? You and your Tiger can get so caught up in the throes of passion you’ll do it no matter where you are. Most likely, sex will never be boring with him. He’ll have you whenever and wherever; thank you very much. And don’t forget the occasional sex vacation to an exotic destination. Bali would be nice! One thing though power plays might pop up since you both love being in charge. Make sure you take turns. He probably likes it rough, too, so keep that protective gear I mentioned close by.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Couples get along best when one doesn’t want to eat the other. You might be tempted to chomp on your Rabbit man, if only because he’s so delectable and pretty to look at. You might be hard-hitting, boisterous, and a bit brash. He, on the other hand, is calm, quieter, and somewhat calculating. He tends to love a perfectly serene home while you’re content to live in a jungle. This delicate creature is likely to be different from you in more ways than one.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: While you’re Yang, he’s Yin. How does that fare for your relationship? You’re generally the courageous, go-getter, while he’s behind the scenes puttering away.  He probably won’t accompany you on your spur-of-the-moment travels or wild adventures – he’s too busy holding down the fort. All in all, your Rabbit guy has qualities you could stand to borrow, and vice versa.
sign_match.TheGood: If you’ve snagged yourself a Rabbit, consider yourself lucky. He’s probably sweet, compassionate, refined, and classy. He’ll give and give until he can’t give anymore, and you love the attention. You’re both generous and compassionate, which means communication should be good. Also, you can probably be confident this man will put your happiness above him own.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might find you don’t have much in common. He’s more likely to be content to stay at home while you paint the town with your posse. Since he’ll probably be loving and sensitive to a fault, be careful about taking advantage of his kindness. Flying by the seat of his pants is really not his style, so don’t be surprised if he wants more stability and security in the relationship than you. He’ll probably need to know where he stands, so give him plenty of reassurance. Otherwise, he could withdraw since he may be the type who doesn’t easily pick himself up off the floor when knocked down..
sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life – lucky you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. He’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll probably open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. Sounds good to me!
sign_match.Sex: In contrast to your impulsive bedroom behavior, your guy is slow moving and careful in his love making. On one hand, he’s probably excellent in the foreplay department. But, you may get bored with his pace. Your best way to please this man is to show off your seductive side. He might let you dominate, but don’t overwhelm him with too much aggression. He needs to take his time. If you let him, he can be delightfully creative in the sack.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You’ll probably fall hard for the Dragon man, and for good reason! He’s powerful, enigmatic, and charming. You’re not afraid of this fire-breathing creature. In fact, you’ll probably thrive off his energy. This man won’t balk at your mood swings or tell you not to go climb Mt. Everest. He’ll just insist you buy proper outdoor gear. Though you wear masks of bravery, both of you are likely to be sensitive and warm on the inside. One thing’s for sure; he  has the energy and passion to keep up with you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities. You’ll have plenty of excitement in this relationship! Typically, you’re both goal oriented, ambitious, and not afraid to go after what you want. It’s likely you’ll want to rule the kingdom and have the love of your minions. You two will have enough fire and raw energy to do just about anything together. And , he’ll be happy to keep up with your fast pace.
sign_match.TheGood: While other men might try to keep you on a leash, he is probably amused by your free-spirited nature. And, isn’t he good at calming you down when you’re upset?! He also loves to be spontaneous. This guy will typically be one big whirlwind of energy and excitement. You’ll probably share a mutual respect and admiration for each other, since you both tend to honor one another’s strengths. The bonus? He’ll love that you’re not afraid of him.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: He may not try to hold you down, but he still wants to be in control. Things could be combustible if you don’t listen to his advice, or you both forget you’re on the same team. Despite his strong façade, this man needs emotional support. Make sure you’re not too busy with yourself to nurture and tend to him. Both of you may think your way is the best, but you’ll be better off sharing ideas collaboratively than going off in different directions.
sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon invented romance. He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. You’ll love his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection. He’ll want to parade you around and show you off to all his friends. No doubt, your posse will be in awe at the magnetism of your coupledom. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can persuade you to do just about anything!
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You and he will probably be hot and heavy in bed. He’s a generous and emotional lover but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your intense sexual style will likely suit him well. Since he’s a very goal-oriented guy, he’ll take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means he’ll probably endure between the sheets. Just be careful – this man can have a wandering eye since he’s usually entertaining fantasies in his head.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: There’s a reason you’re attracted to the slippery Snake – he’s seductive, charming, and interesting. In the beginning, you’ll probably see him as an easy catch since he showers you with compliments and hangs on your every word. He’ll be attracted to your dynamism, and you’ll love his big brain and alluring personality. You might even enjoy it when he acts a bit jealous or over-protective. In any case, your Snake guy will catch your attention like no other.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yin meets Yang in this pair. Your Yang personality probably makes you outgoing, eager to achieve, and popular. His Yin energy means he’s more subtle in his approach to life. He’s probably easy-going and free-flowing – at least on the outside. He’s happy to let you come in first, especially since he’ll be busy observing things from the sidelines.
sign_match.TheGood: You might be incredibly attracted to this man’s elusive charm. He’s got that secret something that keeps your Tiger senses alert. You can’t quite figure him out, and love the challenge. He’ll probably be consumed by the sheer force of your personality and will love your warm spirit. You’ll tend to make a good team if both can appreciate each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: As a Tiger, you typically love being Queen of the jungle. But, this urge to dominate might not go over well with your Snake. He may not outwardly retaliate, but you can be sure he’ll get revenge if you hurt him. This man needs a deep and satisfying  connection to his partner – one that you might not be up for giving right away. He could bruise your ego when he acts aloof and uncaring to cover up his insecurities. Make sure you let him shine and reassure him of your love. If not, you might have to deal with a slippery Snake backlash.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with him. He invented the meaning of charm, which you’ll eat up as a Tiger. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. While you may want to pounce, he wants to connect. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially when it comes to romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Just let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that revs up your Tiger purr. It’s likely there will be a strong and fast attraction between you two. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Maybe not. Your bedroom style is different than his. He’s slow and sensuous, while you tend to be frisky and feverish. If you can meet somewhere in the middle, there’s a shot at sexual bliss. Take turns varying your love-making speeds. Slow down for him if he promises to get quick and dirty for you.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: A volcanic attraction will probably erupt between you and your Horse man! This is indeed a favorable match up. You’re both ferociously free-thinking, inordinately independent, and amazingly adventurous.  Your guy may be a bit more serious than you, but he’ll help you stay grounded. As sunny and optimistic creatures, you could have an active social life together while sharing similar goals. He won’t dare encroach on your freedom – since he needs just as much room to roam -- and you’ll love him to pieces for it.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and your Horse guy are both Yang energy types. Neither of you want to sit back and watch the action happen – you want to be in the center of it! You’re both probably driven to  exciting careers and seek a life of adventure. This man will want to take the reigns, but you’ll be right there next to him waiting for your turn to drive. Since you’re both go-getters, expect an action-packed relationship with journeys on roads less traveled!
sign_match.TheGood: No one understands your need for freedom as much as this guy. You don’t have to worry about being smothered. He probably won’t ask you to check in or demand all your time. Since he’s just as independent as you, the space in this relationship could give it plenty of room to grow. You admire each other, know each other’s boundaries, and have a lot in common. In general, one of you will always be able to be strong for the other. How wonderful!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Tiger, you might be a bit impulsive. If so, this guy may try to curb your appetite, but you won’t like it. He’s probably just a tad more conservative than you. Try to respect his more serious nature, and he’ll be able to laugh off your spontaneous antics. Since it’s probable you’ll both lead independent lives, make sure you factor in each other. It can be easy for your and your Horse to not cross paths ‘cause you’re busy flying solo. That’s may be OK as long as it doesn’t become a habit.
sign_match.Romance: Passion meets passion here! He’s the one guy that matches your boundless enthusiasm and hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. This man loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. He probably loves sports, so get ready to accompany him and look cute in the bleachers.
sign_match.Sex: Once you’ve been in bed with him, you know the name of the game: action. You and he both might get bored easily, so you’ll have to keep sex interesting here. Don’t worry. That should be an easy task for you two. Deep down, he tends to want emotional acceptance and romance. Don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive one minute and sentimental the next. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man typically hates routine, in and out of the bedroom.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As a Tiger, you tend to love undivided attention. Well, you’re in luck with a Sheep guy around. He’ll be drawn in by your charm and you’ll probably find him interesting. Together you can explore new things and dabble in unusual activities. In general, he is sensitive, creative, and somewhat of an artist type. He’ll probably appreciate your protective influence and admire your practical ambition. Since you both tend to be a tad unusual, this relationship might not look very conventional.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yin to your Yang. What does that mean for your relationship? Let’s just say you two are different. You can be fast, aggressive, and intellectual, while he may be slow, passive and more intuitive. You tend to take the bull by the horns, and he probably wants to take the safe route. He may be a little more thoughtful and deliberate in his approach to life. You, on the other hand, tend to go with your gut and pounce on things quickly.
sign_match.TheGood: Get ready to learn something new. It’s likely you both love to explore and experience different things. He’ll be happy to serve you, and you could feel good about being the stronger, more solid person in this relationship. You’re both probably individualistic and tend to be a bit on the quirky side. He’ll bring a lot of creativity and spirituality to the relationship. You’ll bring the energy, passion, and fire so characteristic of a Tiger gal.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things might get challenging since he tends to be cautious and a dreamer while you can be a bit impulsive. You both might have to work on remembering the practical things. And who was supposed to pick up the kids from school? He was busy puttering around in the garden and you got distracted trying to beat a colleague at an important task. What else? You might find this man a bit too passive for your liking. In turn, he may think you’re kind of scary.
sign_match.Romance: You might be instantly attracted to him, and he to you. Typically, he’s sensitive, refined, and dreamy. He’ll take you on dates to art museums and outdoor cathedrals. You’ll talk about religion, science, and the meaning of life. The Sheep man will flatter you with plenty of attention and probably surprise you with strange gifts. Remember that rare flower you saw at the botanical garden? He’ll pick some, head to his laboratory, turn the essence into a perfume himself, and mail it to you with a love poem. How perfect.
sign_match.Sex: You’ll probably hit it off in the bedroom before anything else. In fact, sex might come first, relationship later. If you get that far, that is. He’s naturally eccentric, which makes him a little kinky. He’ll want to have you on the kitchen counter or underneath the back deck, just to know what it feels like. As a Tiger, you’ll probably love his imagination and the fact that he’s warm and sensual. He’s generous, too. If you give as much as he does, the sex will be off the charts!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Monkey man are opposites on the Chinese Zodiac. That means you’ll probably find a quick mutual attraction. Both of you tend to be fun-loving, light-hearted, and enjoy trying new things. The Monkey is a thinker and problem-solver, which could help you stay grounded. Typically, you both love attention and praise, so it’s likely you’ll have a big group of admirers. All in all, you’ll probably have fun with this guy – if you can keep up with his antics and busy social life!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang energies, which means you approach life similarly. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you both want to take charge. He’s generally bold, outgoing, confident, and curious – like you. There will be plenty of opportunity for adventure in this relationship, since you both tend to bore easily. You two need new people, places, and experiences to keep things interesting.
sign_match.TheGood: To you, independence is probably necessary to your well-being. And this guy will give you plenty of space. Mostly it’s because he’s off doing his own thing and socializing with anyone and everyone. You’ll love that he’s a good planner – always remembering details – and he’ll admire how feisty and brave you are. You’ll probably provide the spunk and spark he needs to stay motivated, and he’ll work hard at keeping you happy. A strong intellectual connection should make things interesting as well.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There is a story in Chinese astrology about how the Monkey loves to pull the Tiger’s tail and then run up a tree to giggle. You might tire of this guy’s quirky antics or jokes. He may not always take you seriously or will be a bit too clingy too. And he might not want to share the spotlight with you since he needs to show off a lot. You both tend to be competitive, and neither is very good at compromise. Try to work on not being a sore loser, and you’ll have a better chance to make this relationship last.
sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the animals in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
sign_match.Sex: You’ll have one fun time in the sack with a Monkey. Though he’s normally led by his big brain, he can be intuitively kinky in bed. He’s got tricks up his sleeve that even a Tiger can’t keep up with, so get ready! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably doesn’t take sex too seriously, so be careful about showing too much emotion too soon. Have fun and enjoy his light-hearted approach to love-making. He probably acts like an explorer in the bedroom. So don’t be surprised if he checks out every part of your body. Since he’s ruled by his mind, give him a sexual memory to think about and he’ll take you with him all day long.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As a Tiger, you know who you are and what you want. Well, the Rooster man is cut from the same tree. You can both be incredibly opinionated, somewhat aggressive, and very energetic. He’s got a lot to say and will always see room for improvement in the relationship. You’ll probably love that he makes for a worthy opponent and can keep up with you. Since you both tend to be blunt, you can be sure there won’t be any hidden agendas here. The Rooster tells it like it is, and you don’t sugar coat things either.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is the Yin to your Yang. What does that mean for your relationship? Let’s just say that you two are different. You’re probably fast, aggressive, and direct, while he’s slower, methodical and more intuitive. You tend to take the bull by the horns, and he probably wants to walk calmly next to it. Get it? The Rooster is a little more thoughtful and deliberate in his approach to life. You, on the other hand, tend to go with your gut and pounce on things quickly.
sign_match.TheGood: You might be drawn to this man’s sharp wit, impressive intellect, and eye for details. He knows who he is and isn’t afraid to be himself. You admire people who are forthright and honest, and no one is more so than the Rooster. He probably likes those same qualities in you. Deep down, he admires your free spirit and wishes he could be more spontaneous. But, he’s content to live vicariously through you. You’re both noble souls with a strong set of morals and values.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: No one hates being told what to do more than you, right? Well, this guy can’t help himself – he offers unsolicited advice. Constantly. He’ll nag you about how dangerous it is to go running by yourself at night. You’ll put on your sneakers just to prove him wrong. Since you don’t want to follow anyone’s rules, this could annoy him, since he tends to think he knows best. In general, he’s used to being respected for his point of view, and you’re used to doing things your own way. What a combo!
sign_match.Romance: The Rooster guy can be imaginative, energetic, and a bit sadistic. He’s that guy who loves to play games in order to keep the control in a relationship. Since no one can tie you down, you might get fed up with his mind tricks. He, on the other hand, will see you as the perfect conquest. He loves the drama . With him, the key is to look good, smell good, and be good. He places a lot of importance of appearances, so make sure you look the part if you want him to woo you.
sign_match.Sex: Oh, where to begin. He is a bit strange when it comes to sex. Definitely not as emotionally available and loving as you – at least on the surface. He’s probably got one or two weird fetishes that could even border on psychotic. If he’s a typical Rooster, he probably has some sort of strange fascination with inflicting pain during the act and making sure he’s in control. This won’t bode well for you. No one pins down a Tiger. If he annoys you in life, and the sex isn’t even good, you might have to cut ties.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Good stuff! A Dog man is music to your Tiger ears. Most of the time, he’s noble, protective, and kind. He doesn’t limit your freedom but still makes you feel secure. Perfect. He’ll benefit from your positive energy, since he can sometimes be a bit moody. You, in turn, will probably feel like you have the best of both worlds – the ability to be yourself and live your own life, and a loving companion who’s happy to see you when you’re done running around. A close emotional bond can develop between you and this guy.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang energies, meaning you approach life similarly. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you both tend to take charge. Most likely, he’s outgoing, confident, and a go-getter – like you. There should be plenty of opportunity for prosperity in this relationship, since both of you are interested in advancing yourselves through personal effort. Also, you might both want to take the wheel and steer. Just remember to take turns!
sign_match.TheGood: You and your Dog guy are typically loving and protective of those you care for, especially each other. You’ll probably feel like he understands your needs and gives you the freedom you want. He doesn’t trust people easily, but he could find it easy to confide in you and reveal his true self. You both follow your own hearts and need plenty of space. He’s somewhat of a radical thinker, which will probably inspire you as well. All in all, you two have plenty to celebrate in this relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The trouble spot in your match up with the Dog might result from your impulsiveness. Sometimes you can be flaky ‘cause you’re so consumed with a project or activity. He might be prone to worry about you while you’re off at skydiving class or roller derby practice. But that’s just his way. Don’t be insulted if he’s protective or anxious about your welfare. It’s just an expression of his love. It wouldn’t hurt to listen when he gives you his common sense advice, too.
sign_match.Romance: This guy can take a while to warm up to you. He can be a little pessimistic and picky, but underneath is a loving and loyal companion. Don’t expect huge romantic gestures, but do expect plenty of affection. You’ll love how eager he is to please. He’ll cook you dinner at home, give you a foot rub, and then draw you a bubble bath after a long day at work. Since you often come home worn out from your adventures, he is probably everything your Tiger heart could ask for.
sign_match.Sex: You tend to love taking the lead, and this guy will let you! He’s got no hidden neuroses about wanting to dominate. In fact, he prefers if you’re the one on top. He may not be the most imaginative lover, but he’s tender, sweet, and very in tune with your needs. He’ll make love to you and then bring you breakfast in bed. He’ll let you be your wild Tiger self with no exceptions. The emotional connection you share with this guy should translate into powerful, meaningful sex.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Pig man embody the opposites attract phenomenon. There’s potential here for a lasting relationship if you both can learn to be flexible. He is probably happy to stay at home and hold down the fort. This is great for you; since you might love running off on a whim and often don’t know when you’ll be back. You’ll admire Mr. Pig’s pure spirit, and he’ll love your spitfire personality. If you’re able to give him enough attention and foster a good connection, he’ll be likely to stick around.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yin, while you’re Yang. He tends to be more interested in observing, listening, and internalizing. You’re probably inspired by action, challenge, and doing. You both approach life differently but can complement each other because of it. He’ll stay at home on a Saturday night while you’re off gallivanting with friends. In relationships, there should be both Yin and Yang energies to help balance things out, so this match might work.
sign_match.TheGood: Even though you two are incredibly different, this may be the reason you get along so well. Where you’re weak, he’s strong. Where he’s weak, you’re strong. Perfect. Since you’re generally optimistic, you’ll appreciate his upbeat personality and good-natured humor. He admires your zest for life and isn’t threatened by a powerful woman. If you have kids, he’ll probably be a stay at home dad while you’re bringing home the bacon. Oops. I mean, bringing home the paycheck.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This Pig guy might not offer you excitement and adventure the way a Dragon or Horse man would. You tend to be changeable in nature, while he pretty much needs a routine. He enjoys a peaceful, happy home and company to share it with. You’re content living out of a suitcase and taking off whenever the spirit moves you. Problems could pop up if you don’t nurture and maintain a strong connection with him. And, he could find it unsettling if you’re always off doing your own thing.
sign_match.Romance: While your guy is probably no Don Juan, he’s likely to be in tune with the female species. He’ll probably court you slowly and carefully, which might baffle a quick-to-act Tiger like yourself. After time, you’ll probably notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Ah… a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rat might have to work through differences to be a happy pair. The good news is both of you are capable of great love and devotion. The loyalty and idealization you give to your partner will make your Rat man happy. He, in turn, will provide you with the love and protection you so crave in a relationship. You both have a strong need for a happy and safe home life, full of friends and family to share it with. You might find reassurance and comfort in him if you can keep up with his pace.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Rabbit, you’re Yin while your partner is Yang, this means you two approach life differently. You love the creature comforts of home and domestic life, while he’s out conquering the world. You tend to be more passive, receptive, and intuitive. He’s active, bold, forthright, and thrives on a challenge. A relationship needs both Yin and Yang energies for balance, so it’s possible you’ll complement each other with your differences.
sign_match.TheGood: When you think of a relationship with your Rat, you can picture a cheerfully decorated house with a fire crackling in the living room. You both love a happy nest, and you’ll create one easily. Another plus? Together, you can share your deepest secrets. He’ll probably sweep you off your feet with his charm and admire your diplomatic, eager-to-please nature. This man will be happy to buy you beautiful art or expensive furniture for the home and will tend to be a good provider.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenge here may be about the green stuff! As a Rabbit, you tend to love luxury. He appreciates the finer things too, but he’s careful with his money. He probably won’t budge if he’s worked hard to accumulate a fortune. You’ll have to learn to compromise a bit if you want to maintain a happy, harmonious relationship. Also, you might find you disagree about silly things. Both of you can struggle with letting the little stuff go. If it’s not a big deal; give up the need to be right.
sign_match.Romance: Nothing is certain when you’re dating this guy! He likes variety, so no date will ever be the same. What he lacks in romantic common sense, (Helloooo? Why didn’t you buy me flowers on our anniversary?) he makes up for in affection, especially physical touch. He’s probably an entertaining conversationalist and will keep you on your toes with his wit. One thing is common for Rat men – they love the chase. So don’t let him catch you right away.
sign_match.Sex: Since you tend to be more passive in bed, you’ll get along quite nicely with him. He probably loves to dominate -- and win! He’s got tons of energy and likes to please but can sometimes focus too much on himself. Make sure you keep things interesting, as he hates getting bored. Even if you’ve been with him a while, mix it up now and then. It will keep him guessing. And he loves the game. Also, make sure you ask for what you need. Challenge him to give you total satisfaction. It’s not likely he’ll fail!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Things should be pretty cozy when you’re cuddled up next to the strong Ox. Since you probably love having someone to rely on, he could be your ticket to happiness. He’s reliable, stable, and sound. A Rabbit couldn’t ask for more! He’ll probably be the leader in this relationship, but that’s fine with you. You’d rather give him the reigns anyway. Feel free to act as the warming agent to cool this guy’s stone-cold exterior. Deep down, he knows he needs your love and generosity.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and your Ox partner are both Yin energies. What does that mean? You’re more passive, quiet, receptive, and subdued than someone with Yang energy. Preferring to sit on the sidelines instead of playing the game, you and he approach life in a similar way. You’d probably rather stay at home than surround yourself with tons of people or excitement. Since you both share a Yin makeup, you could find it easy to relate to each other.
sign_match.TheGood: You two can really blossom as individuals under the close and careful attention you give to each other. With a wonderful, quiet connection, your strengths can truly shine. Even if he pretends to scoff at affection, he’ll appreciate your loving nature. He, in return, will provide you with the security you long for in a mate. You’ll probably be happy to throw parties at home, which will help him come out of his shell in a more comfortable environment.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Because you’re both more inclined to spend time at home, things could get dull in the long run. However, you prefer honest communication and genuine connection over fleeting passion anyway. You might feel slighted when your Ox man isn’t in a good mood and shrugs off your love like it’s an annoyance. He may accuse you of being too sentimental, but it’s just because he leads with his head most of the time. Your challenge will be to keep loving him, even on his bad days.
sign_match.Romance: This guy might not remind you of Casanova. He probably won’t buy you an expensive dress or handbag unless you need it for a funeral or a job interview. He’s careful in his approach to love and wants to be sure of the outcome. As a Rabbit, you’ll love how attentive he is to your comfort and security. He’ll buy you a winter coat when December arrives. Fix the broken dishwasher in your apartment. Weed your garden. This man will express his love to you in ways that support your well-being.
sign_match.Sex: Others might find the Ox a snooze, but you’ll probably love his no-nonsense approach in bed. The emotional connection you share should translate well into good sex. He’ll probably be goal-oriented and want to please you. But, he might have a hole in his heart that needs filling as well. Here’s where your sensual touch is the key. The bedroom is the only place this stoic, steely creature can let go. You might be surprised at the level of passion that’s there when you open the floodgates.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger man are certainly different creatures! As a Rabbit, you love the peace and comfort of a quiet home. In contrast, your Tiger is content to fly by the seat of his pants and live among ruckus and ruin. You’ll probably be drawn to this sign because everyone is: he’s sexy, magnetic, powerful, and charming. What else do you need?! However, his brash nature is a definite contrast to your more subdued personality.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: While you’re Yin, he’s Yang. How does that fare for your relationship? He’s the courageous, go-getter, while you’re behind the scenes coming up with a plan.  You probably won’t want to accompany him on his spur-of-the-moment travels or wild adventures – you’re too busy holding down the fort. Give it a chance though. This guy has qualities you could stand to borrow, and vice versa.
sign_match.TheGood: This man is lucky if he snags you! But, have you been caught? You’re probably sweet, compassionate, refined, and classy. You’ll give and give until you can’t give anymore, and he looooves the attention. You both are generous and compassionate, which means communication should be good. You can be confident your Tiger will protect and guard you from danger. For him, he can be sure you’ll always put his needs first. Lucky guy.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might find you don’t have much in common after a while. You’re content to stay at home while he paints the town with his posse. Since you can be loving to a fault, be careful about letting him take advantage of your kindness. Also, flying by the seat of your pants is really not your style, so don’t be surprised if you want more stability and security in the relationship than he does. You’ll probably need to know where you stand, so your Tiger will have to give you plenty of reassurance. Not his favorite thing to do, since he loves the focus on him!
sign_match.Romance: Look out! The roar of the Tiger might knock you over from sheer force. There won’t be any question how he feels about you. Tigers are demonstrative, affectionate, and loving. He’ll be bold up front. He might even declare his love to you on your first date. With Tigers, they act first and think later. As a quieter personality, you might love his take-charge attitude. Just be careful about getting swept away. He’s quick to become infatuated, but he’s just as quick to get bored.
sign_match.Sex: His sexual style might be quite the contrast to yours. He’s very forward, quick, and passionate. You probably tend to be slower to warm up and enjoy long foreplay. He won’t. He’ll want to get to act – and fast! This is where you might run into conflict. If you two can learn to compromise, things could actually be most satisfying in the bedroom. Give him a quickie over lunch, as long as he promises a sensual evening of love-making when you get home from the office. Team work!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: General Match What a cozy pair! You and another Rabbit conjure up images of a crackling fire, furry blankets, and a good bottle of wine. Both of you love having fun at home and delighting in domestic comforts. With a tendency toward perfectionism, you might build yourself a beautiful relationship. You’ll probably live lavishly with all the finest things. Also, since you both prefer order to chaos, communication should be free-flowing and honest. Pampering and luxury will probably be the focus here!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Rabbit, you’re a Yin energy person. You and another of your kind will approach life the same way. You’re probably not the hard-hitting, aggressive types, are you? Nah, you prefer to go with the flow and just let life happen naturally. Things in your relationship might go more smoothly since you both are probably calm, intuitive, and receptive to change. All in all, you tend to prefer silence and a good book to a wild night out on the town.
sign_match.TheGood: When you pull two Rabbits out of a hat, they get along quite nicely! He’ll adore you for the same reasons you adore him: class, refinement, and good taste. You’ll probably go on luxurious vacations to 5-star resorts, decorate your home with expensive furniture, and eat only the finest foods. Neither of you tends to have a hair out of place. You’ll both appreciate a beautiful, functional home and stable relationship. Have fun with this guy – he’s your own kind! I see lots of little bunnies on the horizon.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Hmm… things could get tricky between you two if the money ever runs out. Also, since you might be quiet and non-confrontational, be careful about stuffing your feelings if you’re upset about something. You two might need to challenge each other to get out of the house more and socialize. Often, you’re probably content to stay in. Be careful about fault-finding too. You both tend to demand perfection, but keep those strict standards out of your relationship.
sign_match.Romance: As a Rabbit, you probably adore romance. You might even live for it! The dinners, the presents, the surprises – nothing makes you happier. As your own kind, your guy understands this completely. He can be picky about the women he dates, since he tends to be a perfectionist. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear. And when he picks you up, he’ll be in a limo with an immaculate bouquet of calla lilies. Sigh.
sign_match.Sex: Don’t be surprised if this guy is a little squeamish in the sack. It’s not you. It’s likely he’s just a tad uncomfortable with himself and his sexuality. He could be so focused on perfecting the act that he forgets all the sensuality that should go along with it! Since you might share some of these traits, remember to relax and have fun in bed. Let your hair be messed up or the dust ruffle get crooked. That a sure sign you’ve been having fun!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The Dragon man may seem like your total opposite, but he can add plenty to your life, and vice versa. With your keen powers of perception, you’ll probably see right through this guy’s tough exterior. In fact, you might understand his heart better than most signs. There’s a possibility for a close, loving connection here. Alright! He’ll be happy to provide you with love and support while you help him soften up a bit. Unlikely? Yes, but you two creatures can be a good pair.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Dragon is the Yang to your Yin. He’s fiery, bold, and quite possibly not afraid of anything. You, on the other hand, probably prefer not to jump into the flames without protective gear. He might be the action-taker and leader in the relationship, but you could provide the receptive and peaceful environment for him to come home to. While opposite energies, you might actually complement each other. You both have qualities that the other can borrow.
sign_match.TheGood: Both of you are creative thinkers. Together, you can probably accomplish amazing goals. You’ll provide behind-the-scenes support while he’s off achieving things. But you work as a team. He can help you stay on top of practical matters – when is the last time you balanced your checkbook? You, in turn, can give the kind of tender affection that only a Rabbit would. His heart will probably melt, and you’ll see that underneath this tough creature is just a big softie.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You could hit a bump in the road the first time he goes on personal pilgrimage to do something you think ridiculous. Betting his paycheck on a poker tournament? Hitting the beach to surf 30-foot waves? He generally will laugh in the face of danger. And, this could irritate you. Conversely, another night on the couch reading home improvement magazines might send him over the edge. The point? You’ll probably have to work on finding mutual interests.
sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon man invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might make your stomach turn. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this guy. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything! Your adaptable personality wlll come in handy on all your adventures.
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You two have different sexual styles that might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your quieter style could suit him well. Another thing? He loves to dominate! Since he’s generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means he can endure between the sheets -- if you know what I mean.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Snake man have different ways of approaching the world. But, you might still find a close companion in this slippery creature. Socially, you’re probably opposite. He’s probably loaded with charm and not shy about using it , while you tread lightly around strangers and are usually content to just entertain at home with close friends. What could draw you together is a shared intuitive approach to life. All in all, there could be something to explore here as long as you don’t always part ways to serve your own desires.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. Neither of you are likely to want  to be in the spotlight. You probably prefer to stay under the radar and observe things instead of loudly calling it like you see it. Most likely, he’s passive, receptive, tolerant, and giving – like you. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other better.
sign_match.TheGood: Both of your signs operate on intuitive and philosophical levels . You can picture long discussions about the meaning of life, your purpose in the world, and how you can contribute to world peace. The connection here might be more cerebral at first, but you’ll probably develop a close emotional and physical bond – fast. He might be the front person in the relationship, but that’s probably fine with you anyway.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might need to watch out for insecurities in this relationship. Both of you can struggle with self-doubt. Make sure you don’t overanalyze everything and give your partner plenty of strokes. Even though you adore refined and elegant surroundings, you might tire of your Snake’s need for extravagant things. He’s thrifty, but he’ll spend his money on what he wants – even if it seems wasteful to you. But, try not to deprive him. He could get incredibly cranky.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man! He invented the meaning of charm, which you’ll probably eat up as Rabbit. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and you could be a perfect fit. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that makes your toes curl. It’s likely there will be a strong attraction between you two. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Yes, yes, and yes! Your bedroom style is possibly a bit different than your Snake man’s, but your connection will probably be out of this world. He’s slow and sensuous. You’re romantic and tender. Ah, sexual bliss. You generally won’t have to work too hard to be satisfied in the sack with this guy. Just be careful with your Snake – he could eat you alive!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and a Horse man may have to put work into maintaining a satisfying match. Very different by nature, you two seem to diverge all over the place. He’s probably outspoken, aggressive and independent, while you might be laid-back, reserved, and cautious. This guy is fun to have around, since he’s smart and self-assured, but he doesn’t always stick around. You probably prefer consistency. Making adjustments will likely be the name of the game with this relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Horse is a Yang sign, which means your guy’s completely opposite from you as a Yin energy person. Some of the qualities associated with Yang are fast, aggressive, hot, and dominant. Sound like you? I didn’t think so. You’re probably not the aggressor type. Yin energy people are usually go-with-the-flow personalities who take things in stride. They don’t often pursue, but they get what they want by patiently waiting for it.
sign_match.TheGood: The good news? Your powers of compassion make you attractive to almost every sign. You probably have an innate ability to understand others’ deepest insecurities and inner conflicts. A Horse will appreciate your tenderness. He also might help draw you out a bit. When you’re sitting at home on a Saturday night, he’ll be the one who motivates you to get off the couch. You might benefit from running around in his influential circle and meeting new people.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Ouch. That’s what you’ll probably say when this guy up and leaves because he suddenly got bored. Or, maybe he stepped on your delicate paws with his heavy hooves. Though he’s probably loving and warm-hearted, this man can get restless easily. Since you’re someone who generally thrives on constant communication, it might be hurtful if he takes off on a two-week vacation without you. You could have to work on consistency with him in order to stay close.
sign_match.Romance: Passion meets tenderness when you’re dating a Horse man. He’s got boundless enthusiasm and a hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. Your guy probably loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. As a Rabbit, are you up for it? Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. You might have different ideas about what constitutes a fun time, but an open mind and spontaneous nature will be the key to romantic bliss with him.
sign_match.Sex: If you’ve made it to the bedroom with your Horse, you know the name of the game: action. And, he can get bored easily, so you’ll have to keep sex interesting here. Do you have a desire for sensual, emotional love-making? You might have to pull it out of him like yanking a molar. Deep down, this man probably wants emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive one minute, and sentimental the next. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull or you can’t keep pace with him – this man tends to hate routine and down time.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Breathe easily. This match could be a breeze! You and your Sheep can make a great, long-lasting connection. You probably have many similarities, and even your differences are likely to be complementary. Both of you are dreamy, artistic souls who rely more on emotion and intuition than on logic to navigate your way in life. The two of you also need plenty of support from loved ones -- you can make one another feel adored and appreciated. Fantastic!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and the Sheep are both Yin signs -- passive, compassionate, but maybe easily taken advantage of. Yin energy people tend to deal with change easily and go with the flow. Since you’re both Yin, it might be easier to understand each other. But, you could need to work on creating structure and stability in your relationship. The good qualities of Yin allow you both to be creative, receptive, tolerant, and peaceful. You may not be born leaders, but you adapt easily and can create harmony out of conflict without getting aggressive.
sign_match.TheGood: Don’t be surprised if this man can read your mind – he’s totally on your wavelength. You two will probably have plenty to rejoice over: common interests, similar dispositions, and maybe even the same set of morals and values. He’ll love the sense of security you give him. You’ll love how amusing and interesting he is. The fact that you’re generally organized and structured will be good for him since he can have his head in the clouds sometimes. All in all, this can be a great match.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This man’s behavior might startle or shock you now and then. He’s not one for following rules or behaving according to societal norms. He might wear white after Labor Day or say something frank to your new boss. His intentions are good, but you might wish he had a bit more class. Things could get tricky if you try to bog him down with a routine. Your best bet is to let him be his quirky self. Try to give up the idea of perfection, and you might find your own variety of it.
sign_match.Romance: You might be instantly attracted to your Sheep man and he to you. He’s likely to be brainy, philosophical, and dreamy. He’ll take you on dates to art museums and outdoor cathedrals. You’ll talk about religion, science, and the meaning of life. Your Sheep man will flatter you with plenty of attention and probably surprise you with strange gifts. Remember that rare flower you saw at the botanical garden? He’ll pick some, head to his laboratory, turn the essence into a perfume himself, and mail it to you with a love poem. How perfect.
sign_match.Sex: You and this man will probably hit it off in the bedroom, but only after you’ve become great friends. He’s naturally eccentric, which makes him super kinky. He’ll want to have you on the kitchen counter or underneath the back deck, just to know what it feels like. As a Rabbit, you might get a little squeamish with his oddball sexual antics. But, you could have incredible sexual chemistry with this man – it should be worth some awkward moments!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Monkey are opposite in nature, so this relationship might take work. Your powers of compassion will probably be called upon to help smooth over differences. This man loves fun and games but doesn’t always know when to take things seriously. You’re both mental creatures, which means you could share a good cerebral connection. Although, the Monkey’s need for change is vastly different than your desire for consistency.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s Yang, you’re Yin. You two probably approach life in different ways. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, he takes charge. He’s bold, outgoing, confident, and curious. You tend to take life at a slower pace and roll with the changes it delivers. This man might need plenty of new people, places, and experiences to keep things interesting. In contrast, you’re probably happy with routine.
sign_match.TheGood: To you, order and peace are necessary to your well-being. To his credit, he will probably buy you an expensive day planner and luxury linens to make you happy. You’ll love that he’s a good planner – always remembering details – and he’ll admire how together and classy you are. In turn, you’ll probably provide the emotional support he needs to stay motivated, and he’ll work hard at keeping you satisfied. A strong intellectual connection should make things interesting as well.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might tire of this guy’s quirky antics or jokes. He may not always take you seriously. Also, he could  need more cheering up than you’re able to provide. Since he’s usually thirsty for new adventures, it could be tiresome to spend your weekends alone. He probably won’t understand why you’d rather throw a dinner party than go to a nightclub with friends. If you can focus on the strengths of your relationship, you’ll have a better shot.
sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the animals in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
sign_match.Sex: You’ll have one fun time in the sack with your Monkey. Though he’s normally led by his big brain, he can be cute and kinky in bed. He’s got tricks up his sleeve, so get ready! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably doesn’t take sex too seriously, so be careful about showing too much emotion too soon. You might want a more sensual experience than this man. But, have fun and enjoy his light-hearted approach to love-making. Since he’s ruled by his mind, give him a sexual memory to think about and he’ll take you with him wherever he goes.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster may have to work hard to understand each other. With opposite natures your differences might be glaring! As a Rabbit, you tend to approach life subjectively and can struggle with the practical. But, he couldn’t be more different. His sign sees the world in exacting terms – details are the name of the game. While you’re dreaming of a European vacation, he’s crunching numbers to find the cheapest plane tickets. Best bet? Get to know this guy before you jump into anything.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You two are both Yin signs, which means you share similar dispositions but also might clash because of it. Yin people are thought to be more passive, tolerant, easy-going, observant, and mellow. He’s probably watching life go by carefully, rather than jumping in the middle of it. Neither of you tend to get super aggressive or dominate. It’s just not your style. However, make sure you have a bit of Yang in this match to keep things active and stimulating.
sign_match.TheGood: You’ll probably be attracted to the Rooster’s air of nobility and class. He’s got the look, as well as the goods to back it up. This guy will usually fall for a pretty face, and you probably have one! Both of you adhere to the idea that things can always be improved upon. So, your relationship might benefit from his keen eye for perfection and knack for order  Together, you two can run a tight ship!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: As a Rabbit, you probably adore making money. But what’s better than making money? Spending it! This guy, however, probably won’t tolerate careless shopping sprees. He might think you’re frivolous, but you might think he’s too rigid. Since he knows how to nag, you stand to get exhausted trying to please him. Also, your sensitive nature could get bruised by your Rooster’s constant criticism. He might have to work on his softer side in order to keep you happy.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster guy is imaginative, energetic, and a bit sadistic. He’s that guy who loves to play games in order to keep the control in a relationship. Since you tend to be honest and compassionate, you might get fed up with his mind tricks. He, on the other hand, will see you as the perfect conquest. He loves adventure and hates routine. With him, the key is to look good, smell good, and be good. Easy task for you! He places a lot of importance of appearances, so make sure you look the part if you want him to woo you.
sign_match.Sex: Oh, where to begin. He is a bit strange when it comes to sex. He’s not as emotionally available and loving as you – at least on the surface. He’s probably got one or two weird fetishes that could even border on psychotic. If he’s a typical Rooster, he probably has some sort of strange fascination with inflicting pain during the act and making sure he’s in control. This might bode well for you, since you probably like being more passive in bed. Just don’t let him call all the shots.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dog guy can forge a fine, strong bond. Mutual trust? Appreciation? Yes and yes. This man sometimes has trouble trusting people, but he’ll have no reason for suspicion with you. Both of you are generally trustworthy and loyal, protecting your relationship and your loved ones. A passionate, intimate connection is pretty likely. You’ll be able to rely on this guy for all the love and support you need. How nice.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yang, you are Yin. You might approach life in different ways, but it could work for you. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, he probably takes charge. He’s more assertive, outgoing, and curious than you. You tend to take life at a slower pace and roll with the changes it delivers. This man needs to know he’s in control of his destiny. In contrast, you’re probably happy trusting the universe to show you the path.
sign_match.TheGood: With your Dog, you may have found your rock of Gibraltar. Even though he can be prone to worries and self-doubts, he’ll probably remain strong for you. That’s good, since you tend to need  support from your partner. Your loving affection can melt away his anxieties and boost his self-esteem. Lucky him! Together, you can enjoy a cozy and comfortable home. In fact, you may never want to leave it!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Be careful about feeding off each other’s moods in this relationship. Sometimes you can be a little high strung, and he might have a tendency for irritability or grouchiness. Your Dog man can find it hard to trust people, so make sure you don’t give him a reason to question your loyalty. He’ll have to work on listening to your poetic ideas and not writing them off as impractical. In return, let him have his bouts with the blues. He’ll return to normal with a little TLC.
sign_match.Romance: This guy can take a while to warm up to you. He might be a little pessimistic and picky, but underneath is a loving and loyal companion. Don’t expect huge romantic gestures, but do expect plenty of affection. You’ll love how eager he is to please. He’ll cook you dinner at home, give you a foot rub, and then draw you a bubble bath after a long day at work. Since you often come home worn out from the stress of the world, he might be everything your Rabbit heart could ask for.
sign_match.Sex: He’s got no hidden neuroses about wanting to dominate in bed. In fact, he prefers if you’re the one on top. Are you up for it?! He may not be the most imaginative lover, but he’s tender, sweet, and very in tune with your needs. He’ll make love to you and then bring you breakfast in bed. He’ll let you be your silly Rabbit self with no exceptions. The emotional connection you share with this guy should translate into powerful, meaningful sex.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Oh, goody! You and the Pig are like two peas in a pod. This man gets a lot of pleasure from helping his loved ones, and you’re no exception. Since you probably need an emotionally strong companion, you’ll delight in his protection and guidance. You should make each other feel well-loved and cared for. Since you’re both forgiving, honorable, and sensual, there could be a bond forged here that lasts a long time. He’ll work hard at making you happy, and you’ll give plenty of love in return.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You two are both Yin signs, which means you probably share similar dispositions and approach life with the same morals and values. Yin people are thought to be more passive, tolerant, easy-going, observant, and mellow. He’s probably watching life go by rather than jumping in the middle of it – like you. Neither of you tend to be aggressive or dominant. Instead you both want peace and harmony in your relationships.
sign_match.TheGood: Where to start? The Pig seems to complement you in all the right ways. He gives you the love and protection you crave. He helps you become a little less rigid. He understands your flaws and loves you anyway. What more could you ask for? In return, you help keep an orderly and grounded home life. Maybe you cook him fantastic dinners or treat him with good wine. You two will probably buy a little country cabin in the woods and live happily ever after.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A challenge in this relationship – one of few – could be money. With your love of the finer things and his habit for indulgence, you might run out of dough before you know it. Keep a lid on your savings and make sure to track a good budget. You might find some of his grandiose ideas a bit zany. Your best bet is just to smile, listen, and fix him something delicious to eat. If that’s all the trouble you’ll have, I’d say you’re a lucky Rabbit!
sign_match.Romance: While he is no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, which you’ll probably adore. After time you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and underlying passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Ah… a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat man should enjoy near perfect compatibility. Hooray! In Chinese Astrology, this is one of the best match ups – your rapport is famous! Not many can hold their own around you, but this guy can. He’ll play off your intense energy and offer up some of his own. Even your differences should keep things exciting. Both of your are go-getters, which can make for plenty of wild and crazy adventures. Enjoy the ride!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yang signs, it’s likely you’re both action-oriented individuals. Watching from the sidelines? No way! You’re at the center of the action. Yang energy is associated with more masculine, assertive qualities, so you and he probably both want to be in charge. You’re thinkers, doers, and achievers – in life and in love. Since relationships tend to need both Yin and Yang energies, yours might need the balance of more calm, passive energy to work best.
sign_match.TheGood: Queen meets King! You love ruling the kingdom, and now you have a partner in power. This guy generally loves to be in control, but he’ll probably let you be the one in charge most of the time. In his eyes, you’re an admirable woman. You can melt away his hidden insecurities and inspire him. He probably gives you the praise and love you crave. And, since you’re both likely to be leaders, you might use your coupledom to accomplish amazing feats. Whatever you do, it’s likely you’ll be good at it together.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rat man can sometimes be self-promoting to a fault. He’s got his opinions and agendas about, well, just about everything. Similarly, you might need to check your ego once in a while. This battle of the wills could create friction in love. On the other hand, maybe you’ll thrive off the conflict, finding it stimulating and interesting! The good news? Whatever disagreements you have should be resolved quickly.
sign_match.Romance: Ok, admit it. You probably love attention. Good news! The Rat will shower you with it. He’ll probably find you fascinating – most men do. But, you may get frustrated when he doesn’t surprise you with bold romantic gestures. Don’t worry, though. He’ll make up for it in tender caresses and affection. Also, he’s an entertaining conversationalist and will keep you on your toes with his wit. Don’t let him catch you right away, however. One thing is pretty common for all Rat men – they love the chase.
sign_match.Sex: To be frank, you and your Rat both have high libidos. Together, you might blow a fuse. (Maybe use candles instead?). Your electric connection could even be too overwhelming, if that’s possible! Maybe be careful about coming on too strong at first. Even this guy might be blown away by your pure magnetism in the bedroom. He’ll probably be an eager lover, but make him prolong the torture. Also, don’t give in to his needs first. He’ll be much more motivated to please you if he has to wait for his turn.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox could make a connection as long as you respect each other’s differences. As a Dragon you probably have a fiery, somewhat impetuous nature. The Ox? He’s pretty much the opposite – solid, steady, and serious. You’re typically the outgoing, social director, and he tends to get anxiety in a big crowd. While you’re adaptable and open-minded, this man can be a rigid thinker. The name of the game here will probably be compromise.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re a Yang; he’s a Yin sign. Relationships need a bit of both energies to function well, so this might help balance things – or it could highlight your differences. He’s probably not the assertive, outwardly focused person you are. Generally more reserved and quiet, Yin people value harmony and peace. While you might no go around looking for conflict, you’re could be inspired by challenges and chaos.
sign_match.TheGood: Even though he’s different, you probably appreciate his honorable nature and good intentions. Some get squeamish under his judgmental tendencies, but you can generally appreciate the honesty. Since you tend to be a power player with a knack for luck, this guy will honor what you can bring to the table, quite literally. Also, your changeable, outgoing nature might help draw him out. In return, his common sense could rub off nicely on you.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things to work on? Your values might not match up. While you’re generally an idealist with a pioneering spirit, he can be conservative and traditional. Don’t be shocked if he doesn’t support your new business idea until you’ve actually secured funding for it. If you happen to breathe fire over something, he’ll generally do his best to avoid an argument. However, when disagreements do happen, they can be epic! You’re a force to be reckoned with, but he’s probably perfected the art of being stubborn.
sign_match.Romance: Fairy tales and grand gestures? Probably not with this guy. You might have to trade in the glass slippers for a pair of sneakers, get a job, and buy your own castle. Your Ox may not be terribly romantic. However, underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. There’s a passion that runs deep below the surface, but it could take time to tap. Fairy tales are overrated anyway, right?
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he could be a good sexual match. Your sensuality and fire between the sheets might break down his carefully constructed defenses. He’s probably not super slick, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy. Careful not to overwhelm him by acting too dominant or aggressive. He might want to be the one in charge.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You’ll probably fall hard for the Tiger man, and for good reason! He’s powerful, dynamic, and charming. I bet you’re not afraid of this fierce creature. In fact, you probably thrive off his energy. This man won’t balk at your mood swings or discourage you from charging into battle. He’ll be right there beside you! Though you wear masks of bravery, both of you can be deeply emotional. All in all, he definitely has the energy and passion to keep up with you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and the Tiger are two Yang personalities. Translation? Plenty of excitement in this relationship! You’re both goal-oriented, ambitious, and not afraid to go after what you want. It’s likely you’ll both want to rule the kingdom and have the love of your minions. There should be enough fire and raw energy to do just about anything together. The best part? He’ll probably be happy to keep up with your fast pace.
sign_match.TheGood: While other signs might try to keep you on a leash, he’s probably in awe of your free-spirited, pioneering personality. He’s generally good at making you laugh when you’re down, and loves spontaneous thrills even more than you. There will probably be a mutual respect and admiration for each other, since you both honor one another’s strengths. The kicker? He’ll love that you’re not afraid of him! Things with your Tiger will typically be one big whirlwind of energy and excitement. Get ready for action!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Even though he doesn’t try to hold you down, your man does like to be in control. Things could be combustible if you don’t recognize his efforts or remember you’re on the same team. Despite his strong façade, this man might need a lot of praise and attention. Make sure you’re not too busy with yourself to nurture and tend to him. Both of you may think your way is best, but you’ll be better sharing ideas collaboratively than going off in different directions.
sign_match.Romance: A Tiger and Dragon? Twice the fun but twice the danger! You might love his quick decisions and go-for-it attitude in love. He’ll probably find your charisma and passion utterly irresistible. Strange and spontaneous dates could lead you on some unexpected adventures. But, beware of burnout. That instant connection might be replaced by a heated argument if you disagree about something. Also, make sure you wear protective gear. You never know where this man could take you.
sign_match.Sex: Did you even make it to the bedroom? A Tiger and Dragon can get so caught up in the throws of passion they do it no matter where they are. Sex will most likely never be boring with him. He’ll have you whenever and wherever; thank you very much. However, power plays might pop up, since you both love being in charge. Your best bet? Make sure you take turns. He probably likes it rough, too, so keep that protective gear I mentioned close by.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Your Rabbit man may seem like your total opposite, but he can add plenty to your life -- and vice versa. With his keen powers of perception, he’ll probably see right through your tough exterior. In fact, he might understand your heart better than most signs. There’s a possibility for a close, loving connection here. You’ll be happy to provide him with love and support while he can help you soften up a bit. An unlikely match? Yes, but you two creatures could be a good pair.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s the Yin to your Yang. You tend to be fiery, bold, and quite possibly not afraid of anything. He, on the other hand, prefers not to jump into the flames without life insurance. You’ll probably be the action-taker and leader in the relationship, and he’ll provide the receptive and peaceful environment for you to come home to. While having opposite energies, you might actually complement each other. You both have qualities the other can borrow.
sign_match.TheGood: Both of you are creative thinkers. Together, you can construct amazing goals. He’ll probably provide behind-the-scenes support while you’re off achieving them. But, you always work as a team. You might help him stay on top of practical matters – when is the last time he balanced the checkbook? He, in turn, will give the kind of tender affection that only a Rabbit can. The best part? You can trust him with your biggest secret – that underneath those rough scales, you’re a softie. But don’t worry. He won’t tell.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There could be a bump in the road the first time you go on a personal pilgrimage to do something he thinks ridiculous. Betting your paycheck on a poker tournament? Hitting the beach to surf 30-foot waves? Most of the time, you laugh in the face of danger. However, this could irritate him. What’s your beef? Another night on the couch reading home improvement magazines might send you over the edge. The point is you’ll probably have to work on finding mutual interests.
sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life, which is lucky for you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. Also, he’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll probably open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. As long as you don’t get bored, things should be sparkling in the romance department.
sign_match.Sex: In contrast to your impulsive bedroom behavior, your Rabbit is slow moving and careful with his lovers. Can you get on board? To his credit, he’s probably excellent in the foreplay department. But, you may prefer to get down to business. How can you make your different styles work? The best way to please this man is to show off your seductive and romantic side. He’s probably a sucker for nice lingerie, flowery perfume, or pink lipstick.  Another thing? While he might let you dominate, don’t overwhelm him with aggression. He needs to take his time.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two Dragons? Double the intelligence, double the luck, and double the excitement! Since your sign tends to be the luckiest of the Chinese Zodiac, you two could share a fortunate match. The sky’s the limit when you’re paired up with him! So long as you plot your course carefully, you’ll probably enjoy a scintillating, electric relationship that’s the envy of all your friends. This lucky love match should be smoking – as long as you decide early on who gets to be in charge!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities make for tons of action! You’re both quick to jump on new opportunities, love meeting new people, and can’t wait to get your hands on the next thing. It’s likely you’ll both want the power and the spotlight. You and your Dragon man will have enough energy for everyone around you. He wants to conquer new territory, move mountains, and be respected – like you.
sign_match.TheGood: You won’t have to worry about reigning in your flamboyant personality around this guy. As another Dragon, he understands you better than most. Want to go live in Iceland for a year? He’ll come with you. Thinking about starting a business? He’ll help you plan. You two crave adventure and power, which makes you a fierce twosome. When you put your heads together, you stand to have more fun, adventure, and success than ever!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Sure, you probably get along great. But what happens when neither of you will back down? There might be clashes of ego here. Dragons love being in charge, so you’ll either have to take turns or assign a leader. Emotional storms might roll in over who gets the remote or needs to take out the trash. Sound silly? You probably won’t think so in the heat of the moment. Be careful about incinerating your relationship over something minor.
sign_match.Romance: I’m not sure whether you should be scared or excited about dating a Dragon man. Maybe a little of both? Since you’re the same breed, it might be a fantastic, glittering romance. Or, it could turn disastrous. Did you get offended when he wanted to order for you at dinner? Was he infuriated you tried to split the bill? You’ll probably have to be a little less domineering and a little more demure if you want to snag this guy. He wants to be commander in chief. Even though it’s against your nature, try to follow orders every now and then if you want a second date.
sign_match.Sex: Where to begin? This guy will be up for sex at the strangest of moments, in the strangest of places. Normally that would sound as a warning, but it’s probably music to your ears. The back seat of his truck? The laundromat? Your kitchen floor? You’ll do it everywhere. You two should have enough sexual electricity to power a major city. But, then there’s that issue of control again. Who will be on top? Better be clear about that before you get started. Then again, the power struggle will probably be a turn on.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As long as you know each other’s habits and motivations, you and the Snake can hit it off. Both attractive and sexy, you and this guy will surely turn heads. Your bold magnetism combined with his subtle charm? He probably seems like the perfect arm candy! What’s even better, though, is your complementary personalities. He admires your outrageous flamboyance, and you’ll love his quiet strength. The attraction here will probably be quick – and intensely physical!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He’s Yin, you’re Yang. This guy may not accompany you on your exotic excursions at the drop of a hat. He’s more of a thinker and a planner than a dreamer and doer. While you’re slinking around town at a fancy restaurant, he’s probably curled up on the couch, fantasizing about a home cooked meal. Yin people are generally more dreamy, intuitive, and passive. Yang energy makes you quite the opposite – practical, intellectual, and assertive.
sign_match.TheGood: The way you two approach the world might fit like puzzle pieces. He uses a keen intuition and inner radar. You rely on your Dragon luck to jump on new opportunities. With his sixth sense and your good fortune, you’ll make a good team. He’ll probably know exactly when to lend support since he can sense your moods easily. You’ll typically make him feel loved and admired, which snuffs outs a Snake’s insecurities. The best part? He probably won’t be threatened by you, which allows you to reveal your softer side. How sweet.
