sign_match.TheNotSoGood: It’s a tall order asking other signs to keep up with you. Practically no one but the Tiger or the Horse can match your energy level. The Snake guy, unfortunately, can be a bit slow. He may even become a bump on a log when he’s in one of his moods. You could have to hit that dinner party alone or fly solo on Friday night. Intimate, one-on-one exchanges are more his style than a flurry of small talk with strangers. Be careful about your temper, too. An injured Snake will retreat, but also retaliate when you least expect it.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with him. He invented the meaning of charm, which you can’t get enough of. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. While you may want power or adventure in a man, he wants to connect. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. You may wish he was more dominant or aggressive, but you can’t change a Snake. Best bet? Let him do things his way.
sign_match.Sex: The physical connection between you two will probably be strong and fast! This man matches you in the seduction department, so don’t be surprised if he blows your mind in bed. On the surface, he may appear quiet and reserved, but look out! Snakes are incredible lovers, mostly because he can intuitively know what you want, even before you do. He’ll want to intertwine every limb and eat you alive -- in a good way.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Finally. A man who is in love with love as much as you are! Horse men are fast, aggressive, and dominant types. Yours will probably act first and think later, but that’s your style too. Unbridled passion? Blistering infatuation? You got it. He’ll be happy to gallop along side you no matter where you’re going – and it’s likely you have the same destination in mind! Your free-spirit and his conventional attitude might be the perfect blend of creativity and practicality.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yang on top of Yang? Oh boy. You two will take no prisoners. Yang people are typically energetic, ambitious, goal-oriented, and quick to take action. Your Horse guy will relate to your outgoing, impulsive nature -- he’s the same way. Since Yang people tend to move quickly, be careful about burnout. One of you might have to remind the other to slow down! In any case, you’ll approach life the same way – with vigor, bravery, and purpose!
sign_match.TheGood: You and your Horse can have loads of fun together. As an active, stimulating pair, there’s no end to your adventures. Socially and mentally, you’re similar: moving at lightening speed and having a ball. Since neither of you likes to settle down for long, travel could become a way of life. This guy will probably keep you entertained and curious unlike any other sign. He’s your intellectual equal and partner in crime. Sounds fun to me!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If your Horse is nowhere to be found, you might experience the challenge of this relationship – his fickleness. This guy probably can’t sit still for very long. He needs stimulation and change the way others need air. That could be fine, since adventure suits you. However, he could hurt your feelings if he takes off without notice when you need him. Make sure your communication is in tip-top shape so you can deal with conflict in that department.
sign_match.Romance: Love at first sight is probably bound to happen. You won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side. This match should be the envy of other couples – you’re witty, charming, fun, and smart, plus you have a blast together. Have fun!
sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like variety. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. That should be an easy task for you – Dragon’s aren’t usually blamed for being boring. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your magnetism and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom. The thrill of doing it in unusual places will keep him from getting bored.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Sheep guy can be compatible, as long as this guy can accept being with a powerful woman! You might have a fair amount in common, but vastly different temperaments. This could work to your advantage, so long as you strike the balance between intimacy and independence. Can you respect his reserved nature and give him the emotional support he craves? Can he admire your adventurous spirit and give you the respect you desire? If so, you could make it work.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang, he’s Yin. Since your energies are different, this might make things challenging. You tend to be more assertive, outgoing, and action-oriented. He’s probably more of a passive, receptive type. You’re bold and boisterous, while the Sheep is more curious and sensitive. So what do you have in common? It’s likely you both enjoy exploring the unusual, meeting interesting people, and pursuing your passions. If you can find harmony in your different habits, you could make it work.
sign_match.TheGood: He’s probably an artist type and maybe somewhat of a worrier. Luckily, your sunny and strong outlook will keep him upbeat. Though he may not admit it, he can appreciate having a solid presence to lean on. You’ll delight in his knack for creating domestic tranquility. Providing a warm and loving space for you to come home to, this man can be your safety net. Since he might need affectionate strokes to feel secure, he’s bound to appreciate your frank and loving sentiments.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Things could get sticky if you let your temper get the best of you. Be careful about blaming or criticizing him – he wounds easily and won’t soon forget it. You may get frustrated having to tiptoe around his feelings when he’s cranky, but your restraint will be worth it. If you can both respect each other’s differences, you might have a good chance of making it.
sign_match.Romance: Your spiritual Sheep will delight in a loving Dragon like yourself. He’s romantic in a unique way. He may not adhere to traditions like Valentine’s Day – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. Um, isn’t that every woman’s dream lover?! Toss your shield aside, cause he’ll penetrate your heart in spite of defenses. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s mushy-gushy and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Yippee! You and the Monkey make a fun, fiery match. With a whole lot in common – energy, optimism, courage – it’s easy to see why you get along. Perhaps you’ll be regulars at the hippest party spots? Live it up in nightclubs? Travel the world? Anything is possible in this match up! Both of you are fun-loving and easy-going. Since the Monkey is also a risk taker, there should be plenty of surprises. Get ready for one wild time!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You and your Monkey are both Yang. This should get interesting! Since your energies are similar, you might actually complement each other well. As a Yang person, you might be more assertive, high-energy, and goal-oriented – like him. While you probably approach life in similar ways, you can also benefit from some calmer Yin energy too. However, you’ll probably find it easy to understand and respect one another.
sign_match.TheGood: Don’t you love a guy with a sense of adventure?! Your Monkey man is probably more fun than a barrel of…well, you know. Play time should be a central focus with you two. Whether its travel, shared hobbies, or just a similar sense of humor, you probably won’t run out of good times. This guy can keep up with you. Also, you’ll tend to enjoy his quick wit and goofy personality. He’ll be in awe of your Dragon prowess and spunk. As risk takers, you’ll probably leap into one hot romance!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you live with this guy, don’t be surprised if your home resembles a jungle. You might be too busy with your grandiose schemes to take care of the little things. Dishes in the sink? Unmade bed? Dirty laundry everywhere? It could  happen. Your Monkey man does love to pursue his own pleasures, too. He may need a reminder about important things so he doesn’t forget them. On the other hand, you might need to watch your temper. His detached and logical attitude can be biting when you’re looking for support.
sign_match.Romance: Everything is pretty rosy in the romance department! In case you haven’t heard, your Monkey man is known for his generous nature. He loves giving presents, and you probably love getting them! Bold gestures are generally his style. Did he give you a diamond necklace on your first date? Take you on a private jet? This guy typically likes to show off, especially if he’s trying to impress a woman. Some women could find this pompous, but you probably appreciate bold expressions of love. He may not want to get serious quickly, but at least he’ll keep you entertained and pampered!
sign_match.Sex: Picture two tiger cubs rolling around with each other, claws out. That’s you and your Monkey man. He probably sees sex as more of a game than anything else. Plenty of hair pulling, giggling, and wrestling should be part of your romp sessions. He might let you dominate him too, as long as you don’t get too rough. With your special breed of tenderness, this guy could easily open his heart to you between the sheets. All in all, you two should have plenty of kinky sexual sparks as you explore every part of one another’s bodies.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rooster can makes things work – you’ll just have to appreciate one another’s differences. If you’re a typical Dragon, you’re probably fiery, exciting, and maybe a bit impulsive. Your Rooster, however, is generally practical and conservative. In a happy match, you can show this guy a good time, while he can keep you grounded. He probably understands your lust for power, and you can appreciate his noble nature. There may not be fireworks, but this match can be satisfying with some effort.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang personality, you might want the steering wheel in life. Yang energy is associated with vigor, passion, and leadership. He probably doesn’t mind you taking charge since he’s a Yin sign. Since you tend to love power, this match might benefit from his Yin presence -- that soothing, peaceful energy that calms you down! Even though you’re different, you probably won’t have trouble understanding each other’s habits and personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: If you want a highly devoted and loving partner, this guy is your man. Do you have trouble keeping all your balls in the air? He’ll probably provide the kind of organized, functioning home you need to succeed. Also, your tough exterior won’t fool him. He can appreciate your spunk and your softness at the same time – a tough feat for many guys! While he’s typically not a party animal, he can enjoy a night out on the town with you. Afterwards, you’ll be happy to come home to the comfortable nest he created with his keen eye and classy touch.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: With his tendency for strong opinions, your Rooster wants to draw attention to himself. Pair that with your love of the flamboyant and it could create friction when you’re competing for the spotlight. This man can be oh-so-nit-picky. Your unkempt tresses or outrageous outfits might not fly. Since you’re probably not fond of controlling types, you could get irritated – and fast. If you want to make it work, you’ll probably have to compromise. Let him be right to avoid a confrontation. In turn, he’ll need to loosen up a bit for you.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster guy can be imaginative, energetic, and a bit sadistic. He’s that man who loves to play games in order to keep the control in a relationship. Since you probably do best in a position of power, you might get fed up with his mind tricks. He, on the other hand, will see you as the perfect conquest. He loves adventure and hates routine. With him, the key is to look good, smell good, and be easy to boss around. He places a lot of importance on appearances, so make sure you look the part if you want him to woo you.
sign_match.Sex: It can be hard to find your sexual match, what with your outrageous libido and all! This guy might find it challenging to keep up. His indifference in the bedroom could bruise your ego, so make sure you talk about things before they turn sour. His style is a bit funky. Fetishes, sadism, and masochism can be part of his calling card. In contrast to most signs, you could find his quirkiness totally arousing. In the bedroom, your self-contained Rooster will probably get all loosy-goosy.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you and your Dog man will probably have to work at a happy union. On the outside, you couldn’t be more different! There might be a strong pull here at first – since opposites attract. The Dog is known for being able to get along with just about anyone, and your magnetism is usually irresistible. Your differences, however, might highlight challenges in this relationship. The trick? Stay open-minded and flexible as much as possible.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Yang/Yang match here reveals why you might butt heads. As a Yang sign, you are probably outgoing, forthright, and assertive – just like your Dog guy. Relationships need a little bit of both energies to stay balanced, and your similar energies might be a challenge. You approach life in the same ways, but may not respect each other’s methods or habits. You may need to cultivate some Yin energy to keep things calm and harmonious.
sign_match.TheGood: Despite your differences, you both are energetic and enthusiastic. Hooray! Sometimes opposite animals can get along nicely, so long as they learn from and respect each other. You might benefit from his nurturing, self-sacrificing nature. On the flip side, he could probably borrow from your strong and fearless attitude. If you can recognize and admire one another’s strengths, you have a fair shot. The key here is probably clear communication and a consistent effort to understand one another.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might have a tendency for the dramatic. To your Dog, this could get tiresome. He generally hates making a fuss. Your lifestyles are probably different too. While you’re out canoodling and partying, he’s curled up on the couch. If you want someone who will support your every wild dream, you may need to look elsewhere. This guy is usually a realist, if not somewhat pessimistic. Also, you could have to tone things down a notch with him – he can be easily overwhelmed by your big ideas.
sign_match.Romance: Here’s where things could get tricky. If you’re a typical Dragon, you live for bold romantic gestures. Your Dog man, however, could leave much to be desired. He’s probably no romantic – especially not in a showy, outrageous sort of way. You might be disappointed by the lack of excitement in his approach. However, if you want someone loyal and protective, he’s your man. He’ll take care of the garden, pay the bills and run errands without having to be told. Will that be enough for you?
sign_match.Sex: If you love taking the lead, this guy will let you! He’s got no hidden neuroses about wanting to dominate. In fact, he prefers if you’re the one on top. He may not be the most imaginative lover, but he probably enjoys sex – a lot. He’ll make love to you and then bring you breakfast in bed. He’ll let you be your wild Dragon self with no exceptions. Just try not to overwhelm him or act crass – that could turn him off quickly.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You might feel like you’ve hit a gold mine if you found yourself a Pig man. Deep down, this match could be everything you want. In general, this guy is loving, easygoing, and praise-giving. He’ll probably be fine letting you lead, and you should adore being put on a pedestal. You tend to have just enough in common but also several differences – a good balance for any couple. This man will typically provide a warm and happy home, but also enjoy a bit of adventure. The best of both worlds!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: With other signs, a Yang/Yin match up can be disastrous. But, you and your Pig guy probably complement each other where you’re different.  As a Yin sign, he is typically more sensitive, intuitive, and passive. Yang energy can make you the opposite – bold, fiery, and active. If the relationship is working, you’ll balance each other out. Even though you approach life differently, there’s mutual respect here.
sign_match.TheGood: There should be plenty of extravagances in this relationship! Good food, luxurious vacations, fine furniture – you both love opulence. This guy probably won’t try to over-power you or compete. He’ll generally share in your successes, praise you for being wonderful, and turn a blind eye to your faults. You could provide plenty of excitement and passion to the relationship, keeping him entertained with your charming sense of humor and unique personality.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This man can be a bit decadent, so you may have to nag him to get out of bed. Since he can get lost in his fantasies, he might need some coaxing or convincing to accomplish things. You, in turn, could injure him with your occasional brash manners. He’ll generally forgive easily, but not without sulking and pouting a bit. You won’t want to deal with a cranky Pig, so make sure you’re sweet and generous with him. As long as he feels appreciated and you feel adored, things should be fine.
sign_match.Romance: While he is no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll probably court you slowly and carefully, which might baffle a quick-to-act Dragon like yourself. After time, you’ll probably notice how attentive and intuitive he is, however. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Ah, a true romantic…with a bit of spunk! He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Don’t worry about coming on as the aggressor – he can handle it! Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat man can make a compatible pair – once you learn to overlook your differences, that is! This man is quick-witted, shrewd, and probably a power player. You, on the other hand, are generally cautious and reserved. His active, go-get-em nature is a stark contrast to your brooding, thoughtful demeanor. However, as two charming and magnetic personalities, this relationship could be enchanting and fulfilling for both!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Snake sign is Yin, while his is Yang. Since relationships need a bit of both energies for balance, this might work. Yin energy is associated with qualities of calm, passivity, and intuition. Yang, on the other hand, is associated with fast, aggressive, and dominant qualities. You might have different ways of relating to the world, but this could create a complementary match.
sign_match.TheGood: There could be an irresistible pull between you, at first. Your charm with the Snake’s magnetism? What a combo! This guy will probably love your intelligence and critical eye, while you can appreciate his quick wit and sense of adventure. Your man might help draw you out of the lair when you’re feeling blue. You, in turn, will probably unearth his softer side. What else? Since you both are social and gregarious, you’ll probably have plenty of friends and acquaintances to run around with.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re typical of your sign, a weakness for flirtation could get you in trouble. Once he’s in love, your man can be super loyal and committed. But, you might struggle to make up your mind about the relationship. Also, his verbal sparring could be trying when you’re in need of alone time. You’ll probably have to work on compromise if you want to avoid upsets. Another thing? You might need to figure out who is boss, since neither of you do very well taking orders.
sign_match.Romance: You probably love a guy with a big brain and pioneering spirit. That’s good, since your Rat is all those things and more! He may not be into surprises or bold romantic gestures. Don’t worry, though. He’ll make up for it in tenderness and affection. Also, he’s an entertaining conversationalist and will keep you on your toes with his wit. Don’t let him catch you right away, however. One thing is pretty common for all Rat men – they love the chase.
sign_match.Sex: One thing that should keep this union strong is the sex! That initial spark might have you between the sheets in no time. You tend to give lots of sexual attention, which he’ll gobble right up. Who can resist your seductive charm? And him? He’s a dedicated, passionate lover. Always eager to please, this man will see your sexual satisfaction as his mission in life. Just make sure to keep him on his toes. He loves a good chase.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox guy can make a great pair! You both are part of the Zodiac Love Triangle and a natural match for each other. Though outwardly different, you share similar sensibilities. You both prefer quality and depth over quantity and flashiness. Neither of you is afraid of hard work, and you value a strong and stable home life, which he probably will provide. From the outside, this match might look a bit tame – or even dull – but on the inside, it sparkles with its own special qualities. Things between you and your Ox man can be very satisfying indeed!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin, which means you’ll take a similar approach to life. As a Yin sign, you are usually more relaxed, easygoing, receptive, intuitive, and sensitive. Your man is probably a lot like you. Without Yang energy, however, your relationship might need a bit of zip and zest to stay interesting. For the most part, your similar orientations can work well together so long as you keep each other active and inspired.
sign_match.TheGood: Since you tend to be charming and popular, you might help your man come out of his shell. However, you’ll still appreciate his love of home and domestic comforts. He’ll probably be drawn to your intuitive nature and philosophical mind. You two can learn a lot from each other, since you both generally have your own ways of dealing with the world. It’s also nice you both are likely to feel you can take care of yourself. He won’t lean on you nor you on him. All in all, things should be amicable, peaceful, and fulfilling in this duo.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: This guy might be a bit withholding. Do you suspect him of having secrets? He’s probably not hiding anything, but your jealousy may sometimes get the best of you. Try to give him the benefit of the doubt. He could be a private person, so communicate instead of making assumptions. You also might get frustrated when his rigid thinking meets your subjective approach. But, with a little understanding and respect, you two should get past any relationship hurdles.
sign_match.Romance: Cheers to a happily ever after! You might just settle down with this stable guy. He may not be terribly romantic, but you two could create a cozy and happy home together. Underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. Since you tend to see past the glamour and hype of a fairy tale romance, his tender affections will probably be incredibly satisfying.
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but the two of you are probably a good sexual match. Your sensuality and energy between the sheets will break down his carefully constructed defenses. If you have trouble with trust, he’ll give you no reason to doubt him. With a mutual respect and warm affection for each other, the sex should be hearty and satisfying. He’s probably a bit predictable, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger may have a challenge finding common ground to stand on. Both of you tend to be easy-going, as long as you get your way. Do you see where that could get tricky?! Your Tiger man is generally self-possessed, bold, and independent. While you have a strong sign, you probably get what you want with that famous Snake charm. This fierce and free-thinking man might be drawn to your quiet strength, but you two could be quite different in how you approach the world.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yin, while your partner is Yang. In some matches, opposite energies can work well together – providing balance and harmony to a relationship. Here, things could seem like one big contrast. As a Yin sign, you’re probably more reserved, cautious, and sensitive. His yang energy could make for an outgoing, assertive, and impulsive personality. If you can learn to borrow qualities from each other, you might help your opposite natures work together.
sign_match.TheGood: There could be a strong attraction between you and your tempestuous Tiger. With his sexy charisma and your Snake charm, you’ll probably find each other irresistible. This guy can appreciate your inner sensitivity, since he’s a softie at heart. You might admire his strong spirit and fierce loyalty to the things he cares about. Together, you could be capable of influencing change with humanitarian efforts or even starting your own business.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenges of this match might have to do with your differing needs. If you’re a typical Snake, you probably require a fair amount of emotional connection from your partner. To your Tiger, this request could feel like an infringement on his freedom. It’s not that he’s uncaring – he actually has a big heart – he just can’t feel tied down. You might tire of his independent streak when you’re in need of some quality time with him. The key? Work on understanding and compromise while sharing the power in the relationship.
sign_match.Romance: Your man can be bold when it comes to romancing the woman he loves. No halfhearted efforts here! He’ll be the one throwing pebbles at your window in the wee hours of the morning, sending you embarrassing bouquets of flowers at work, and declaring his love on the jumbotron during a baseball game. He might make you blush. Even though it’s different than your style, his sweet sentiments will probably go over well with you. They’ll give you plenty of reassurance of his affections and reason enough to trust him.
sign_match.Sex: A Tiger and Snake in bed? Hmm… this could either be interesting or scary. His lovemaking style is probably nothing like yours. Fast, furious, passionate – he’s always ready to pounce! While you have your own brand of deep sensuality, you probably move slower than him. Can you learn to compromise? He could probably benefit from taking it down a notch, while you might have fun unleashing your wild side. Go ahead. See what happens.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your man have different ways of approaching the world. But, you might still find a close companion is this kindly creature. Socially, you tend to be opposite. You’re generally a people person with tons of charm, while he may be intimidated by your wide social circle, preferring the company of close friends. What could draw you together is a shared intuitive approach to life and a similar value system. You generally rely on a sixth sense and he’s known for being dreamily subjective about things. All in all, there could be something to explore here.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. You will probably be the silent, strong type, while your Rabbit prefers to stay under the radar and be an observer. Most likely, he’s more passive, receptive, tolerant, and giving. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other better.
sign_match.TheGood: Both of your signs operate on intuitive and philosophical levels, rather than rational. You can picture long discussions about the meaning of life, your purpose in the world, and how you can contribute to global harmony. Deep stuff! The connection here might be more emotional at first, but you’ll probably develop a close mental and physical bond – fast. You might be the front person in the relationship, but that’s probably fine with him anyway.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might need to watch out for insecurities in this relationship. Both of you can struggle with self-doubt. Make sure you don’t overanalyze everything and give your partner plenty of strokes. Even he adores refined and elegant surroundings, you might tire of his need for extravagant things. You’re probably thrifty but will also spend serious money on what you want – even if it seems wasteful to him. Sound right? Well he’ll just have to try not to deprive you. And he’ll have to work on not being pouty when he doesn’t get his way.
sign_match.Romance: As a Snake, you probably appreciate the art of seduction more than most. You might even live for it! The dinners, the presents, the surprises – nothing makes you happier. Your Rabbit man understands this completely. In fact he loves being seduced. He can be picky about the women he dates, since he has high standards. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear. And when he picks you up, he’ll probably be in a freshly detailed car with an immaculate bouquet of calla lilies. Sigh.
sign_match.Sex: Don’t be surprised if this guy is a little squeamish in the sack. It’s not you. It’s likely he’s just a tad uncomfortable with himself and his sexuality. He could be so focused on perfecting the act that he forgets all the sensuality that should go along with it! But get him in his comfort zone and wow. Your guy probably loves good sex at least as much as you do. Remember to relax and have fun in bed. Work that famous Snake sex appeal for all its worth. He won’t know what hit him!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As long as you know each other’s habits and motivations, you and your Dragon can hit it off. Both attractive and sexy, you and this guy will surely turn heads. Your bold magnetism combined with his flair He probably seems like the perfect arm candy! In a good match, your differences are complementary. He admires your quiet strength, and you’ll love his outrageous flamboyance. The attraction here will probably be quick – and intensely physical!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re Yin, he’s Yang. You might not accompany this guy on his exotic excursions at the drop of a hat. You’re probably more of a thinker and a planner than a dreamer and doer. While he’s slinking around town at a fancy restaurant, you’re probably laying low at home fantasizing over a home cooked meal. Yin people are more introverted and passive. Yang energy makes him quite the opposite – outgoing and assertive.
sign_match.TheGood: The way you two approach the world might fit like puzzle pieces. You tend to use a keen intuition and inner radar. He relies on his Dragon luck to jump on new opportunities. With your sixth sense and his good fortune, you’ll probably make a good team! You probably know exactly when to lend support, since you can sense his moods easily. He’ll typically make you feel loved and admired, which snuffs out a Snake’s insecurities. Another thing? You probably won’t be threatened by him, which allows him to reveal his softer side. How sweet.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A lot of signs can have trouble keeping up with the Dragon. Practically no one but the Tiger or the Horse can match his energy level. The challenge here might be your slower pace. You may even become a bump on a log when you’re in one of your moods. He might have to hit that dinner party alone or fly solo on Friday night. Intimate, one-on-one exchanges are more your thing than a flurry of small talk with strangers. He’ll have to be careful about his temper, too. An injured Snake will retreat, but you’ll probably retaliate when he least expects it. Look out!
sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon practically invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might seem superficial to you. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything!
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You both have very different sexual styles that might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your quieter style will suit him well, since he loves to dominate!  Generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means endurance between the sheets -- if you know what I mean.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So, you found another of your kind? Passion, drama, and sex will probably reign supreme! You might have the time of your life with another Snake, but typically a couple of challenges. Popular, charming, and intriguing – you two can share a luxurious home and an entourage of unusual friends. Since you both value stability and trust, this match up might be strengthened by similar values. Just know you’ll probably have to fight with this guy to be the center of attention – you both love the spotlight.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As two Yin signs, you and your man can enjoy a quieter, more passive existence together. Yin energy usually makes people intuitive, receptive, subjective, and easy-going. Since there’s no Yang energy here, remember to get up and fight when it’s necessary or take action instead of deeply pondering all your decisions. In general, you two should understand each other well and have similar temperaments.
sign_match.TheGood: Oh, the drama! This guy matches your charm, passion, and lusty tendencies. You might live the life of artists, entrepreneurs, or philosophers, and you can endlessly feed each other’s creativity. There should be physical fire enough to cause global warming! This man probably understands the true you, complete with faults and insecurities. But, he loves you anyway. You see the same vulnerabilities in him, and you probably work hard to protect each other from pain. What’s sweeter than that?
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Two Snakes might become lost in their own world. While you might have an overwhelming connection, it could consume you to the point of total deterioration! As two sedentary creatures, you might have to work on getting out of the house and bit more and staying in touch with the outside world. Emotional upsets could happen if you both suffer from intense mood swings or bouts of depression. Try to keep things lighthearted and don’t take things too seriously.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with him. He invented the meaning of charm. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. Other might cower away from this kind of intimacy, but you two will probably love to connect. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: The physical connection between you two will typically be overwhelming and possibly debilitating! Can you make it out of bed at all? This man matches you in the seduction department, so don’t be surprised if he blows your mind in bed. On the surface, he may appear quiet and reserved, but look out! He’s probably an incredible lover – mostly because he can intuitively know what you want, even before you do. Hour upon hour can be spent in bed, bodies entwined and souls connected.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Ah, the pull of a Horse man. You probably saw him galloping around, looking regal, fierce, and dashingly dangerous. But, you two might see each other as completely different species. His raw energy requires constant release, which means he’s usually restless and on the go. If you’re a typical Snake who often likes to be alone with her thoughts, you may be jumping through more hoops than you’d like in this match. You’ll probably have to give him plenty of room to run free, and he’ll need to nurture your higher needs.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you’re Yin, and he’s Yang, there could be opposing forces at work. As a Yang sign, he’s probably autonomous, enthusiastic, curious, and industrious. Yang energy people are usually go-getters who tend to be assertive. Your Yin energy probably makes you compromising, intuitive, diplomatic, and passive. With different energy natures, you two may find it a challenge to understand each other’s motives and personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: There are some positive qualities in your match. He probably admires your magical charm, while you love his spitfire attitude. Socially, you’ll be active and captivating as a team. There might be a strong attractive force between you, if only because you’re so different from each other. You both might learn a thing or two if you can put down your pride and be willing to do things outside your comfort zone. He could stand to be more sensitive; you could benefit from a little spunk.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: What is it with your man? He never wants to settle down, does he? If he’s typical of his sign, he’s probably content to not be in a committed relationship if only to remain free. You may be unsettled with a guy who balks at partnership, and he’s not likely to change. If you have indulgent or lazy tendencies, this will typically irritate him. He could be more conservative and practical than you, which means you might have to give up extravagances. Your best bet? Communicate. Compromise. Be flexible and willing to change.
sign_match.Romance: He’s got boundless enthusiasm and a hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. The Horse man loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. As a Snake lady, you might prefer a quiet evening in with candles and a bottle of wine. But first, you’ll have to convince him to take off his shoes and stay a while. The good news? Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. You never know where he’ll take you!
sign_match.Sex: If you’ve made it to bed with a Horse, you know the name of the game: action. Things will probably be hot and heavy until you’ve exhausted yourselves. Do you have a desire for sensual, emotional lovemaking? It might be like pulling teeth with him. Deep down, this man generally wants emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive and a bit raunchy. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man tends to hate routine.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Sheep can form a good, solid relationship that’s brimming with creativity and inspiration. With his progressive mind, esoteric tendencies, and seductive appeal, you could be one happy Snake. As a couple, you’ll probably be charming and appealing. Artistic or spiritual pursuits might draw you together, and a shared love of beauty and harmony should keep you close. Together you make a tender and classy match!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: While too much Yin energy can sometimes cause problems, here it could work to your advantage. As Yin signs, you can probably understand one another easily. Yin people tend to approach the world intuitively and subjectively, rather than practically and logically. You’re probably dreamers and artists, rather than politicians or athletes. With your Sheep man, a shared value system and similar preferences should make you a compatible pair.
sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Sheep man to understand the artistic side of life. You two probably share a love of beauty, magic, and grace, which should make your relationship sparkle! He’ll probably adore your intellectual superiority and philosophical mind. And, he’ll see your possessiveness as a sign of love. If you live together, your home might be filled with exotic art and plenty of spots for cozy cuddling and lovemaking. All in all, you two have plenty in common to stay fulfilled and happy.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Snake, sometimes your words can be biting. This man might run for the hills at the first sign of conflict. He probably hates anything ugly or harsh, so be careful about retaliating if you’re upset. Another challenge could be the practicalities of daily life. Neither of you tends to be diligent about bill paying or doing the dishes. This man probably loves making a creative mess, but doesn’t always know how to clean it up. You might have to hire a live-in maid.
sign_match.Romance: You probably were instantly attracted to your lover, and he to you. He’s probably creative and artistic. He’ll take you on dates to art museums and outdoor cathedrals. You’ll talk about religion, science, and the meaning of life. The Sheep man will flatter you with plenty of attention and probably surprise you with romantic gifts. Remember that rare flower you saw at the botanical garden? He’ll pick some, head to his laboratory, turn the essence into a perfume himself, and mail it to you with a love poem. How perfect.
sign_match.Sex: You and this guy will probably hit it off in the bedroom, and you may never leave! He’s naturally in tune with the female species, which makes him innovative, intuitive, and creative. He’ll want to have you on the kitchen counter or underneath the back deck, just to know what it feels like. As a Snake, you might prefer slow and sensuous to strange and quirky. But, you could have incredible sexual chemistry with this man – it should be worth some awkward moments!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Monkey man may have a handful of hurdles to deal with in order to get along. The saving grace might be your love of good times and mutual popularity. Though you probably shine during social interaction, you might be more reserved than your guy. It seems he’s always up for fun and games! If you’re a typical Snake, you take life and love, more seriously. Your Monkey, however, could be less focused. A little mutual understanding will probably be needed for a solid match here.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang sign, your Monkey is generally outgoing, assertive, and full of ambition. Not that you’re a pushover, but Yin energy probably makes you a little more relaxed and quiet. A good Yin/Yan balance is necessary in any relationship, but here it may seem difficult to understand one another. With different temperaments, you might need to compromise in order to keep things harmonious.
sign_match.TheGood: You’ll probably enjoy your Monkey man’s wit, mental agility, and desire to please– he’s got intelligence and kindness enough for everyone! In turn, he can appreciate your worldly wisdom and seductive appeal. Together, you could make a splashs at  all kinds of family and social functions. Another bonus? This guy probably won’t mind when you need your alone time. He’ll be happy to do his own thing until you’re ready to play again.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your man is probably not into overt displays of emotion. If you have a flair for the dramatic, he may think you’re silly. But who is he to call anyone silly! He could easily offend you with his careless remarks or his flippant attitude. Communication could get tricky. You tend to need a deep level of trust in a relationship – and you might always be suspicious of this guy. After an initial romance or infatuation, you may find you have little in common with your playful primate.
sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey man loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the signs in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy if you can get past the moments of aggravation. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
sign_match.Sex: You’ll probably have one fun time in the sack with your Monkey. Though he’s normally led by his big brain, he can be sweet and tender in bed. He’s got tricks up his sleeve, so get ready! If he’s typical of his sign, he probably doesn’t take sex too seriously, so be careful about showing too much emotion too soon. Try to have fun and enjoy his light-hearted approach to love-making. Since he’s ruled by his mind, give him a library of sexual memories to keep him entertained when you’re apart.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Cock-a-doodle-doo! That’s the call of your Rooster man, who, by the way, is a great match for you as you both are part of a Zodiac Love Triangle. You tend to have the same interests and values, which makes compatibility a breeze. Since you both like to impress at social events, you can probably expect to be at the center of action with him. As a couple, you can be sharp, witty, and captivating. Who wouldn’t want to be in your relationship?! Together, you can probably create a smooth-running, prosperous match.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: On the surface, your man may not appear very Yin. Yin people are typically more subdued, relaxed, and passive than the Rooster appears. But, since you both share Yin personalities, things might be smooth in the land of love. Neither of you tends to act brashly or impulsively, and you both value a peaceful, harmonious home. So long as you engage in an active social life, your similar personalities should match up well.
sign_match.TheGood: Sure, you two probably love a good party. But, in general, you both prefer the comforts of home. Your Rooster man has a keen eye for style and class, so he’ll help keep a spotless, comfortable abode. Since you can appreciate a cozy nest, you two might do well living together earlier than some couples. Another thing? Your tendency for luck in money with your Rooster’s steely work ethic should make things financially sound.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Just when you’re settling down to have some alone time, your Rooster man might barge in and start an argument. It’s not that he’s mean-spirited; he just tends to be a nitpicker. He can fight like no other, and he’s used to being right. You might have to lay low to avoid emotional storms. Also, be careful about sexually straying in this relationship – he probably won’t tolerate infidelity. The key to this match might be for both of you to lighten up a bit and not take things so seriously.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster guy is likely to be imaginative, energetic, and a bit sadistic. He’s that guy who loves to play games in order to keep the control in a relationship. Since you need utmost trust in a partner, you might get fed up with his mind tricks. He, on the other hand, will see you as the perfect conquest. He loves adventure and hates routine. With him, the key is to look good, smell good, and be hard to catch. He places a lot of importance on appearances, so make sure you look the part if you want him to woo you.
sign_match.Sex: Oh, where to begin. He is a bit strange when it comes to sex. He’s not as emotionally available and sensuous as you – at least on the surface. He’s probably got one or two weird fetishes that could even border on psychotic. If he’s a typical Rooster, he probably has some sort of strange fascination with inflicting pain during the act and making sure he’s in control. This might not bode well with you, since you usually see sex as a spiritual and emotional union. Your best bet? Don’t let him call all the shots. And do force him to be vulnerable once in a while.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you picked up a Dog? How’d you do it? Although you two can probably have a satisfying partnership, he can sometimes take forever to make up his mind. Your bond may provide you both with strength and security, which are high priorities for each of you. He tends to be loyal, trustworthy, and supportive. Since you both prefer the calm and quiet of home to the raucousness of life, you might be domestically delighted with your Dog man.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin-Yang match, you may have opposite habits. You probably value order and peace more than most – with harmony and stability in your relationships being important. Yin people tend to be receptive, passive, and accepting. Your Dog could provide enough Yang energy to keep things active and energized. His energy is probably assertive, outgoing, and proactive. There might be a good balance with both Yin and Yang energy in this match.
sign_match.TheGood: It’s strange – you two are not very similar but also not very different in nature. Somehow, this probably works perfectly! You’re two signs that both tend to need alone time. He wants space to deal with his changing moods, and you need it to recharge your batteries. You’ll probably have a cozy home you enjoy together while still maintaining separate lives. You don’t have to worry about trust in this match – the typical Dog man won’t give you any reason to doubt him. Music to your ears? Thought so.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If both of you have retreated in solitude, who will pick the kids up from school? After a fight, who’s going to apologize first? You two can both be passive-aggressive, so makes sure you don’t sweep problems under the rug or forget the important things. Since your Dog is generally trusting to a fault, make sure you respect his loyalty. If he witnesses flirtatious behavior or catches you in a lie, you’ll probably wound him for life. Your best bet is could be to stay in constant communication with each other – make sure nothing slips through the cracks.
sign_match.Romance: This guy can take a while to warm up to you. He might be a little pessimistic and picky, but underneath is a loving and loyal companion. Don’t expect huge romantic gestures, but do expect plenty of affection. You’ll love how eager he is to please. He’ll likely want to cook you dinner at home, give you a foot rub, and then draw you a bubble bath after a long day at work. Since you occasionally come home worn out from absorbing the world’s negative energy, he might be everything your Snake heart could ask for.
sign_match.Sex: He’s got no hidden neuroses about wanting to dominate in bed. In fact, he prefers if you’re the one on top. Are you up for it?! He may not be the most imaginative lover, but he’s tender, sweet, and very in tune with your needs. He’ll make love to you and then bring you breakfast in bed. He’ll let you penetrate his soul once he truly trusts you won’t hurt him. The strong friendship and affection you share with this guy should translate into powerful, meaningful sex.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Pig have enough in common that your coupledom could be destined for success. It can be a fair match, as long as you truly understand each other. As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you’re probably drawn to one another like moths to the flame, but you could get burned! Your man enjoys  a good time, and has a devoted nature. There should be plenty of laughing, bantering, and entertaining guests together.  With some work, things might be satisfying for you both. The question is how long will it last?
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you share a Yin energy orientation, you and your Pig guy could be on the same wavelength. While neither of you have weak personalities, he probably approach life in a more easy-going, receptive way. Generally, you both tend to react to situations rather than try to stir up action. This shared approach could bode well for your relationship, as long as your similarities don’t cause a butting of heads.
sign_match.TheGood: Sensual delights will probably drive this relationship. Laughter, food, music, sex, travel – you’ll typically have a ball. You probably adore the Pig’s quirky sense of humor, innate compassion, and bright mind. He, in turn, can feel more grounded and stable in your powerful presence. You won’t have to worry about trusting a Pig man, since he tends to be faithful no matter what. In general, you two have a lot in common that lends to fun, connection, and prosperity in love.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Communication might get tricky when your candid Pig wants to talk freely about his feelings. It’s not that you’re incapable, but you might struggle with his let’s hash it out and move on approach. You probably need more time and space to process things, so make sure to let him know when you want to fly solo for a bit. Don’t take advantage of his trusting nature, either. This guy, in all his earnest goodness, is likely to suffer greatly if he’s hurt.
sign_match.Romance: While he is no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, which you’ll probably adore. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and vulnerability might match well with your sensuality and underlying passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: To be frank, sex should be off the charts! He’s generally a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. You’ll be generously rewarded for your thoughtfulness between the sheets.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Uh oh. Trouble usually lands when opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac come together. While you share some similar qualities, your differences may be too much to sustain a long-term relationship. You’re both movers and shakers, albeit in different ways. A free-flowing, bohemian, independent lifestyle probably suits you, while he’s more social and success-seeking in his adventures. You two might not be able to appreciate each other’s personalities enough to make love last. A strong spark at first, maybe, but it could fizzle out fast.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs here. Sometimes that can work, although your match might be marked by friction. Too much Yang energy can be like fireworks in a tin can! This energy orientation probably makes you somewhat impulsive, goal oriented, and even a bit aggressive. His Yang personality probably gives him plenty of spunk, ambition, and a dose of impatience. Put those together, and you might have two people battling it out for the steering wheel! If one of you has enough Yin qualities – patience, reserve, and diplomacy – it will probably fare better for your relationship.
sign_match.TheGood: This guy could complement you since his strengths are typically your weaknesses, and vice versa. He can take care of practical things you probably don’t enjoy, like balancing your checkbook or fixing things around the house. Your idealism might inspire him to accomplish his lofty goals and provide you with a comfortable life. Mentally , you two will probably enjoy a stimulating intellectual connection – there won’t be a shortage of communication here. If you can honor one another’s strengths and forgive weaknesses, you might have a shot.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You probably hate being tied down, but he may want the security of a commitment. If you enjoy picking up and taking off at a moment’s notice, don’t expect this guy to join you. He’s generally more content to create a stable nest than live the life of a gypsy. Are you fiercely independent? If so, the two of you may bicker over your impulsiveness or unconventional tendencies. Most likely, he sees the big picture, while you focus on the immediate future. To make things work, he has to give you freedom to roam and you have to convince him you’ll always come back after you’re done wandering.
sign_match.Romance: This guy’s romantic style may not appeal much to your get it on style. He probably likes flashy displays of affection and gestures that show off his wealth. However, you can appreciate his adventurous spirit. With a Rat, you never know where he’ll take you, but you can be pretty sure it won’t be the same place twice! He’s probably not into excessive makeup and doesn’t care whether you’re dressed in designer clothing. As long as you can wow him with your intellect and witty sense of humor, he’ll probably be charmed.
sign_match.Sex: If there isn’t potential for a love match, at least you can count on some sparks in the bedroom! In fact, your relationship might start off on a sexual note before you even have the first date. Opposite signs in the Zodiac tend to have sexual magnetism to each other. Your Rat man is high-energy and eager to please. Since he tends to love the chase, you’ll feed his arousal just by being your independent self. A woman he can’t capture? This will probably baffle and motivate him. Once he finally pins you down, let him take the lead. He’ll want to conquer your body like an expedition on Everest.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Even though the Rat is your Zodiac opposite, an Ox man may be just as different. Your personalities are opposing in many ways. While you’re generally carefree and unrestrained, he is probably conscientiousness and conservative. The freedom from attachment you crave is precisely the opposite of what he wants: security and routine. Though different, you both can be incredibly passionate people. Whether or not the passion for each other can last, however, will probably be the central issue.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Ox man is a Yin sign, while you are Yang. Relationships tend to need a balance of both energies to stay harmonious, but opposite energies can clash. His general nature is probably more reserved, receptive, and peaceful than someone with Yang energy. On the flip side, you’re typically more aggressive, outspoken, and adventurous than him. The key here will probably be understanding each other’s different temperaments.
sign_match.TheGood: Despite your independent personality, you probably want someone to lean on. That’s good, since he’ll love being your rock. He can probably provide you with the love and security you crave, deep down. In contrast, you might be just the person to draw him out of his comfort zone. You can teach him to lighten up and live more freely, while he can show you the value of a steady, dependable partner. All in all, you each have strengths that can support the foundation of this relationship, as long as your differences don’t break it apart.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Ox likes the pleasantries of a safe and secure home, while you’re probably happy to float around aimlessly. Marriage might be out of the question if you aren’t willing to settle down in one place. He might not understand your need for constant diversions – it could make him feel he’s not enough. It’s not likely he’ll accompany you on your wild excursions, but you probably want to fly solo anyway. Give him the promise of your love and then ask for permission to be free. It’s probably the only way you two will work things out.
sign_match.Romance: Don’t expect wildly romantic sentiments from him. While you might see spontaneous gestures of affection as the very essence of love, he’s typically too practical for that. So what can you look forward to? He’ll pick you up on time. He’ll open your car door, pull out your chair, and pay for dinner. He’ll fix your broken dishwasher and make you soup when you’re sick. As long as you can appreciate his subdued, yet sweet style, you’ll be totally taken care of.
sign_match.Sex: Underneath the quiet, brooding exterior of your Ox is a well of passion. It might take some time to tap into. Sometimes, he can struggle with the separation between love and sex, either confusing the two or finding it hard to join them together. Your job? Make him see you as his faithful girlfriend and naughty sex kitten all at the same time. Let him catch you easily and allow him to do his thing. If you can unleash his sexual zeal, you’ll be in for plenty of passion.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: A volcanic attraction will probably erupt between you and your Tiger man! This is indeed a favorable match since you’re both part of the Zodiac Love Triangle of Horse-Tiger-Dog. You two are free-thinking, independent, and adventurous.  You may be a tad more serious than him, but you’ll probably help him stay grounded. As sunny and optimistic creatures, you could have an active social life together while sharing similar goals as individuals. He won’t dare encroach on your freedom – since he needs just as much room to roam -- and you’ll love him to pieces for it.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yang energy. Neither of you want to sit back and watch the action happen – you want to be in the center of it! You’re both probably driven to exciting careers and seek a life of adventure. This man will want to take the reigns, but you’ll be right there next to him waiting for your turn to drive! Since you’re both go-getters, expect an action-packed relationship with journeys on roads less traveled.
sign_match.TheGood: No one understands your need for freedom as much as a Tiger. You don’t have to worry about being smothered. He probably won’t ask you to check in or demand all your time. Since he’s just as independent as you, the space in this relationship could give it plenty of room to grow. You admire each other, know each other’s boundaries, and have a lot in common. In general, one of you will always be able to be strong for the other. How wonderful!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Horse, you might be a bit impulsive. The downside? This guy may be just as unpredictable! If you two can’t respect each other’s similar natures or both want to be in control, you might clash. Since it’s probable you each lead independent lives, make sure you factor in time to be together. It can be easy for you and your Tiger to not cross paths ‘cause you’re busy flying solo. That may be OK as long as it doesn’t become a habit.
sign_match.Romance: Passion meets passion here! He’s the one guy that matches your boundless enthusiasm and hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. This man loves to run free and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. He probably loves something that feeds his stalking tendencies, like duck hunting or paintballing. Are you up for it? I thought so!
sign_match.Sex: Once you’ve been in bed with him, you know the name of the game: enthusiasm! You and he both might get bored easily, so you’ll have to keep sex interesting here. Don’t worry. That should be an easy task for you two. Deep down, he tends to want emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive one minute and sentimental the next. Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man typically hates routine, both in and out of the bedroom. Also, make him work for it. Tigers love to stalk their pray.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and a Rabbit man may have to put work into maintaining a satisfying match. Very different by nature, you two seem to diverge all over the place. You’re probably assertive, outspoken, and a wee bit aggressive, while he might be laid-back, reserved, and somewhat timid. This guy is usually nice to have around – he’s smart, loving, classy, and refined. But he prefers the comforts of home and you probably want more adventure than he can provide. Making adjustments will likely be the name of the game with this relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re a Yang sign, which means you’re completely opposite from him as a Yin energy person. Some of the qualities associated with Yang are fast, aggressive, hot, and dominant. Sound like you? I thought so! He, on the other hand, is probably not the aggressor type. Yin energy people are usually go-with-the-flow personalities who take things slowly and carefully. They don’t often pursue, but they get what they want by patiently waiting for it.
sign_match.TheGood: The good news? His powers of compassion makes him an amazing listener and communicator. He probably has an innate ability to understand your deepest insecurities and inner conflicts. You will generally appreciate his tenderness and affections, as long as he doesn’t smother you. Your outgoing personality also might help draw him out a bit. When he’s sitting at home on a Saturday night, you can motivate him to get off the couch. He, in turn, might benefit from running around in your influential circle and meeting new people.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might never hear the end of it if you skip town without telling him. Careful not to step on his delicate paws with your heavy hooves. Though you’re probably loving and warm-hearted, your restless nature could conflict with his calm and contained personality. Since he’s someone who generally thrives on constant communication, it might be hurtful if you take off on a two-week vacation without him. You could have to work on consistency with him in order to stay close.
sign_match.Romance: This man loves the finer things in life – lucky you! He’ll probably take you to the nicest restaurants, buy you designer clothing, and decorate your home with expensive furniture. If you’re a rugged and adventurous Horse, he may only go camping with you if there’s a comfy air mattress and good wine to drink by the fire. He’s sensitive, so he’ll pay attention to little things. He’ll open your car door, pull out your chair, and give you his coat when you’re cold. While he may not be up for wild and crazy dates, he’ll lavish you with beautiful things and fine food. Sounds good to me!
sign_match.Sex: Your sexual styles might be a bit different. Do you thrive off the thrill of a wild romp? This guy might not be into the quick and dirty. Most likely, he’ll take his time and shower you with tender kisses. He’s probably a true romantic, so be careful about acting crass or vulgar until you’re sure he can handle it. The good news? He’ll typically be fine with letting you dominate, since he’s more passive by nature anyway. Can you be tender? Sensual? Feminine? If so, he’ll be eating out of the palm of your hand.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Finally. A man who’s just as passionate and free-thinking as you are! Your Dragon probably embodies the archetype of an old world hero – strong, valiant, and powerful. He’s quick to take action and change directions without notice, but that’s your style too. Unbridled passion? Blistering infatuation? You got it. He’ll be happy to race alongside you no matter where you’re going – and it’s likely you have the same destination in mind! His idealism and your free spirit should make for one dazzling relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Yang on top of Yang? Oh boy. You two will take no prisoners. Yang people are typically energetic, ambitious, goal-oriented, and quick to take action. A Dragon will relate to your outgoing, assertive nature -- he’s the same way. However, since yang people tend to move quickly, be careful about burnout in this match. One of you might have to remind the other to slow down! The good news is that you’ll approach life the same way – with vigor, bravery, and purpose!
sign_match.TheGood: You two can have loads of fun together, as long as you don’t butt heads. As an active, stimulating pair, there’s no end to your adventures. Socially and mentally, you’re similar: moving at lightening speed and charming everyone along the way. Since neither of you like to settle down for long, travel could become a way of life. This guy will probably keep you entertained and curious unlike any other sign. He’s your intellectual equal and partner in crime. Sounds fun to me!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The challenge with you two might be your fickleness. He could be the more reliable one in the relationship, and your changeable nature may stress him out. Since he probably needs a peaceful and orderly place to call home, you might have to put on your apron and play housewife once in awhile. Will you be able to  hack it? As long as there is enough variety and freedom in your relationship, things should run smoothly. Make sure your communication is in tip-top shape so you can deal with conflict effectively.
sign_match.Romance: Do you feel like you’ve stepped into a fairy tale? Your Dragon’s mysticism is famous. He’s the knight in shining armor, the war hero, the Ulysses to your Penelope. Whatever he does, he’ll do it 100%. This should bode well with your personality type, and he’ll love trying to keep up with you. Bold gestures and wild sentiments are the name of the game. Have fun playing!
sign_match.Sex: Not everyone can handle the blowtorch bedroom behavior of a Dragon, but you can! This guy’s magnetism is a powerful force. You both can be passionate and ardent between the sheets, but you may clash over who gets to be on top. He probably won’t hold back his emotions either, so expect plenty of grunting, moaning, and the like while you’re getting busy. But just when you think he’s being a bit crude, he’ll kiss you tenderly and tell you how beautiful you are. Your best bet? Let him take the lead and he’ll take care of your every need.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Opposites attract, but they also create friction. If you’re paired up with a Snake guy, you’ll probably notice he’s an entirely different life form. He’s usually got a strong need for solitude and security, while you’re scampering around town in your carefree fashion. Consistency might be hard to achieve here, since he wants to know where he stands and you might have trouble committing. If you can give him plenty of reassurance and he can let you run free, it could work.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you’re Yang, and he’s Yin, there could be opposing forces at work. As a Yang sign, you’re probably autonomous, enthusiastic, curious, and industrious. Yang energy people are usually go-getters who tend to be assertive. His Yin energy probably makes him compromising, intuitive, diplomatic, and passive. With different energy natures, you two may find it a challenge to understand each other’s motives or personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: There are some positive qualities in your match. You probably admire his gregarious and generous nature, while he loves your spitfire attitude. Socially, you’ll be active and fun-loving as a team. Also, there might be a strong physical attractive force between you, if only because you’re so different from each other. You both can learn a thing or two if you’re open to constructive criticism. You could stand to be a bit more sensitive to his feelings, while he could learn to be more adventurous and less judgmental.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Horse, you might cringe at the idea of holy matrimony, or even a monogamous relationship. Probably content to be alone, you simply want to remain free. However, he may be unsettled with a woman who balks at partnership. If he has indulgent or lazy tendencies, this will most likely irritate you. Are you more conservative and practical than him? If he wants your respect, he might have to give up some of those Snake-like extravagances. Your best bet? Communicate. Compromise. Be flexible and willing to change.
sign_match.Romance: Your Snake man invented the meaning of romance. He’s got enough charm and slippery moves to break hearts all over the world. You might find his style a bit over the top – he can be intense. But, he can make a girl feel like she’s the only one in the world. Lucky you! Keep him guessing, as he can have a wandering eye. If he thinks he doesn’t have you, he’ll be banging down your door until he’s sure you’re his again.
sign_match.Sex: The seductive Snake is legendary for his moves! Your sexual styles may be a bit different, but you’ll probably be satisfied with him in the sack. He’s more of a slow-moving lover than a quick-to-finish type. For him, sex is usually about sensuality and connection. He likes to intertwine limbs, and the feel of skin to skin contact can arouse him instantly. The way to please him? Move slowly and seductively. Crawl and slither on top of him like one of his own kind. It won’t take long before you know the meaning of a Snake man's seductive powers.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So you found another of your own kind? Nothing is certain when you pair up two independent, restless animals! The good news is a Horse guy will probably understand your need for freedom more than most. He enjoys the dirt beneath his feet and the wind in his hair as much as you do. Marriage? Kids? Mortgage? It might not happen right away for you two free spirits. However, you could be OK with that. As long as you’re both content with an unconventional relationship, things will probably be lively and lovely with this guy.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: There are two yang personalities in this relationship. How will that fare for a love connection? Let’s just say there will be plenty of ambition and passion to go around. Yang energy typically makes you assertive, proactive, outgoing, and goal-oriented – just like him. This means you’ll probably have similar personalities and temperaments. However, you might have power struggles as well. If you two have enough Yin qualities to balance it out, the relationship will run more smoothly.
sign_match.TheGood: What can you expect with another Horse? Double the excitement, and double the fun! You’re two peas in a pod. There could be a strong and fast bond that glues you together for life. Both high-energy risk takers and radical thinkers, you probably love being in motion and now you have a companion for the road. This match might be the envy of all your friends – you’re a witty, lively, and charming pair. Whether jetting off to Mexico for Christmas or starting a chicken farm in Tennessee, you two probably won’t run out of big ideas.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If one of you has a more conservative streak, things could get tricky. Should you or he want to settle down, this could be the dividing factor in the relationship. Typically, you’ll both want your freedom and independence, putting your own dreams and goals over the good of the relationship. Running a home together might get messy, too, since neither of you tends to be good at remembering the details. Your biggest challenge will probably be consistency and compromise.
sign_match.Romance: Oh, to be a fly on the wall during your first date. Practically anything could happen when this guy shows up on your doorstep. Maybe you’ll go skinny dipping at the local YMCA. Or perhaps you’ll go bungee jumping at the Grand Canyon. This guy’s style is one of adventure and thrills. He’ll probably want to take you on extreme outdoor excursions or to wildly crowded concerts and parties. While some would shy away from danger and chaos, you probably won’t blink an eye. My advice? Sign up for a life insurance policy before you go on that first date.
sign_match.Sex: If all else fails, at least you’ll have fun between the sheets! Picture a wild stampede with plenty of surprises. You probably match him in stamina and passion, so don’t be surprised if your sexcapades last all day – or all week! Remember to come up for air! He’s probably goal-oriented in bed, just like in life. Take turns being dominant, too. The best part? After a good romp, you’ll probably want to hang out and talk. Hot sex and a solid friendship? You couldn’t ask for more.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: On the surface, a Sheep man might not seem like your type. He’s probably a domesticated homebody with somewhat of a moody streak. If you look closer, however, you might see a diamond in the rough. This man can usually provide you with a stable home base while not infringing on your freedom. Not only that, he’ll probably keep you on your toes with plenty of variety and his unconventional approach to life. As two free-spirited, progressive people, this could be an enduring match indeed.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang and he is Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. Your hard-driving ambition might complement his unusual and eccentric pursuits. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of his calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different temperaments, you can probably appreciate one another’s unique personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: The typical Sheep can sometimes suffer from doubt or insecurities. With you around, however, he’ll get a huge helping of sunshine and positive energy. You’ll probably encourage him to take life less seriously, while he can help you stay grounded and calm. You two can dream up the most unusual schemes and keep each other entertained with lively conversation and philosophical debate. The best part? He’s got an independent streak, which gives you free reign to have yours.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Trouble in paradise could arise when your Sheep man feels abandoned. It’s probably in your nature to roam, but his sensitive side might have a problem with that. The bigger challenge, however, will probably be his tendency to stuff his feelings. He may keep things to himself for some time – perhaps even until it’s too late to resolve them.
