Plenty of hair pulling, giggling, and wrestling should be part of your romp sessions. He might let you dominate him too, as long as you don’t get too rough. With your special breed of tenderness, this guy could easily open his heart to you between the sheets. All in all, you two should have plenty of kinky sexual sparks.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster guy have such different sensibilities that a smooth relationship would almost be surprising. If you’re typical of your signs, you both insist on being in control, but in different ways. He claims his dominion by nagging others into perfection. You, on the other hand, hold to your position on top by being the loudest, taking the biggest risks and generally making yourself very noticeable. He may find your extreme personality to be just a bit excessive, and you could find him to be less than fun.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Rooster is a Yin sign. While he may be somewhat of a flashy and social being, he’s probably more introverted than you think. As a Yang sign, you two will typically clash due to your dissimilar temperaments. You may find it difficult to understand one another’s motivations or personalities. Since it’s not likely you’ll approach the world the same way, this match will probably take a fair amount of compromise and dedication.
sign_match.TheGood: As two social and outgoing creatures, you might meet at a party or some other public place. You may find a witty and entertaining companion in your Rooster – he’s probably known for his quick wit and conversational skills. If he’s of the less stubborn variety, you may be able to help him loosen up a bit. With your carefree attitude and his conservative nature, you both could stand to learn a thing or two from the other.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rooster sees the world in terms of details, all of which could stand some improvement. He may get tired of your gallivanting and give you advice about how to live your life. You, on the other hand, might become irritated with his nagging. With that independent streak of yours, he probably won’t get too far if he tries to change your ways.  In fact, you may be tempted to ditch him entirely if he infringes on your freedom. Honesty and open communication will be necessary for avoiding upsets.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster is a power player in the romance department. This man loves the chase, and you’re probably always running. Your wild and spontaneous nature will motivate him to pin you down! If he does manage to catch you down for a date, he’ll treat it like a conquest. Try to be well-groomed and articulate around him – he’ll probably be quick to point out if your makeup is smudged or you aren’t up to date on current politics. Look good, smell good, and make sure you impress him with your wit.
sign_match.Sex: What can I say about his sexual preferences? A little strange, to say the least. He may be into power plays in the bedroom – wanting to control and dominate the female species. Some might accuse him of being misogynistic, but it may just be his thirst for power in any form. Keep him guessing and you’ll ensure things stay interesting in bed. Another thing? Appeal to his fetishes. It’s likely he’s got more than one unusual sexual obsession.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Dog have some fundamental differences in your natures, but your similarly high energy levels and love of activity could make for an easy relationship. Since you’re always ready for a new adventure, he’ll love being your running mate, so to speak. This guy has a more serious heart and soul. Sometimes he may need to run off and be alone to nurse a sudden mood swing, but you’re probably so busy with your own pursuits that it shouldn’t be a problem.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs know how to have a good time! While you share the same energy orientation, you probably have different ways of expressing it. Your personality is probably fun-loving, active, and ambitious, while your Dog guy is social, hard-working, and athletic. You both tend to be on the go, which means you’ll have plenty of adventures and excitement in this relationship. Your Dog’s more subdued nature might be a good complement to your restless energy. Most likely, your personalities should be a good match.
sign_match.TheGood: As long as your Dog man knows he can trust you, things should be smooth sailing. This should be a fun, upbeat and lighthearted relationship centered on social outings and fun. What makes it work is probably your mutual need for independence. Neither of you should have a problem doing your own thing, and your relationship is probably strengthened by the space. He can provide loyalty and kindness while you bring vigor and excitement to the relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you’re a typical Monkey, that gregarious and curious nature could mean you may have an inclination to stray romantically. Your Dog has high moral standards and has trouble trusting people as it is, so he may not stand for anything less than loyalty. Should he find a reason to mistrust you, he may shut down emotionally and the relationship will probably be over. You, on the other hand, may tire of his mood swings and tendency to be pessimistic. A little sensitivity and a solid foundation for trust should be all that’s needed.
sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but you’ll get plenty of good old fashioned romance. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when you really need him. Instead of fast and ferocious, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
sign_match.Sex: This match might have you between the sheets – fast. There’s probably a strong physical connection in addition to your hearty friendship. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably sentimental, sweet, and tender. You might be glad to know he’ll let you be on top. In fact, he probably prefers it that way! Just be careful with his ego. This guy can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. When your passion meets his sensitivity, there’s a high likelihood of sexual bliss!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Pig can have a lot of fun together. Both are generally happy, positive types, and you two are sensualists! He loves fine foods, luxurious surroundings, lovemaking, and simple pleasures. You’ll probably complement his sensual side well with your love of party atmospheres and exciting travels. You both tend to live for the pursuit of pleasure, and your Pig man should be a loving, loyal companion with plenty of sparkle and humor to keep you entertained.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, your Pig man is probably opposite in nature to your assertive, high-energy, fast-paced personality. However, your different temperaments might actually complement each other. He’s known for being easy-going and well-liked by just about everyone, and his passive, receptive nature could be good for smoothing over communication upsets and keeping the relationship in harmony. He may be more of a homebody than a social butterfly, but your energies can work well together with some understanding and compassion.
sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Pig when it comes to generosity and tenderness. He’s usually happy to give everything to the one he loves, and you’ll appreciate his warm-hearted nature. You’ll probably share a similar sense of humor, delighting in the silly or quirky things in life. Plus, you both love pleasure more than most, which means fun and happiness will be a priority in this relationship. This guy is usually tolerant, a good communicator, and eager to please. Lucky you!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Pig man may be a bit too lethargic or home-loving for your tastes. Badgering him to go out and socialize won’t do any good – he’s content to stay at home with close friends and family. Since you’ll typically run off without him if he’s not interested, he may tire of your different lifestyles. This man usually values connection and emotional sustenance, which you can’t give if you aren’t around. The key with you two is probably compromise. Agree to spend Friday night in if he’s willing to spend Saturday night painting the town.
sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might match well with your playfulness and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Ah… a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll probably be generously rewarded.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rat can be a good pair if you can learn to understand one another's motivations. This clever, quick-witted guy is a schemer whose shrewd mind may not measure up to your honest, straightforward ways. You probably like to stick to traditional, tried-and-true routes in life and may disapprove of your Rat's looser, more creative approach. However, you can probably appreciate his generous gestures and he your steadfastness. This man can be a trustworthy, energetic companion for you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your Rat is a Yang sign, which means he approaches life with energy, passion, and purpose! As a Yin energy person, you’re probably more subdued and reserved than your outgoing mate, but bring an orderly, peaceful energy to the relationship. Since it’s usually good to have a Yin/Yang balance, your opposing energies might actually work to your advantage. The problem could be you probably have trouble understanding each other’s motivations and personalities.
sign_match.TheGood: While he’s probably not as exacting as you, your Rat man has a serious side and knows how to treat loved ones well. He’s typically generous, upbeat, and eager to please. You can admire his ingenuity in business or his career, and he’ll appreciate your orderly mind and ability to manage a household. You two can probably go far as a team, whether as lovers, spouses, or even business partners.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are you a typical Rooster perfectionist? If so, be careful about falling into the habit of nagging your Rat to shape up and get serious. He tends to do things his own way – a true innovator and entrepreneur – so you’ll probably stifle his desire for you if you nag too much. He’ll have to watch his actions, however, since you typically won’t tolerate unfaithfulness or sticky behavior. As long as you understand one another’s differences, you can probably get past any challenges.
sign_match.Romance: Adventure? Play? Constant stimulation? Your Rat man’s romantic approach is energetic and ambitious. This guy typically wants a bosom buddy in a woman – someone to befriend, have fun with, and eventually settle down with. He’ll probably be delighted by your quick wit and intelligence since he’s got an overactive mind. You’ll keep him on his toes, and he typically won’t be threatened by a smart and opinionated woman. When it comes down to it, he generally wants to find his equal. The good news is you might be it!
sign_match.Sex: He probably loves the chase, so behave like a potential conquest. If you can amuse and admire him, he’ll be running after you forever. This guy is quick to act when he’s feeling randy, which is probably fine by you. The bedroom will feel more like a jungle gym when the two of you are between the sheets. Make sure you don’t give in too easily, however. He might be so consumed with passion that he puts his own needs ahead of yours.
