His tenderness and sensitivity might match well with your spunk and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Ah… a true romantic. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Give him plenty of sensual massage. Light candles. Burn incense. Anything that will heighten his senses. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll probably be generously rewarded.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Rat make a great pair, despite your differences. This man loves to be surrounded by a team of loyal friends, and your faithfulness is famous! Since your Rat guy thrives on change and stimulation, your sometimes moody, fretful nature and radical ideas will probably keep him guessing. Also, he can recognize the presence of a true friend in you and wants to return the favor. This man treats his loved ones well, and you’ll make him feel just as special.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are both Yang signs; although, your energies manifest in different ways. He ’s probably an active, outgoing, social type who needs plenty of stimulation to keep his mind engaged. While you probably tend to be more of a homebody, you might also need physical activity to keep you feeling upbeat. In general, you will both stand up to fight for your loved ones and defend what’s right. Sometimes, two people with the same energy orientation can have trouble getting along, but you two will probably be compatible.
sign_match.TheGood: You and your Rat man are typically independent and peace-loving. As a warm and sensitive team, you two are probably both compromising and tender with one another. His light-hearted, positive nature can do wonders for your occasional bouts of moodiness, while your loyalty and generosity will refresh and replenish him. Neither of you tend to be argumentative, so you can probably count on smooth channels of communication and a lively, cheerful relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There may come a point where you suspect your Rat man of questionable behavior. While he is usually loyal to his loved ones, his shrewd and sometimes cunning nature might cause you worry. And, though he will probably be accommodating to your changing moods, he could tire of your need for solitude. He wants the company of his loved ones absolutely. Make sure you reassure each other of your affection and don’t be quick to blame or criticize his motives.
sign_match.Romance: Adventure? Play? Constant stimulation? Your Rat man’s romantic approach is energetic and ambitious. This guy typically wants a bosom buddy in a woman – someone to befriend, have fun with, and eventually settle down with. He’ll probably be delighted by your warm personality and honorable nature. You’ll keep him on his toes, and he typically won’t be threatened by a smart and opinionated woman. When it comes down to it, he generally wants to find his equal. You might be a good candidate.
sign_match.Sex: He probably loves the chase, so try to behave like a potential conquest. If you can amuse and admire him, he’ll be running after you forever. This guy is quick to act when he’s feeling randy, which is probably fine by you—as long as he brings some sensitivity between the sheets. With that loyal and giving nature of yours, make sure you don’t put his needs ahead of your own, however. He might be so consumed with passion he forgets to take care of your first! If you can prolong his torture, he’ll be eager to please you in return for the release.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You may be attracted to your Ox’s strength and stability but could find his domineering ways a bit too forceful for your liking. While he probably shies away from conflict or distress, you can be a bit cantankerous and moody—which he may not know how to deal with. Both of you probably share honest and trustworthy natures, but there may not be sufficient sparks to keep the heat of passion alive. If you can respect one another’s differences, however, you might be able to create a comfortable relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is a Yin sign, you are Yang. While you both tend to be creatures of habit, your Ox may be a bit more passive and introverted than you. You will generally get worked up over things dear to your heart, but he can be coldly logical and detached—especially if he sees everyone around him getting emotional. Your friendly and communicative personality might become stifled by his introverted, stoic one. All in all, your different energies might take some work to balance out.
sign_match.TheGood: Not many signs are as faithful and loyal as you, but your Ox probably will be. Both of you can be strongly attached to the ones you love, so there shouldn’t be much worry about infidelity in this relationship. Since you might struggle with inherent trust issues, this man will be a wise investment for the long-term. Both of you adhere to high standards for yourself and others, so your relationship will probably be morally sound and predictable. Together, you can create a harmonious and orderly home life that’s cozy and comfortable for both.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If your Ox man pushes you around one too many times, you may unleash that bark. His stern lectures may come from a place of love, but you can get agitated with people who are bullies. When your outspoken and independent nature meets his rigid thinking, there might be monumental arguments or clashes in opinion. These upsets could send you into a tailspin of worry and anxiety, which your Ox may view as childish or unnecessary.
sign_match.Romance: The Ox has a bad reputation for being unromantic. And your guy? It’s not that he’s incapable, but the frivolities of romance could seem ridiculous to him. He may not understand why you want flowers or jewelry—or anything else that doesn’t serve a practical need. Unfortunately, you might not find a storybook romance here. This guy typically shows his love with acts of service. Got a broken light bulb? Forgot your umbrella on a rainy day? He’ll head to the hardware store and bring you raincoat on your lunch break. That’s his own way of saying he cares.
sign_match.Sex: Underneath the stoic nature of your Ox guy is a well of passion. It may take a while to tap into, but once you do, brace yourself. He can be generous and sensitive as a lover, once you break down the steel walls of his defense mechanisms. He probably likes to dominate, so let him take the lead. In bed, you two may find the compatibility that is lacking in other areas of your relationship. If you can bring the sensitivity and generosity you share during sex to other areas, you might have a better shot at sticking things out.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Time to celebrate! A Tiger man is probably music to your ears. As one of the animals in your Zodiac Love Triangle – Tiger, Dog, Horse – this guy is one of your most compatible matches. In general, he’s noble, protective, and kind. He doesn’t limit your freedom but still makes you feel loved and secure. You’ll benefit from his positive energy when the blues hit you, and he will feel like he’s got the best of both worlds – freedom and companionship all rolled into one. A close emotional bond can develop here that promotes a lively, lasting match.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang energies, which means you probably approach life similarly. Instead of waiting around for things to happen, you both tend to take charge and fight for the things that matter to you. Most likely, he’s outgoing, social, and communicative – like you. There should be plenty of room for growth in this relationship, since both of you are able to voice your needs appropriately. While your Tiger might be more of a party animal than you, your similar need for independence should keep things interesting and fresh.
sign_match.TheGood: You and your Tiger guy are typically loving and protective of those you care for, especially each other. You’ll probably feel like he understands your needs and gives you the freedom you need when a bad mood strikes or you simply want to be alone. Even though you might not trust people easily, you could find it easy to confide in him and reveal your true self. Both of you follow your own hearts and need plenty of space. Your radical thinking will probably inspire him, and he gives you the loyalty you so crave in a partner. All in all, you two have plenty to celebrate in this relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: The trouble spot in your match up with a Tiger might result from his impulsiveness. Sometimes he can be flaky because he’s consumed by his hobbies and pursuits. You might be prone to worry about him while he’s off at skydiving class or traveling the Antarctic. But that’s just his way. Deep down, he may wish you would accompany him on his adventures, but he’ll be just as happy to go at it alone. As long as you feel cared for and tended to while he still gets his freedom, both of you should be content.
sign_match.Romance: Your Tiger man is somewhat of a Casanova, isn’t he?! This guy probably believes in chivalry and old-fashioned romance – with a touch of spontaneity. His grand sentimental gestures reveal a big heart and a bubbling passion in romance. He’s usually quick to fall in love, but just as quick to fall out, so be on your toes while you’re dating. Give him a reason to chase you – he’s probably got a heightened stalking instinct. In general, you should enjoy plenty of travel, adventure, and fun. With a Tiger, anything is possible!
sign_match.Sex: As two generous, warm-hearted lovers, your sex life should be satisfying and sensual. He’s not afraid to take the lead, and you’re probably more than willing to let him. There should be plenty of passion, but don’t expect him to hang around and cuddle after you’re done making love. He’s always jetting off to the next adventure, even if it’s just washing his car or making you breakfast. Give him plenty of space to run, and he’ll come bounding back to bed eventually.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rabbit can forge a fine, strong bond. Trust? Appreciation? Kindness? You’ll probably give each other enough of each to be warmly satisfied. Any reservations you have about giving your heart away should be diminished with this man’s warm heart and sensitive nature. Both of you are typically trustworthy, loyal, and value human connection above most things. A passionate, intimate bond is likely for two home-loving, communicative types like you. You’ll probably be able to rely on this guy for all the love and support you need. How nice.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang, he is Yin. While you might have different habits and lifestyles, it could work for instead of against you. You probably have more of a take-charge attitude than your Rabbit man, while he may be a bit passive and reactive. Since relationships usually need a nice balance of both Yin and Yang energies, you could find your differences to be complementary rather than combative.
sign_match.TheGood: With his hypersensitive and impressionable nature, this guy may appreciate your steady, strong one. Even though you can be prone to worries and self-doubts, you probably remain steadfast for the ones you love. That’s good, since he tends to need emotional support and a consistent connection with his partner. In turn, his loving affection can melt away your anxieties and boost your self-esteem. Perfect! Together, you can probably enjoy a quiet and harmonious existence as lovers and partners.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Be careful about feeding off each other’s moods in this relationship. Sometimes he can be a little high strung, and you might have a tendency for irritability or grouchiness. Since he  can sometimes find it hard to trust people, you’ll have to make sure he never gives you a reason to question his loyalty. You’ll have to work on listening to his poetic, idealistic ramblings and not writing him off as overly-emotional or impractical. A little mutual understanding and empathy should smooth over any rough patches in this match.
sign_match.Romance: With a Rabbit man around, you probably won’t be lacking romance. He’s one of the more feminine signs in the Chinese Zodiac, which means he’s totally in tune with the female species. He understands the importance of flowers on your birthday, romantic plans for Valentines Day, and remembering your anniversary. In general, he’ll be happy to fuss over you, which should feed your deepest needs for love and security. You’ll appreciate his tender gestures and reward him with the utmost loyalty and dedication.
sign_match.Sex: You and your Rabbit man will probably hit it off in the bedroom, but only after you’ve become great friends. You could have incredible sexual chemistry and enough of it to keep you horizontal for long bouts! As two home-loving creatures, you’ll probably spend hours in soul-gazing, limb-locking embraces. He’s a romantic lover and will probably be generous with his time and energy. You’ll return the favor, which should make for total satisfaction between the sheets. Enjoy!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you and your Dragon man will probably have to work at a happy union. In general, you couldn’t be more different! You’re known for being the strong, silent type, while he tends to be wild and outrageous. While there might be a strong pull here at first – since opposites attract – things could be tumultuous down the road. Your differences could eventually be the ruin of the relationship. The trick? Stay open-minded and flexible as much as possible.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: The Yang/Yang match here probably contributes to the source of your conflict. As Yang signs, you both are probably more opinionated, independent, and outspoken than Yin personalities. Relationships need a little bit of both energies to stay balanced. Without enough calming and peaceful Yin energy, it might feel like a battle zone in your home. If one of you has a more tolerant, receptive nature, you’ll probably get along better.
sign_match.TheGood: Despite your differences, you both are energetic and enthusiastic. Hooray! Sometimes opposite animals can get along nicely, so long as they learn from and respect each other. He might benefit from your nurturing, self-sacrificing nature. On the flip side, you could probably borrow from his optimism  and fearless attitude. If you can recognize and admire one another’s strengths, you have a fair shot. The key here is probably clear communication and a consistent effort to understand one another.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: He might have a tendency for the dramatic. As a practical person, this could get tiresome for you – you typically dislike it when others are overly flashy or showy. Your lifestyles are probably different too. While he’s out canoodling and partying, you’re curled up on the couch. If your Dragon wants someone who will support his every wild dream, he may need to look elsewhere. You’re usually a realist, if not somewhat pessimistic. He might have to tone things down a notch with you, while you may need to ramp up your energy level for him.
sign_match.Romance: One area that might be sparkling is the romance department! If you’re a typical Dog, you probably love feeling adored and secure– and he’ll profess his love like no other. He practically invented the meaning of romance, and he won’t run out of ways to show his affections. Fond of grand gestures and bold moves, he’ll probably be the one delivering flowers to your work or surprising you with tickets to the Bahamas on your birthday. He loves to succeed in making a woman feel special, and who wouldn’t enjoy the attention!?
sign_match.Sex: Underneath that scaly exterior is a sensitive soul. Your Dragon has insecurities and worries that might only come out when he’s being vulnerable in bed. He’s probably a fantastic, lover, however. With enough passion and heat for any woman, he’ll typically be sensitive, lustful, and romantic in bed. You probably won’t have any problem letting him be in charge, and he’ll love stepping up to the challenge. One thing is almost certain – you won’t forget a romp with this fire-breathing creature.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: So a magical Snake has entered your life? You two can probably have a satisfying partnership, even though you’re quite different creatures. This bond may provide you with strength and security, which are high priorities for each of you. He could be a person who can satisfy your deepest desires. And, since you both prefer the calm and quiet of home to a raucous or wild social life, you two can revel in domestic delights and a strong emotional connection.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yang-Yin match, you both probably have different temperaments and habits. He values order and peace more than most, while you may have an assertive or opinionated side. Yin people tend to be receptive, passive, and reactive, while your Yang energy could make you more active and strong-willed. The good thing is you probably have similar values, preferring depth and quality over the superficial. Just make sure there’s a balance of energy to keep things harmonious and steady.
sign_match.TheGood: It’s strange – you two are not very similar but also not entirely different in nature. Somehow, this probably works perfectly! You’re two signs that both tend to need alone time. You want space to deal with your changing moods, and he needs it to recharge his batteries. You’ll probably have a close bond while still maintaining separate lives. And, you can both set aside your trust issues in this match – you two can be highly devoted once you find the right partner. Music to your ears? Thought so.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If both of you have retreated in solitude, who will pick the kids up from school? After a fight, who’s going to apologize first? You two can both be passive, so makes sure you don’t sweep problems under the rug or forget the important things. Since you might be trusting to a fault, make sure he respects your loyalty. If you witnesses his flirtatious behavior or catch him in a lie, he’ll probably wound you for life. Your best bet is probably to stay in constant communication with each other – make sure nothing slips through the cracks.
sign_match.Romance: This guy is legendary for his slick moves, so he may lay it on thick! In fact, he’s probably got more sex appeal than any other sign in the Zodiac. He may be the outwardly flashy type or more subtle in his approach. Either way, he’ll probably pull you in slowly and quietly until he’s ready for the kill. His intensity won’t scare you, however – you’re both probably looking for that all-enveloping, consuming kind of love. You just might find it with him.
sign_match.Sex: Your Snake man sees sex as more of a dance than a sport. He likes to intertwine limbs, stare into your eyes, and penetrate your soul if he can. He wants to get inside you in more ways than one! As sexual partners, you’ll probably share the same slow-moving, sensual approach to the act. No race to the finish line here! Scented candles, silk sheets, and soft music will probably be a normal part of your bedroom behavior. Just make sure you get out of bed once in a while. With him, you may never want to leave!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: As another animal in your Love Triangle group, the Horse man is probably a good match for you. Hooray! If your guy is a typical, restless Horse, he probably can benefit from your dependable, down-to-earth nature. You’ll admire his guts and gusto, while totally content to stay in the background and hold down the fort. What’s more, you generally won’t have to give up your independence around him – he needs his alone time too. This could be a satisfying and fulfilling match for both of you.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yang in this match. These similar energies will probably work in your favor, giving the relationship all the passion and fortitude it needs to survive. As a Yang person, he might be more assertive, high-energy, and practical, which complements your steadfast and hard-working habits. Since you probably have similar ways of relating to the world, you should have the ability to understand one another’s strengths and weaknesses.
sign_match.TheGood: You might learn a lot from your rambunctious, free-spirited Horse. He’ll keep you entertained and in good spirits, and you’ll charm him with sincerity, honesty, and sense of humor. A strong friendship is likely at first, one which could develop into a long-lasting relationship or marriage. The best part of this match might be your similar need for alone time. Neither of you is likely to object when the other wants a bit of freedom. What a relief!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If you happen to get a little moody, he might meet with your dark side! One of the challenges of this relationship could be your different ways of dealing with emotional stress. He may have to work on sticking around when things get rocky, as his nature might tell him to flee. However, his up-and-leave approach could alienate you quickly. Things to work on? You might need to be more candid and less withholding. He might need to be a bit more sensitive and tactful.
sign_match.Romance: He’s probably got boundless enthusiasm and a hankering for adventure. Your first date might be an afternoon of skydiving or a weekend backpacking trip. The Horse man loves to run free, and he’ll be happy to take you along with him. You might prefer a quiet evening in, but you’ll probably have to convince him to take off his shoes and stay a while. The good news? Expect plenty of romantic gestures and spontaneous trips. You never know where he’ll take you!
sign_match.Sex: If you’ve made it to bed with a Horse, you know the name of the game: action. He won’t tire easily, so you’ll have to have stamina in the bedroom. Can you make like the energizer bunny? Deep down, this man generally wants emotional acceptance and romance. But don’t be surprised if he’s aggressive and a bit raunchy. He might like things fast and furious. The best way to keep your sex life interesting? Just make sure to keep him guessing. He could stray if things get dull – this man tends to hate routine.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You two could be a bit of a mismatch, but you may be able to work on a happy union. The main differences between you are your energy levels and interests. You’re probably a get-up-and-go type while he’s content to live within the depths of his imagination. You tend to thrive on physical activity, while he doesn’t mind being listless or stationary. The good news is you both appreciate a well-kempt, snuggly home. Guys with other animal signs might not be interested in a quiet domestic life with you, but your Sheep is. If you two can find common interests enough to stay bonded, this match can work.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Your man is a Yin sign, which means he’s probably a bit more reserved and introverted than you. As a Yang sign, you might be more active, ambitious, and even a little restless. In fact, you may be prone to anxiety or worry because of your changing moods and overactive mind. His Yin energy might help balance things out, since he brings a calming, peaceful energy to the relationship. While your opposing natures could clash, they may also provide the harmony needed for a balanced match.
sign_match.TheGood: If your personalities seem different, you’ll at least know how to handle each other with kindness. Along with your Sheep’s generosity and tolerance you’ll find a sensitive soul. Also, you two probably value similar things – beauty, peace, loyalty, and caring for the ones you love. You may act as his pillar of strength, while he can calm your nerves with that soothing Sheep nature. As long as your man can be tolerant and supportive when your willies set in, you can probably navigate things with grace and ease.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Do you have different ideas about what constitutes a fun Friday night? I thought so. Your Sheep man may need more social interaction than you. Conflicting interests could cause challenges if you can’t find enough in common. Another thing? Your direct and logical manner of dealing with him could be abrasive to his sensitive nature at times. And, since you can both be prone to mood swings, things could get ugly if you want your needs met at the same time.
sign_match.Romance: You’ll probably delight in a loving Sheep. He’s romantic, maybe in a unique way. He lives for romantic traditions like Valentine’s Day. Believe me, he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile the rest of the year too. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. But, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
sign_match.Sex: You two might hit it off in the bedroom even if a long-term relationship doesn’t seem likely. This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. Isn’t that every woman’s dream lover?! Toss your shield aside, cause he’ll penetrate your heart in spite of any defenses. Another thing? Don’t be confused if he’s mushy-gushy and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Monkey have some fundamental differences in your natures, but your similarly high energy levels and love of activity could make for an easy relationship. Since he’s always ready for a new adventure, you’ll have to hustle to keep up with him! While you probably have a more serious approach to life than your guy, you’re both eager to satisfy each other’s needs. He may require a fair amount of space to pursue his own pleasures, but that shouldn’t be a problem for you. As long as you have some common interests to keep you bonded, you two can probably enjoy a happy relationship.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang signs know how to have a good time! While you share the same energy orientation, you probably have different ways of expressing it. His personality is probably fun-loving, active, and ambitious, while you’re probably social, hard-working, and athletic. You’ll have plenty of adventures and excitement in this relationship. Since you’re probably a bit more subdued, you might be a good complement to your Monkey’s restless energy. Most likely, your personalities should be a good match.
sign_match.TheGood: As long as you can trust your Monkey man, things should be smooth sailing. This can be a fun, upbeat and lighthearted relationship centered on social outings and fun. What will make it work is probably your mutual need for independence. Neither of you should have a problem doing your own thing, and your relationship is probably strengthened by the space. You can provide loyalty and kindness while he brings vigor and excitement to the relationship.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: If he’s a typical Monkey, that gregarious and curious nature could mean he has potential to stray romantically. With high moral standards, you may not stand for anything less than total loyalty. Should you find a reason to mistrust him, you may shut down emotionally, and the relationship might be on the way to being over. He, on the other hand, may tire of your mood swings or occasional, cranky behavior. A little sensitivity and a solid foundation for trust should be all that’s needed to overcome problems.
sign_match.Romance: Your Monkey loves pleasure, and he’ll want to share it with you. Out of all the animals in the Zodiac, he gives the most presents. You’ll probably have more fun with him than any other guy if you can get past some moments of aggravation. Diamond necklace on your second date? Yep. Trip to Italy on your third? Absolutely! He loves showing off, which is a big bonus for the women he dates. He may not be ready for marriage as early as other men, but he’ll commit to you so long as you keep him entertained.
sign_match.Sex: What’s the best way to keep your Monkey man’s attention in the sack? Give him variety! His curiosity needs constant feeding, so coming up with new positions and techniques can be arousing for him. Sex with him should be playful, amusing, and fun – so long as neither of you gets bored.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster guy might have trouble communicating with one another. His insistence on being in control could clash with your similarly strong will. With his keen mind, he has an inherent need to critique, while you’re generally focused on keeping the peace. You may become cold or irritable if you think he’s going to lash out at any given moment. In turn, he might get tired of your moodiness or  ignoring his verbal thrusts.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yin; you are Yang. If you have a more upbeat, social, and active temperament, you may not find yourselves compatible. Yin energy probably makes him more of a brooder and a thinker, whereas you may be more outspoken and assertive. The good news is you’re both typically homebodies, so your opposing energy orientations might not be a huge hurdle in this relationship.
sign_match.TheGood: You can both be extremely loyal partners when you fall in love. Plus, your more diplomatic approach might be a good balance for his argumentative one! With the help of your cooperative, faithful nature, you might be able to smooth over your differences more easily. He can probably create the kind of orderly, well-kept, and cozy home you enjoy coming home to. And, you can offer that special breed of unconditional love and attention you’re so famous for.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You may tire of his nagging, especially if he bugs you about combing your hair or ironing your shirts. If you’re a typical Dog, you’re probably not interested in a lot of pretense. Since you both have high standards, albeit in different ways, you may find it difficult to fulfill each other’s needs or even meet in the middle. Also, you might want to hide away at a quiet retreat while he wants to see and be seen in London. You’ll have to compromise when it comes to your shared activities and vacation plans.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rooster is a power player in the romance department. This man loves the chase, and you’re no easy catch! That independent spirit of yours will probably motivate him to pin you down. If he does manage to catch you for a date, he’ll treat it like a conquest. Try to be well-groomed and articulate around him – he’ll probably be quick to point out if your makeup is smudged or you aren’t up to date on current politics. Look good, smell good, and make sure you impress him with your wit.
sign_match.Sex: What can I say about his sexual preferences? A little strange, to say the least. He may be into power plays in the bedroom – wanting to control and dominate the female species. Some might accuse him of being misogynistic, but it may just be his thirst for power in any form. Keep him guessing and you’ll ensure things stay interesting in bed. Another thing? Appeal to his fetishes. It’s likely he’s got more than one unusual sexual obsession.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two Dogs? Things should be cozy with one of your own kind! You both have warm, stable, and idealistic natures. In general, you will probably seek one another’s opinions and value each other’s advice. Together you can typically forge a strong and upbeat relationship since you both value harmony and peace on the home front. As long as you regard each other with respect, you will probably become a solid duo with lasting potential.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Two Yang personalities can sometimes cause friction in relationships. However, in this match, your similar energies might be in harmony. Yang energy brings out the active, thought-oriented, ambitious qualities you both share. You’ll probably inspire each other and support one another’s goals. Just make sure you cultivate some Yin energy too—your match might need a peaceful, calming influence from time to time.
sign_match.TheGood: The great thing about you and your Dog man is your shared value system. Loyalty? Dedication? Justice? Both of you stick to your beliefs and have strong convictions about doing what’s right. This should make your relationship a fair, compassionate, and righteous one! You probably won’t have to worry about bad behavior on his part—he’s just as faithful as you. You’ll both enjoy a stable and nurturing home life and be happy to share with each other.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: There may be some moody or emotional spells in this relationship. Both of you can become irritable or grouchy at the turn of a dime — sometimes without good reason. You both simply require your alone time, but your needs could clash when one of you wants companionship and the other doesn’t. Also, make sure you consult each other when you’re making important decisions. Neither of you will fare well if you feel like you’re being left out.
sign_match.Romance: Even if your Dog man isn’t a die-hard romantic, you’ll probably appreciate his sweet-natured sentiments. He’s the guy who offers you the last seat left on the subway, makes you a sandwich to take to work in the morning, and picks up your dry cleaning without being asked. He may not be over-the-top with romantic gestures, but he’ll probably do the things that really matter. Plus, it’s likely this guy will be loyal. If he seems slow to warm up to you, be patient. He can be a bit mistrusting at first, but if you prove your worth, he’ll stay by your side in the long run.
sign_match.Sex: Your Dog man will generally want to be your friend before he hops in the sack with you. He can be terribly suspicious of women, so he’ll want to make sure you won’t hurt him first. As a lover, he can be generous and fastidious. He’ll probably focus on your pleasure first and his own later. He can be sweet and seductive, but don’t give it up right away. The courting period is important to him, so make sure you let him chase you a bit before hunkering down between the sheets.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Though you may have dissimilar personalities, you’ll probably find it easy to get along with your Pig man. Then again, he gets along with everyone! You two both tend to be agreeable, loyal, and willing to compromise when necessary. He might have a more passive  personality than you, but will keep you entertained with his good humor and wide circle of friends. And you can offer the faithfulness and nurturing he seeks in a mate. As long as you both remain tolerant, committed, and sensitive to one another, this match could be fulfilling for both.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You are Yang and he is Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. His receptive and agreeable nature can complement your opinionated, logical one. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of his calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different ways of approaching life, you can probably appreciate one another’s differences.
sign_match.TheGood: You two are some of the calmer animals in the Zodiac. You both prefer a quiet, tranquil home environment over rowdy social events. Your home will probably be everyone’s favorite destination for dinner parties, summer barbeques, and holiday gatherings. Your Pig man can do wonders to lift your spirits when you’re down, and you can provide the kind of rational thinking he needs when life seems overwhelming. All in all, your differences are probably complementary, and your similarities should make your match warm and supportive.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: What makes your relationship work might make it difficult as well. Your Dog guy may be serious more than you like, and he might think you like to play too much. Another area of friction might be your different temperaments—you tend to be logical and reserved, while your Pig is subjective and gushes forth his emotions. You can both be outspoken if you’re provoked, so be careful about hurling insults or wounding each other with words during the occasional misunderstanding.
sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might match well with your spunk and passion. Just make sure you don’t break his heart – he won’t be quick to recover.
sign_match.Sex: Your Pig is a true romantic! He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. Appeal to his senses to awaken his sexual energy. This guy loves good food, soft linens, and heavenly smells. As sensitive and sensual lovers, you two might find sexual rapture between the sheets.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: In matters of the heart, you and your Rat can make an upbeat, happy pair. Both of you treat your loved ones with generosity and warmth, and you each typically have idealistic natures. You can appreciate his wit and sense of humor, while he will benefit from your sensual, selfless nature. With his good taste and your luxurious leanings, you’ll probably enjoy the finer things in life. Not to mention, you should have a solid and meaningful friendship. This man will typically treat you like the gem you are. Wonderful.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yang; you’re Yin. Since your energies are different, this might make things challenging. He tends to be more assertive, outgoing, and action-oriented. You, on the other hand, are probably more of a passive, receptive, quiet type. He’s bold and boisterous, while you are more curious and sensitive. Can you make your differences complementary? If you can find harmony in your different habits, you could make it work.
sign_match.TheGood: Life could be one big party when you two join forces. Energy? Optimism? There’s plenty of both to keep your relationship buoyant. You may share an intellectual connection in addition to a strong physical pull. He’ll love your positive, agreeable nature, while you’ll feel safe and protected under his watch. Your Rat man will work hard to give you the life of luxury – and that’s music to your ears! You, in turn, will be happy to give him that special breed of love and tenderness that only a Pig can.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Both of you might find it hard to keep your feet on the ground. It could be difficult for each of you to practice restraint when it comes to impulsive decisions. The stability of your union might need some work, as he’ll lead a busy life and you could get cranky when he’s gone all the time. You might end up blaming each other for your failures when, in reality, you probably have many of the same faults. Practice prudence and you’ll probably stand a better chance.
sign_match.Romance: Your Rat man is fun but a tad unpredictable when it comes to romance. He’s probably looking for someone smart, witty, and ambitious with whom he can banter and talk until exhaustion. More than a hot body or pretty face, this guy is usually looking for an intellectual equal and friend in his mate. You’ll probably keep him entertained with your inherent smarts and quirky sense of humor, and you can expect plenty of adventures with this guy. Get ready to explore, expand, and try new things.
sign_match.Sex: The bedroom should be a sensual play land with your Rat around! He’ll probably take the lead and you’ll be  glad to play the submissive role. As a generous and giving lover, he’ll make your pleasure a high priority. He may be a bit too eager, so slow him down with your sensual, soft style. If you ask for what you want, he’ll see your sexual satisfaction as another mission to be accomplished -- and he won’t stop until he’s succeeded!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Ox can be a good match, but you may be a sedentary pair. When you come together, both of your sensualist natures are heightened -- making food, leisure, lovemaking, and sleeping high priorities! There’s nothing wrong with that, but you may need a bit of spunk to keep things interesting. Your Ox man’s calm, grounded nature can complement your positive, pleasant one. You can help draw him out of his shell while he offers the stability and faithfulness you need in a man.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of your signs are Yin oriented. What does that mean? You’ll generally approach life the same way. Yin energy people are usually receptive, intuitive, calm, and perhaps a bit introverted. You probably prefer to stay under the radar and observe things instead of being at the center of action. Most likely, he’s more passive, tolerant, and giving – like you. Since you’re of the same energy orientation, you stand to understand each other well.
sign_match.TheGood: You two can probably bring out the best in each other. He appreciates you for your selfless, devoted spirit, while you love him for his hard-working, loyal nature. You probably won’t find much to argue about since you understand and forgive one another’s faults easily. That big, strong, dominant protector figure you probably look for in a man is the essence of your Ox.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While he loves sensual pleasures as much as you, he may scold you for spending his hard-earned money on hot-stone massages or a $200 bottle of wine. Wish he were more demonstrative and emotionally available? Thought so. He may be cold and logical when you need warm nurturing. With your tolerant and forgiving nature, however, you should be able to help him loosen up a bit. He, in turn, can be the disciplinary when you’re being too extravagant.
sign_match.Romance: Fairy tales and romantic gestures? Probably not with this guy. You might have to trade in the glass slippers for a pair of sneakers, get a job, and buy your own castle. Your Ox may not be terribly romantic. However, underneath his tough exterior is a caring, sensitive man. He may not lavish you with expensive gifts, but he’ll change your oil and make sure you have warm blankets on the bed. There’s a passion that runs deep below the surface, but it could take time to tap. Luckily, you may be just the person to do so.
sign_match.Sex: Now, here’s where things get interesting! You might think your Ox would be a snooze fest in bed, but you and he could be a good sexual match. Your sensuality and tenderness between the sheets can break down his carefully constructed defenses. He’s probably not super suave or even an experienced lover, but his raw energy is his own brand of sexy. He’ll probably want to be the one in charge, and you’ll love being dominated by this beast of a man.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Tiger man probably embody that opposites attract phenomenon. There’s potential here for a lasting relationship if you both can learn to be flexible. You’re probably happy to stay at home and hold down the fort, which is great for him since he may be a spontaneous wanderer type. He’ll admire your pure spirit, and you’ll love his spitfire personality. If he’s able to give you enough attention and foster a good connection, you’ll be more than willing to compromise for him.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yang while you’re Yin. You probably tend to be more interested in observing, listening, and internalizing while he’s inspired by action, challenge, and doing. You approach life differently but can complement each other because of it. You may prefer to stay at home on a Saturday night while he’s off gallivanting with friends. In relationships, there should be both Yin and Yang energies to help balance things out, so this match might work well.
sign_match.TheGood: Even though you two are incredibly different, this may be the reason you get along so well. Where you’re weak, he’s strong. Where he’s weak, you’re strong. Perfect. Since he’s generally optimistic, he’ll appreciate your upbeat personality and do-gooder nature. You admire his zest for life and aren’t threatened by a dominant, powerful man. If you have kids, you’ll probably be content with a traditional, stay-at-home lifestyle while he’s off bringing home the bacon.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You might not be able to offer the excitement and adventure that your Tiger craves. He tends to be utterly changeable in nature, while you pretty much need a routine. While you enjoy a peaceful, happy home and company to share it with, he’s content living out of a suitcase and being a loner. Problems could pop up if he doesn’t nurture and maintain a strong connection with you. And, you could find it unsettling if he’s always off doing his own thing.
sign_match.Romance: Your man can be bold when it comes to romancing the woman he loves. No halfhearted efforts here! He’ll be the one throwing pebbles at your window in the wee hours of the morning, sending you embarrassing bouquets of flowers at work, and declaring his love on the jumbotron during a baseball game. He certainly might make you blush. Even though it’s different than your style, his sweet sentiments will probably go over well with you. They’ll give you plenty of reassurance of his affections and reason enough to trust him.
sign_match.Sex: A Tiger and Pig in bed can have one happy romp! His lovemaking style is probably nothing like yours, but you’ll like it. Fast, furious, passionate – he’s always ready to pounce! You have your own brand of deep sensuality, and probably move slower than him. But, your differences will probably mesh well between the sheets. He could benefit from learning the art of slow seduction, while you might have fun unleashing your wild side. Go ahead. See what happens.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Oh, goody! You and the Rabbit are like two peas in a pod. This man gets a lot of pleasure from spoiling his loved ones, and you’re no exception. Since you probably need an emotionally strong companion, you’ll delight in his protection and guidance. You’ll probably make each other feel very well-loved and cared for. Since you’re both forgiving, honorable, and sensual, there could be a bond forged here that lasts a long time. He’ll work hard at making you happy, and you’ll give plenty of love in return.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You two are both Yin signs, which means you probably share similar dispositions and approach life with the same morals and values. Yin people are thought to be more passive, tolerant, easy-going, observant, and mellow. He’s probably watching life go by carefully, rather than jumping in the middle of it – like you. Neither of you tend to get aggressive or dominant. You both want peace and harmony in your relationships.
sign_match.TheGood: Where to start?! Your Rabbit man seems to complement you in all the right ways. He gives you the love and protection you crave. He helps you stay grounded and focused. He understands your flaws and loves you anyway. What more could you ask for? In return, you probably calm his nerves and shower him with affection. As two luxury-loving sensualists, you two will probably buy a little Italian villa in the Sicilian countryside and live happily ever after.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: A challenge in this relationship – one of few – could be money. With his love of the finer things and your habit for indulgence, you might run out of cash before you know it. Keep a lid on your savings and make sure to track a good budget. He might find some of your grandiose ideas a bit zany, while you may think he’s too uptight. However, disagreements should be easy to work out since you’re both compassionate and understanding creatures.
sign_match.Romance: As a Pig, you probably appreciate the art of seduction more than most. The dinners, the presents, the surprises – nothing makes you happier. Lucky you, since your Rabbit man understands this completely. He can be picky about the women he dates – he does have high standards. But, as long as you’re classy, well-groomed, and intelligent, you should tickle his fancy. He’ll mull over where to take you for dinner for days on end. He’ll fuss over what suit to wear and what type of flowers to bring. He wants to makes things perfect, and you’ll appreciate the consideration.
sign_match.Sex: You and your Rabbit will probably share a sensual, heartfelt connection between the sheets. Since you’re both romantics, lovemaking will be more about the merging of souls than purely a physical act. He may bring his perfectionist tendencies to the bedroom, so make sure you’re clean, you smell good, and look delicious. He may not be the most inventive lover, but he’ll typically be sweet, well-mannered, and generous. And that’s probably enough for you.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You might feel like you’ve discovered a rare species with a Dragon man! He may seem like everything you could possibly want – strong, protective, generous, and loyal. You’ll probably be fine letting him lead, and he adores being respected and worshipped. You tend to have just enough in common but also several differences – a good balance for any couple. He will probably provide you with enough stimulation and  adventure, but also that tender love you’re looking for. The best of both worlds!
sign_match.YinYangDescription: With other signs, a Yang/Yin match up can be disastrous. But, you and your Dragon probably complement each other where you’re different.  As a Yin sign, you’re typically more sensitive, intuitive, and passive. Yang energy can make him the opposite – bold, fiery, and active. If the relationship is working, you’ll balance each other out. Even though you approach life differently, there’s mutual respect here.
sign_match.TheGood: There should be plenty of extravagances in this relationship! Good food, luxurious vacations, fine furniture – you both love opulence. This guy will like that you won’t try to over-power him or compete. You’ll generally share in his successes, praise him, and turn a blind eye to his faults. He’ll provide plenty of excitement and passion to the relationship, keeping you entertained with his charming sense of humor and unique personality.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You can be a bit decadent, so he may have to nag you to get out of bed or turn off the TV. Since he can get lost in his wild fantasies and ambitions, he might need some grounding from your sensible nature. He can injure you with his occasional brash manners, but you’ll generally forgive easily. If he doesn’t want to deal with a cranky Pig, he’ll have to make sure he’s sweet and generous. As long as you feel adored and he feels respected, things should be fine.
sign_match.Romance: The mythical Dragon practically invented romance! He doesn’t do anything without 100% effort. However, his overt and sometimes embarrassing displays of affection might seem superficial to you. But, you’ll probably love his good taste and eye for style. Get ready to travel to foreign lands and dabble in unusual pursuits with this man. He can generally persuade you to do just about anything!
sign_match.Sex: Never a dull moment! You both have very different sexual styles that might fit together well. He can be a generous and emotional lover, but also has a deep fire that translates into physical passion. Your quieter style will suit him well, since he loves to dominate!  Generally a goal-oriented guy, he’ll probably take seriously the task of pleasing you. He has boundless energy, which means endurance between the sheets. With his magnetism and your sensuality, you two could ignite serious sparks.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Snake have enough in common that your coupledom would seem destined for success. It can be a fair match, as long as you truly understand each other. As opposite signs in the Chinese Zodiac, you’re probably drawn to one another like moths to the flame, but you could get burned! Your man is powerfully charming, intelligent, and has a wicked sense of humor. The two of you can probably spend long periods of time together – laughing, bantering, and entertaining guests.  With some work, things might be satisfying for you both. The question is how long will it last?
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Since you share a Yin energy orientation, you and your Snake should be on the same wavelength. While neither of you have weak personalities, you probably approach life in an easy-going, receptive way. Generally, you both see things subjectively and navigate challenges without fighting or getting aggressive. This shared approach could bode well for your relationship, as long as your similarities don’t cause a butting of heads.
sign_match.TheGood: Sensual delights will probably drive this relationships. Laughter, food, music, sex, travel – you’ll typically have a ball. He’ll probably adore your quirky sense of humor, innate compassion, and bright mind. You, in turn, can feel more grounded and stable in his powerful presence. He won’t have to worry about trusting you – an issue many Snakes have -- since you tend to be faithful no matter what. In general, you two have a lot in common that lends to fun, connection, and prosperity in love.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Communication might get tricky when you want to talk freely about your feelings. It’s not that he’s incapable, but your Snake might struggle with your “let’s hash it out and move on” approach. He probably needs more time and space to process things, so make sure to give him the chance when he wants to fly solo for a bit. He better not take advantage of your trusting nature, either. In all your earnest goodness, you can be biting and cruel if you’re hurt in love.
sign_match.Romance: You don’t have to worry about lack of romance with this man! He invented the meaning of charm, which should delight you silly. He’ll try to woo you with candlelit dinners, deep discussions, and soul-penetrating eye contact. This man typically wants to connect, and you could be a perfect fit. Remember not to rush him along – he does things in his own time, especially romance. Since he can be secretive, he’ll probably surprise you by revealing himself slowly over time. Let him go at his own pace.
sign_match.Sex: There’s something about this man that makes your toes curl. It’s likely there will be a strong attraction between you two since you’re opposites on the Zodiac. But does it translate into sexual sparks? Oh yes! Your bedroom style is possibly a bit different than your Snake man’s, but your connection will probably be out of this world. He’s slow and sensuous. You’re romantic and tender. Ahh…sexual bliss. You generally won’t have to work too hard to be satisfied in the sack with this guy. He knows exactly what he’s doing and how to do it.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two pleasure-seekers can always have a good time! The Horse man is social, happy-go-lucky, and friendly – like you. You two might be the hottest couple in town, what with his gregarious nature and your sweet charm. Since you both understand the meaning of compromise, you’ll probably be able to smooth over differences easily. It won’t all be rosy, however, since your lifestyles might be quite different. You’re probably a homebody while he’s a roamer. If you can meet in the middle, things might work out well.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, you’re probably easygoing, peaceful, and calm. Yang energy typically makes him the get up and go type, which might bring conflict over what constitutes a fun Saturday night. If you can admire each other’s strengths and give credit where it’s deserved, you’ll be much better off. Any relationship needs both Yin and Yang energy to stay harmonious. Try to strike the balance.
sign_match.TheGood: You can probably keep up with your Horse man in your own way. He’s a social person and typically well-liked by everyone. Is your calendar always full? It probably will be with him. You two love a good time and always know how to find one. Also, neither of you tend to have unrealistic ideas about relationships, which might make things easier. Some good laughs, witty conversation, and sensual indulgences will probably be plentiful with your Horse man.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: While your different natures might be complementary, they can also cause conflict. You’re probably not as free-spirited or spontaneous as him, so settling down together might be a long-standing battle. Also, both of you might throw caution to the wind just a bit too much. Parties, social functions, and vacations might keep you entertained, but who’s going to pay the bills and do the laundry? Staying practical and flexible will probably be necessary in the long run.
sign_match.Romance: With his impulsive nature and your romantic tendencies, love at first sight is probably bound to happen. You won’t have to worry about sitting home on a Saturday night with your Horse guy. Trotting around town, you’ll hit up all the social events with style. He’ll probably take you on plenty of outdoor adventures, so make sure you show off your rugged side. This match should be the envy of other couples – you’re witty, charming, fun, and smart, plus you have a blast together. Have fun!
sign_match.Sex: Nothing revs up his engine like variety. Don’t try the same tricks twice with this guy, and do expect him to surprise you. As long as you can keep things interesting, you’ll hold his attention. That should be an easy task for you – Pigs are usually a little kinky. The sex could be pretty sweltering with your sensuality and his energy. But, make sure you bring your intimate behavior out of the bedroom too. The thrill of doing it in unusual places will keep him from getting bored.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: The Sheep man is part of your Love Triangle group. This means he’s probably a friend, lover, and soul mate  all rolled into one! You two should get along fantastically in a sensual and simple manner. Both are genuinely concerned with the well-being of the other, and each of you is a warm and generous-hearted creature. This man will probably appreciate your quirks and bring a few of his own into the relationship, but it will add flavor to this already delicious match. All in all, you can make each other feel safe, secure, and adored.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: Both of you are Yin signs. In some cases, this could make love a snooze, but your Sheep will generally have an interesting and lively personality. His Yin energy makes him tolerant, peace-loving, and well-liked because of his happy-go-lucky nature. Your Yin energy brings a sensual, creative spin to the relationship, which can heighten your spiritual and emotional connection. Since you both tend to be passive and receptive, you’ll probably have an easy time communicating and resolving conflict.
sign_match.TheGood: Your Sheep man will generally give his best to you, and you to him. Generosity? Passion? Sensitivity? He’s probably got them all, and then some. He understands your delicate nature and wouldn’t do anything to deliberately rattle you. You can appreciate his kindness and silly sense of humor like no other. As two people who thrive in sensually stimulating environments, your home will probably be the mecca for entertaining family and friends with decadent food, lovely furnishings, and positive vibrations.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Are you both dreamers? If so, you could find it difficult to focus on the practical side of life. A messy home, forgotten appointments, or unachieved goals might pile up if you aren’t careful. Your Sheep man can be a tad scatterbrained, so make sure you stay on top of the important stuff. In turn, he’ll have to be supportive of your emotional ups and downs. The biggest obstacles might be the result of too much indulgence. Careful not to drain your bank account on the finer things in life!
sign_match.Romance: You’ll delight in a loving Sheep, who’s romantic in his own unique way. He may not adhere to traditions – he tends to follow his own path – but he’ll give you plenty of reasons to smile. He’ll pick you a bouquet of wild flowers or hand-write a love note. If you’re lactose intolerant, he’ll bake you a dairy-free cake for your birthday. This guy is good at interesting, tender surprises. Although, he can be forgetful, so make sure you remind him of your anniversary – and even your dinner plans.
sign_match.Sex: This holistically-minded guy will probably approach sex from a mind-body-spirit stance. He’s not just interested in getting it done quick and dirty. He wants to experience an emotional connection via a physical union. As a sensitive Pig, you’ll probably think he’s your sexual soul mate. He can penetrate your heart in spite of defenses, so make sure he’s trustworthy before you hop in the sack and get attached. Another thing? He can be pretty kinky. Don’t be confused if he’s mushy-gushy and raunchy at the same time. That’s just him.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and the Monkey can have a lot of fun together. Both are generally happy , positive types – not to mention sensualists! While you love fine foods, luxurious surroundings, and simple pleasures, he’s drawn to party atmospheres and exciting travels. What a combo! You both tend to live for the pursuit of pleasure, and your Monkey man should be a loving, delightful companion with plenty of sparkle and humor to keep you entertained.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: As a Yin sign, you’re probably opposite in nature to your assertive, high-energy, fast-paced Monkey. However, your different temperaments might actually complement each other. While you’re known for being easy-going and peace-keeping, he’s probably a bit more strong-willed and spunky. You may have different habits and ways of approaching conflict, but your energies can work well together with some understanding and compassion.
sign_match.TheGood: There’s no one like your Monkey when it comes to generosity and fun! He’s usually happy to give everything to the one he loves, and you’ll appreciate his warm-hearted nature. You’ll probably share a similar sense of humor, delighting in the silly or quirky things in life. Plus, you both love pleasure more than most, which means luxury and happiness will be a priority in this relationship. This guy is usually smart, a good communicator, and eager to please. Lucky you!
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: You may be a bit too lethargic or home-loving for a Monkey’s taste. While you’re probably content to stay at home with close friends and family, he loves the high-energy of social situations and parties. Since he’ll typically leave without you if you’re not interested in going out , you may tire of his different lifestyle. As someone who usually values connection and emotional sustenance, you’ll get drained if he’s not around to give it. The key with you two is probably compromise. Agree to spend Friday out if he’s willing to spend Saturday night in.
sign_match.Romance: There’s no one quite like your Monkey man to make a girl feel spoiled. He may be the most generous sign in the Chinese Zodiac when it comes to romancing the object of his affection. Living in the lap of luxury? This should go over well with you! He probably won’t be stingy with his time, resources, or help, so long as you act classy and refined around his posse. He may not be the best person to spill your feelings to – he’s probably not very mushy – gushy – but at least you can count on plenty of romantic surprises.
sign_match.Sex: Most women have fun between the sheets with a Monkey. Why wouldn’t you, after all? He’s playful, amusing, and lighthearted in bed. However, your style is probably more serious than his happy-go-lucky approach. You may not get the emotional or spiritual connection with him, but he’ll typically be generous and eager to please. In fact, he can probably help you lighten up a little, while you might unearth his sensual side. Another thing? He can be wildly inventive, so don’t be surprised if he wants to try something different. Your best bet is probably to let him experiment!

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: You and your Rooster guy may need some mutual understanding to get along smoothly since your differences aren't entirely complementary. With your peace-loving nature, you might find him to be a bit cantankerous. And, as someone who is usually practical and conservative, he may not understand your free-spirited, indulgent ways. Despite all this, however, you can probably forge a strong bond if you respect each other’s different natures. You  can act as the strong leader, while your Pig man will probably be happy to follow.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yin signs, but maybe in different ways. You are probably somewhat of a people pleaser who can easily go with the flow. His Yin energy typically makes him more passive and introverted. While you may have similar temperaments, you might fare better if one of you is a more assertive, active type. Watch out for passive-aggressive behavior and make sure you’re being forthright with each other when dealing with conflict.
sign_match.TheGood: You tend to be a dedicated, generous partner, which can bode well with his loyal, serious nature. If you two are in a relationship, your affable and giving personality will probably be the reason for your compatibility. This guy loves praise and power, which you’ll easily give him. Another good thing is your mutual ability for hard work. Together, you two can build something great if you can each appreciate one another’s differences.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Your Rooster may mistake your sensual nature for laziness. Since it’s not likely he tolerates idleness or frivolity very well, he might get irritated with your love of pleasure. On the surface, you’ll probably be understanding and receptive to his complaints or nagging, but enough criticism will eventually make you snap. If he blames or badger you one too many times, look out. Both of you can be vindictive when you feel threatened or injured.
sign_match.Romance: The flamboyant Rooster stands out in a crowd. He’s the one who looks dashingly sharp, impresses you with his wit, and teases you relentlessly as a form of flirting. He tends to look for a feminine ideal – someone who looks flawless and acts impeccably. But, he’ll probably be content as long as he can get his way with you! The best way to get this guy’s attention is probably to ignore him. He’ll come beating down your door, demanding a date. The passive, coy approach should come quite naturally to you while working wonders on him!
sign_match.Sex: Your Rooster man loves to be in control. His sexual style is a bit dramatic and intense. He may be one of those guys who’ll withhold your pleasure for the sake of torture. A bit punishing and sadistic, you might not find his sweet and sensitive side right away! It’s there – but very deep down. Your best bet? Agree to play his games and he’ll reward you with the satisfaction and affection you’re looking for.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Though you may have dissimilar personalities, you’ll probably find it easy to get along with your Dog man. Then again, you get along with everyone! You two both tend to be agreeable, loyal, and willing to compromise when necessary. He might have a more passive  personality than you, but will keep you entertained with his active mind. You can offer the faithfulness and nurturing he seeks in a mate. As long as you both remain tolerant, committed, and sensitive to one another, this match could be fulfilling for both.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: He is Yang and you are Yin. Sometimes a relationship with opposite energies is tumultuous, but this match could be harmonious. Your receptive and agreeable nature can complement his opinionated, logical one. With enough fast and aggressive Yang energy, things should stay exciting in love. Additionally, a good dose of your calm Yin energy can smooth over the wrinkles. Even though you have different ways of approaching life, you can probably appreciate one another’s strengths and weaknesses.
sign_match.TheGood: You two are some of the calmer animals in the Zodiac. You both prefer a quiet, tranquil home environment over rowdy social events. Your house will probably be everyone’s favorite destination for dinner parties, summer barbeques, and holiday gatherings. You can do wonders to lift his spirits when he’s down, and he’ll provide the kind of rational thinking you need when life seems overwhelming. All in all, your differences are probably complementary, and your similarities should make your match warm and supportive.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: What makes your relationship work might make it difficult as well. Your Dog guy may be serious more than you like, and he might think you like to play too much. Another area of friction might be your different temperaments—he tends to be logical and reserved, while you are subjective and gush forth your emotions. You can both be outspoken if you’re provoked, so be careful about hurling insults or wounding each other with words during the occasional misunderstanding.
sign_match.Romance: You might not get fireworks and magic with a Dog man, but he’ll pay close attention to your needs. He’s the kind of guy who will open your car door, bring you fresh flowers at work, and be there for you when no one else is. Instead of fast and passionate, being courted by him will probably feel slow and comfortable. And just when you’re feeling a bit bored, he’ll surprise you with something so tender and sweet you’ll remember why you fell for him in the first place.
sign_match.Sex: With a solid friendship, sex with your Dog man might be quite fulfilling. He may not be the most innovative lover, but he’s probably plenty willing to satisfy you in bed. He’s got a hearty appetite for sex, and you’ll probably take turns being in charge. Just be careful with his ego. This guy can bruise easily, so be gentle with his feelings and give him every reason to trust you. His traditional side may clash with your kinky one, but it could also result in some interesting bedroom play if you’re both willing to compromise.

sign_match.GeneralMatchDescription: Two Pigs in a pod? Things could get tricky! The main challenge in this match will probably revolve around your similar natures. As two emotional, pleasure-seeking, and sensitive souls, you may have trouble finding direction and organization together. Most likely, one of you will have to be more serious and logical than the other to make it work. Though you might be attracted to one another because of shared interests or values, a long-lasting connection could be hard to maintain.
sign_match.YinYangDescription: You’re both Yin signs, which means you’ll have similar habits and traits. This might bring you closer but it could also be your demise. Since you both are more passive, non-confrontational, and subjective than Yang people, you may have trouble making decisions or dealing with conflict. Things could get swept under the rug because neither of you want to deal with them. You’ll probably do better if one of you has a stronger, more forceful personality.
sign_match.TheGood: No one can enjoy creature comforts more than another Pig! You two will probably live a life of sensual pleasure, while still working hard toward your own dreams and goals. As compassionate, loving souls, your bond might resemble a fairy tale romance – you each idealize love and will generally give everything to a partner. You’ll probably be a popular pair, always entertaining friends and coming to the rescue of everyone in your circle.
sign_match.TheNotSoGood: Forgive the pun, but is your home a pig sty? You two might need to hire a housekeeper. While you’re at it, get a professional organizer, nanny, and live-in cook. That is, unless one of you happens to have organizational skills. Structure and routine may be lost in the lives of you and your Pig. Also, your mutual need for emotional support could cause tension when you’re both cranky. You’ll probably have to work hard at staying grounded, focused, and logical in order to maintain the relationship.
sign_match.Romance: While he is probably no Don Juan, he’s very in tune with the female species. He’ll court you slowly and carefully, making sure you’re trustworthy and kind. After time, you’ll notice how attentive and intuitive he is. He knows what you need, when you need it, and wants to fall in love with you passionately and wholly. His tenderness and sensitivity might are matched by yours. Just make sure you aren’t rushing into things. As two romantics, you can both get swept away easily.
sign_match.Sex: Your Pig guy is a curious blend of sweet and salty. He’s sensitive, but quirky – especially in the bedroom. He’ll want to wine and dine you before he takes you off on his white horse to a bed scattered with rose petals. He can be more attached to fantasies than anything else, so don’t be surprised if he gets cranky when he finds out you’re not perfect. But, he’ll forgive it quickly. If you can appeal to his sensual side, you’ll have him hooked.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You and your Ox are potential soul mates! Both of you are probably sentimental and vulnerable creatures, especially when it comes to dealing with each other. With shared values of consistency, security, and family, you two will probably have a strong bond that gives you both what you need. It won't be perfect, but it  might be pretty close!
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. It's actually normal to have a soul mate that's a best friend, family member, or someone other than your partner. An Ox person may play a significant role in your life, or will do so in the future. Try to pay attention to any Oxen that cross your path -- and the lessons they may be there to teach you.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Good news! You and the Rat are candidates for a soul mate match. You’re both sensitive, hard-working, and family-oriented. You’ll provide the stability and support for your Rat partner’s many ideas and ambitions. In return, you’ll have someone who understands you. Your strengths match up well – you’ll have comfort, security, and compatibility here.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you’re probably not soul mates. Don’t fret, however, since that’s normal. The person you spend your lifetime with may not be your soul mate. Look around you and see what role Rat sign people are playing in your life. That’s where you’re most likely to find what you seek. If a Rat hasn’t made an appearance in your life yet, you might meet one sometime soon! This person could teach you an important lesson -- perhaps one you've been needing to learn for a while.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: Your Pig guy could be your soul mate. You two are connected by a warm, generous, and open-hearted energy that is life-giving and sustaining for both. You tend to reflect each other's weaknesses and nurture each other's strengths, allowing for growth and evolution as individuals. You can probably live, work, and play together in harmony.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you may not be soul mates, but that doesn't mean you're not meant to be together and learn from one another. A Pig person may eventually appear in your life to teach you something important. Pay attention to what this person might offer you in terms of your own growth as an individual.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You and your Dog guy are candidates for a soul mate match! It's possible you've traveled through space and time to be with each other -- over and over again. You probably share a deep spiritual and emotional connection that feeds and nourishes you both. Helping each other grow will probably be the main reason for your connection.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You may not be soul mates, but that doesn't have to be a bad thing. It's actually normal to not share a soul mate connection with your partner. Are there other Dog people in your life that play important roles? Look around and see what kind of influence a Dog person has on your life, if any. If you don't know one yet, you'll probably meet one soon.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You and the Rooster are good candidates for a soul mate match! Together, you give one another precisely what each needs to thrive. Although you probably lead independent lives, you rely on each other in a unique and sensitive way. You each can help the other to evolve as an individual in the parameters of you relationship.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may be with someone who is a family member or friend instead. Also, Roosters may be playing an important role in your life. Take notice of these people and what they might be here to teach you.

soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You and your Monkey are quite possibly soul mates! There's probably a strong, consuming attraction here that's characterized by a feeling that you can't live without the other person. Even if you stray from each other, you'll probably end up back together in the end. You two probably have important goals you need to accomplish together.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: Well, you’re probably not soul mates. Don’t fret, however, since that’s normal. The person you spend your lifetime with may not be your soul mate. soul_mate.SoulMateDescription: You and your Sheep guy are potential soul mates. This match is the essence of opposites attract. You each can give what the other lacks. Your energies probably blend together perfectly, creating a give and take that fosters love and understanding. You two tend to believe in one another and support each other completely.
soul_mate.NotSoulMateDescription: You're probably not soul mates, but don't worry. Your soul mate connection may be with someone who is a family member or friend instead. You should know a Sheep sign person is or will be playing an important role in your life. Take notice of them people and what they might be here to teach you.

Your energies probably blend together perfectly, creating a give and take that fosters love and understanding. You two tend to believe in one another and support each other completely.
